name: Kari Lake
subject: My message to the People of Arizona & the United States:
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982912:6WepIuGWN:m:1:3331421248:369EA5F3830142A9BC80CB1E81D6F0F9:r)
---

To the People of Arizona and of the United States:

A few weeks ago, Elections in Arizona officially started when Mail-In Ballots were sent out across our State. Election Day was just a few weeks ago, and Maricopa County is STILL counting ballots.

Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history.

Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures.

Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair.

Thankfully, the Attorney General's office is demanding answers from Maricopa County. Attorney General Mark Brnovich is taking the first steps necessary to remedy this assault on our Democracy.

This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country.

Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were.

I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections.

| [**STAND WITH KARI LAKE** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982912:6WepIuGWN:m:1:3331421248:369EA5F3830142A9BC80CB1E81D6F0F9:r)
---

Thank You,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982912:6WepIuGWN:m:1:3331421248:369EA5F3830142A9BC80CB1E81D6F0F9:r)

Kari Lake
Candidate for Arizona Governor

* * *

clean_body: | To the People of Arizona and of the United States: A few weeks ago, Elections in Arizona officially started when Mail-In Ballots were sent out across our State. Election Day was just a few weeks ago, and Maricopa County is STILL counting ballots. Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history. Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures. Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair. Thankfully, the Attorney General's office is demanding answers from Maricopa County. Attorney General Mark Brnovich is taking the first steps necessary to remedy this assault on our Democracy. This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country. Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were. I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections. | Thank You, Kari Lake Candidate for Arizona Governor *

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Herschel Walker's election would further mainstream fringe figures who spread dangerous, hateful views of their fellow Americans. Can you help our country do better than this, by supporting Raphael Warnock for Senate?
body:
No more Senate hatemongers
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92139ebe-a2b2-4e67-9a75-4e4332f947ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between six more years of Senator Raphael Warnock ... or Senator-elect Herschel Walker. Here’s another reason why the December 6th runoff election matters to the whole country ..._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T272d9907-b54c-4277-9521-1957cefd679d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Donald Trump had a dinner at Mar-a-Lago with anti-Semite Kanye West and Holocaust denier Nick Fuentes. At first Trump tried to deny it, but it's been reported in multiple outlets right down to the specifics of the conversation. _** _**Trump is a close friend, political mentor and supporter of Herschel Walker's, who's made numerous despicably anti-Semitic remarks. Trump has repeatedly campaigned for Walker in Georgia’s critical Senate race.**_ _**Walker's election would further mainstream fringe figures who hold racist, misogynist, anti-gay and anti-Semitic views. It'****s becoming a dangerous threat to inspire more violence, of the kind we've seen most recently in Colorado Springs.**_ **_WALKER’S BRAND OF EXTREMISM PUTS ALL OF OUR FAMILIES IN DANGER._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help fight extremism in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0fd9a40-e03b-4f5a-ae99-e84e8f9dd712/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We beat back many of the radicalized figures that Trump elevated from the fringes of US politics earlier this month, candidates such as Kari Lake, Doug Mastriano and Tudor Dixon, to elect Democrats devoted to equality. Now we must do the same to Herschel Walker, so we can keep yet another Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in office, pushing for our goal of full equality for all._** [**_Will you join us in sending Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep Senator Warnock in office and stop hate from having yet another representative in the Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce928d82-8a61-4e66-bbf7-030d26f96f74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for caring about ALL Americans.**
---
Cliff

| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: American Briefing
subject: Share your opinion on K-12 schools
body:
| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
---
| | Friend, how's your day been so far? Going great, I hope!

After the recent elections, an important question has been on my mind, and I wonder how you would answer it. Here it is:

**Do you believe that a proper education is vital to preserving liberty --and that the radical indoctrination now being forced on too many K-12 students poses an existential threat to liberty?**

[**Yes**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqd18hhf9v6el9kje4ekig0d166ekb346gf9jsfo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sth66o72cph2bs)

[**No**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5e4gjogt2svftee7m8lcdftcioddk4vs40fie2o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sth66o72cph2bs)

[**I'm Not Sure**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs2f5kb6cskol9cgp4665rcnc286g7cc4tcl9200_rp22sh2s8i66or4sth66o72cph2bs)

Since you're an informed patriot, you're undoubtedly aware of what's happening in our K-12 schools across the country.

As my boss, Dr. Larry Arnn, put it in a recent issue of _Imprimis_ : "we do have children being turned against their country by being indoctrinated to look on its past...as a shameful time of irredeemable injustice."

And make no mistake, these issues aren't going away because a few radical officials lost their recent elections.

That's because entrenched education bureaucrats will continue to push biased American history and radical ideologies regardless of election results.

If you're like me, when you think back to your school days, you can't imagine your teachers telling you that America is "racist to its core" or "irredeemably flawed."

Sadly, this is what far too many of America's K-12 students experience in classrooms across the country today.

That's why I want to get your answer to my question above.

Your answer will help us understand where you stand regarding education in your state and community--**and if you will still stand with us as we approach a new year.**

Since it is only one question, your answer will only take a second of your time. Just click the button that best reflects your opinion. Thank you in advance for your thoughts!

Enjoy the rest of your day,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zim6v6v3ed8nimd85fk6vb47c61e5bvudt7g2ong).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbnvdgbkk2359gvi9q1i0r1e8le8cc1jsoadkfuo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3cjjm4or0s9j649fg)

**$5** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, friend.
Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.
Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With only one week until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $5 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, friend: Will you split $5 now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**
**Here's a special link just for you:**[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock_gfs**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55237780/381083144/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3814-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc0NGY3ZC1lNjZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVpbAjIopiCLz0uZg5E2VUeICqInSV8LDbeqGfJxzbo=)
Thank you for pitching in, friend. I truly appreciate your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: My story is only possible here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**
**My story is only possible here.** You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. From there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. 's church and represent Georgians as the first Black senator in our state's history.
Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. **We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you.****That’s why I have to ask: ****[Please, friend, will you chip in $5 or more right now, split between me and Jacky Rosen, so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55239237/381087511/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2269-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTc0ODkwZi1lYzZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EiVYnlMmmxyvpbLxJxNUFlnXvpJ-CjAf3bdyp9zAKQA=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55239238/381087512/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2269-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTc0ODkwZi1lYzZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EiVYnlMmmxyvpbLxJxNUFlnXvpJ-CjAf3bdyp9zAKQA=)
I'll be blunt: That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.
They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. **I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever.**
**[So please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you give now – split between me and Jacky Rosen – to become one of the 25,000 donors we need by midnight to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55239239/381087513/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2269-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTc0ODkwZi1lYzZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EiVYnlMmmxyvpbLxJxNUFlnXvpJ-CjAf3bdyp9zAKQA=)**
Thank you,

Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=9in%2Fu8BqkSLGlRp7u0WwfJQqfe5Ya8iN8GTzvZGOP0E6cPXOGz8ZgU%2Fkoo9zv9o2wvicdOk8ik4AsUOzdLTXe%2Bsv3sqY9yag61UYoc2BwkWVK4nLQcbSFetOw7Y26h%2FTf0WnDuWQz9xSjVXraU%2B9V4hUJGSioNTq%2BnuHXnfszntVIYO3wR0Z3L0EpsQbb3HsJLPUYyZ8KCkpDsz19V5bCRIpkn7dW46XFO1Wh0T99zTJDuPnErZkVGzxvHOvysY2cz5QldzPGddtAH%2FwhANwS8FssMZIRbdKZuzLSanNJB8tmcdDNzIGFNKSE4IfzBDhJ3NuiUdwKqHlvZhwqkitJTIFFE68JEjC%2Bf4wSzctwgcz03IFcOJiczSioWoykoG8NoC1nqk8Pl4IGNJQsKowslCUsv2V9HDWl08Zy3O9Wus%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

name: United American Patriots
subject: Honored to have your support this Giving Tuesday, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982833:6o4D-uGNV:m:1:3373497171:5D1B0D85879490A1774C95EF8BD3BCD2:r)
---
Peter, November 29th is Giving Tuesday, and the United American Patriots team has established a BIG fundraising goal for the week to support wrongly accused Warriors - $15,000! **UAP has** **a historic number of active cases heading into the new year, and our Warriors need your support more than ever before.**
---
[**HELP US REACH OUR GOAL**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982833:6o4D-uGNV:m:1:3373497171:5D1B0D85879490A1774C95EF8BD3BCD2:r)
---
Giving Tuesday is a national movement to transform the communities in which we live by supporting charitable groups and activities close to our hearts. And our UAP Warriors work harder than anyone to better the world we live in. They...
* Leave their families to be deployed abroad,
* Miss important holidays and milestones,
* Witness horrors we could only imagine,
* Sustain painful injuries,
* And much more.

**They do it all to be treated like nothing more than a common criminal...** These men and women put their lives on the line in service to our country, only to have it turn its back on them... The Heroes we help are completely innocent and in no way deserve the treatment they're getting. The government is ignoring evidence, disregarding testimony, and manufacturing false claims to get these Soldiers put behind bars.
_But you have the opportunity to help them![**You can contribute here to help us achieve our goal for Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982833:6o4D-uGNV:m:1:3373497171:5D1B0D85879490A1774C95EF8BD3BCD2:r)_
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982833:6o4D-uGNV:m:1:3373497171:5D1B0D85879490A1774C95EF8BD3BCD2:r)
---
Peter, there are still too many Heroes wrongfully imprisoned for crimes they didn't commit. And we need your help to get them home to their families. With your support, our organization is able to raise awareness about our Warriors' cases with the media, help them afford the absurd legal fees, and stand alongside them as they fight for justice. _**[We would be honored to receive your support this National Giving Tuesday to further our mission to free these Warriors and reunite them with their families.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982833:6o4D-uGNV:m:1:3373497171:5D1B0D85879490A1774C95EF8BD3BCD2:r)**_
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, November 29th is Giving Tuesday, and the United American Patriots team has established a BIG fundraising goal for the week to support wrongly accused Warriors - $15,000! UAP has a historic number of active cases heading into the new year, and our Warriors need your support more than ever before. Giving Tuesday is a national movement to transform the communities in which we live by supporting charitable groups and activities close to our hearts. And our UAP Warriors work harder than anyone to better the world we live in. They... Leave their families to be deployed abroad, Miss important holidays and milestones, Witness horrors we could only imagine, Sustain painful injuries, And much more. They do it all to be treated like nothing more than a common criminal... These men and women put their lives on the line in service to our country, only to have it turn its back on them... The Heroes we help are completely innocent and in no way deserve the treatment they're getting. The government is ignoring evidence, disregarding testimony, and manufacturing false claims to get these Soldiers put behind bars. But you have the opportunity to help them Peter, there are still too many Heroes wrongfully imprisoned for crimes they didn't commit. And we need your help to get them home to their families. With your support, our organization is able to raise awareness about our Warriors' cases with the media, help them afford the absurd legal fees, and stand alongside them as they fight for justice. Thank you in advance, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. name: Candace Owens
subject: Don't donate because it's Giving Tuesday
body:
I’m sure you’re getting many emails today asking for donations because it’s Giving Tuesday. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6403%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=4bAy%2fwJ%2bOPqi6rLEIYXa9g&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ueau4mlV87uuCuS9qgvmBA&sysid=1)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ueau4mlV87uuCuS9qgvmBA&sysid=1)

Friend,

I’m sure you’re getting many emails today asking for donations because it’s Giving Tuesday.

But I’m not emailing you just because it’s Giving Tuesday. I don’t want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT’s educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Friend, I’m not asking you to donate simply because it’s Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in $10, $35, $50, or any amount today? Click here >>>_**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84163%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vo4HxM83njYGTCNwlhwVIA&sysid=1)**

Here’s how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ueau4mlV87uuCuS9qgvmBA&sysid=1)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT’s State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84164%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H1926l7UJucSJfT%2fXwYzbg&sysid=1)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ueau4mlV87uuCuS9qgvmBA&sysid=1)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Friend, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT’s educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84175%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1NcAnRywzFU%2fr1ZB7KuTUw&sysid=1)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT’s message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84176%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hN70yjZ%2bwJdVkblZTYNz3Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84177%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qpr5hCw4Xh0mlcXKx%2bS8gw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84178%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kfp6j%2for6QM0qxfcT7hH6Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84179%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KJS62FEatXzYTGvYcRNkmA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84170%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m1vovRpt6oNxoFuEMOUCzg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84171%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zvNaeR3cw8NXLae6Pok02g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HrqjIddjcjJy0aJ9xT8B0g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84173%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oZfYeiyW7foTm2OWDptisw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84174%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wnd2KeXO3nDJJBOhaQD%2b9Q&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6403%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=4bAy%2fwJ%2bOPqi6rLEIYXa9g&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6403%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=4bAy%2fwJ%2bOPqi6rLEIYXa9g&sysid=1)

name: Team Casey
subject: What's next?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Election Day may be over, but Republicans aren't backing down now. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55244725/381108219/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmMyMjY2MC1mMTZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCFpjcIsrQO90Vc6n8UW-65hBSNJRefm4hr4Odzbeb4=&emci=4698f351-6c6f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=62c22660-f16f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Thanks to you, not only did Democrats hold the Senate majority this month, we have a real shot at adding another seat in Georgia. That’s the good news.

The bad news is that Republicans already started planning for the next election months before the last one ended. Worse yet, they're already recruiting candidates to run against Bob here in Pennsylvania.

We're doing all we can to help Rev. Raphael Warnock win reelection in next week's run-off, but we can't wait until it's over to prepare for what's next.

[**Will you chip in now to help Bob defend the Senate majority and keep fighting for Pennsylvania families? clean_body: Election Day may be over, but Republicans aren't backing down now. Peter, Thanks to you, not only did Democrats hold the Senate majority this month, we have a real shot at adding another seat in Georgia. That’s the good news. The bad news is that Republicans already started planning for the next election months before the last one ended. Worse yet, they're already recruiting candidates to run against Bob here in Pennsylvania. We're doing all we can to help Rev. Peter,
---
There's only a week to go until the Georgia Senate runoff, and polling shows it's an extremely close race between Trump endorsed Herschel Walker and radical liberal Raphael Warnock.
---
**But George Soros, who was the single largest donor of the 2022 elections, is using his billions to try and stop Herschel from winning.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986333:JlBHduGNc:m:1:3331421248:0A9F06EAB69130D859F079A3143631D6:r)
---
Soros and the Democrats are spending MILLIONS to attack Herschel in the final stretch of this toss-up runoff, and we can't let their attacks go unanswered in these final days.
---
That's why it's absolutely imperative that we CRUSH our end-of-month goal for our Georgia Victory Fund...
---
_... but as things stand, we're still $19,465 short. _
---

body:

Early voting is underway in our Senate race in Georgia. With just one week to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.
That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

Raphael Warnock, and you’ll help fight back against voter suppression tactics. **Second:** We’ve won game-changing runoff Elections before, and we know what it takes to win this one. clean_body: We know you’re getting a lot of donation requests today, but we’d like to quickly explain why Fair Fight is the best destination for a Giving Tuesday contribution. | | | We know you’re getting a lot of donation requests today, but we’d like to quickly explain why Fair Fight is an ideal destination for a Giving Tuesday contribution: First: With the Georgia Runoff Election already underway, your donation will help us quickly scale up our voter outreach efforts across the state to re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock, and you’ll help fight back against voter suppression tactics. Second: We’ve won game-changing runoff Elections before, and we know what it takes to win this one. With the latest polls tightening, we’re counting on the strength of this grassroots team to send voting rights champion Sen. Warnock back to the U.S. Senate — and that means we need to keep our funding up. Third: Time is running out to reach voters. Because of Gov. Brian Kemp’s voter suppression bill, the Runoff Election is a month earlier than in previous years. Early voting has already started statewide, and we need to ensure that voters have the information they need to cast their ballots between now and December 6. = | = = = = = Thanks so much for your support. With gratitude, The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2022 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: United American Patriots
subject: Honored to have your support this Giving Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982829:JMFyHuGKN:m:1:3374012347:455962C7DE1439103341DE5CCF9279E2:r)
---
Peter, November 29th is Giving Tuesday, and the United American Patriots team has established a BIG fundraising goal for the week to support wrongly accused Warriors - $15,000! **UAP has** **a historic number of active cases heading into the new year, and our Warriors need your support more than ever before.**
---
[**HELP US REACH OUR GOAL**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982829:JMFyHuGKN:m:1:3374012347:455962C7DE1439103341DE5CCF9279E2:r)
---
Giving Tuesday is a national movement to transform the communities in which we live by supporting charitable groups and activities close to our hearts. And our UAP Warriors work harder than anyone to better the world we live in. They...
* Leave their families to be deployed abroad,
* Miss important holidays and milestones,
* Witness horrors we could only imagine,
* Sustain painful injuries,
* And much more.

**They do it all to be treated like nothing more than a common criminal...** These men and women put their lives on the line in service to our country, only to have it turn its back on them... The Heroes we help are completely innocent and in no way deserve the treatment they're getting. The government is ignoring evidence, disregarding testimony, and manufacturing false claims to get these Soldiers put behind bars.
_But you have the opportunity to help them![**You can contribute here to help us achieve our goal for Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982829:JMFyHuGKN:m:1:3374012347:455962C7DE1439103341DE5CCF9279E2:r)_
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982829:JMFyHuGKN:m:1:3374012347:455962C7DE1439103341DE5CCF9279E2:r)
---
Peter, there are still too many Heroes wrongfully imprisoned for crimes they didn't commit. And we need your help to get them home to their families. With your support, our organization is able to raise awareness about our Warriors' cases with the media, help them afford the absurd legal fees, and stand alongside them as they fight for justice. _**[We would be honored to receive your support this National Giving Tuesday to further our mission to free these Warriors and reunite them with their families.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982829:JMFyHuGKN:m:1:3374012347:455962C7DE1439103341DE5CCF9279E2:r)**_
---
[**DONATE TO THE WARRIOR FUND**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982829:JMFyHuGKN:m:1:3374012347:455962C7DE1439103341DE5CCF9279E2:r)
---
Thank you in advance, United American Patriots
---

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988028:6vQdDuGwN:m:1:3331703221:77F763896EE41A0A6FBDBA2D5D742055:r)**_

[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988029:6vQdDuGwN:m:1:3331703221:77F763896EE41A0A6FBDBA2D5D742055:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988028:6vQdDuGwN:m:1:3331703221:77F763896EE41A0A6FBDBA2D5D742055:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988028:6vQdDuGwN:m:1:3331703221:77F763896EE41A0A6FBDBA2D5D742055:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988028:6vQdDuGwN:m:1:3331703221:77F763896EE41A0A6FBDBA2D5D742055:r)**

Now, Apple [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ Breaking: Kanye Walks Out of Time Poole Interview Less than ten minutes into his TimCast interview with Nick Fuentes and Milo Yiannopoulos, Kanye West walked out after being frustrated with where the conversation. body:
Peter, Today is #GivingTuesday! GivingTuesday was created in 2012 as a simple idea: a day that encourages people to do good. Because of you and your gifts, we run year round and have been critical in electing candidates who champion gun reform up and down the ballot every year since 2016, in races for the U.S. Senate, U.S. House of Representatives, Governor, and State Legislatures. We have advocated for policy changes at the state and federal level and have mobilized thousands of activists in the fight. We have also took legal action to help gun reform legislation become reality. This is all because of you. Without your support, we couldn't be tackling gun reform from so many angles. Which is why, on this #GivingTuesday, we are asking for your financial support to keep our work going strong. [I am a college student and volunteer for Pride Fund, with limited income. I truly believe in this cause and I donate whenever I can. If I can give, I am hoping that you will to -- help us meet our goal of $50,000 dollars to make sure we can continue our work in the fight for common sense gun reform. Click here to donate.](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes) With a successful 2022 election almost behind us (there is one Senate race in Georgia in a runoff election January 6th that could help Democrats add one more Senate seat), we are looking forward to building on our successes and continuing to fight for public safety through our advocacy, education, and lobbying efforts, but we cannot do that without your help. Let me explain how your support helps us make a difference:
* We endorse candidates up and down the ballot and across the country.
* We run ads exposing representatives who put the gun lobby and NRA agenda above the safety of our communities.
* We create communication strategies and social media content and resources for our endorsed candidates.
* We organize canvassing and phone banking efforts and mobilize volunteers across the country.
* We fight back against dangerous legislation at the state and federal level.
* We rally grassroots supporters to advance gun safety and LGBTQ equality.
* We focus on advocacy and education to make the public aware of our cause and its importance.
* We take legal action to ensure gun safety laws are implemented and prevent them from being struck down.

[Pitch in this #GivingTuesday to support our mission and help us build on our successes.](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes) | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?express_lane=true&refcode=20171127abx&amount=15.00&recurring=yes)**
---
**[Express donate $25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?express_lane=true&refcode=20171127abx&amount=25.00&recurring=yes)**
**[Express donate $50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?express_lane=true&refcode=20171127abx&amount=50.00&recurring=yes)**
**[Express donate $100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?express_lane=true&refcode=20171127abx&amount=100.00&recurring=yes)**
****[Or, donate a different amount >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?refcode=2020&amount=25&recurring=yes)****
I am proud to be a volunteer with Pride Fund because I believe in this organization and its cause. Thank you for sharing in my beliefs and supporting us this Giving Tuesday.

In solidarity,

Cody Mitchell
Volunteer
Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/k6TMW0e1vqBwwOQeHCMp6oJ1fmjVdICGXEJ_IDdN1vQ=/JTIw0QfZUP94O40ghcf9XDKok63erWEIIpBA9mI_1Po=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes)

body:

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Fellow American, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

Friend,

Our team is fighting hard to ensure every LEGAL vote is counted - but we cannot do it alone.

This is where you come in, Friend, this is the final push, and I can't do this without you.

[**Volunteers across Arizona are making sure that our voice is heard and our ballots are counted, but the fact is many Republican ballots may be invalid.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3963bb16bcba453683bd064119a7a1c7&_e=SJVpT-XYXq9GlbR30zokHV0Df6LQ_57pkxtOgUUQY5aT1kU1-3NFW3gFqy11YX7yitMASzNvmJExrJha4ByXEcPaPApOAhagSTubVStnYof9uK2XgYyzEX1P3I9VwgqhYkyGZ81GQsU_ziiPRw4wVGNdbaeL88swHgcmZwcWwo8txx1IbivQapR5geKH9xH0Ej54TassLNVSBlyepEHeBaK0Y9HxpLnPZSetT3Oq38d8sJhsqVuOooUrF_JasYEGremSPrUFe2xSCDo3xnQbNxZW8flFK9Kz4UOeDbjDY_IrV3P7lxwrxWHCGgfL65N4UvtU7_lBxIBYqHuAse7ln1wiBkNhnVjinbz26SFlishswEa3OjHyEUbTQa6P9xilExaqFovtbrqIllLhpKmroEezLvvyXB-34e13t2QkNfp3_2X6r29-eRGY8jbQ3E7viHw7DVs6a0i1O_xBz2uG67_WdvEPQ7u8VG7LIl8L8EEvtujR-aVOiYZnwXuo50bc)

name: Candace Owens
subject: I’m tired of criminal idols
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986431:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)

Peter,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in any amount? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986431:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986431:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986431:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986432:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986433:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986434:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986435:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986436:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986437:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986438:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986439:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986431:J1-AWuGNI:m:1:3331421248:D783E733C8AC333E46B975737BCED120:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Candace Owens
subject: Sorry for the early morning email, but this is too important
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986080:6_1YWuG9N:m:1:3253819041:E37CEEA510176D12BCA3E3F84AA09FFA:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986080:6_1YWuG9N:m:1:3253819041:E37CEEA510176D12BCA3E3F84AA09FFA:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986080:6_1YWuG9N:m:1:3253819041:E37CEEA510176D12BCA3E3F84AA09FFA:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986080:6_1YWuG9N:m:1:3253819041:E37CEEA510176D12BCA3E3F84AA09FFA:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986080:6_1YWuG9N:m:1:3253819041:E37CEEA510176D12BCA3E3F84AA09FFA:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986080:6_1YWuG9N:m:1:3253819041:E37CEEA510176D12BCA3E3F84AA09FFA:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986080:6_1YWuG9N:m:1:3253819041:E37CEEA510176D12BCA3E3F84AA09FFA:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986081:6_1YWuG9N:m:1:3253819041:E37CEEA510176D12BCA3E3F84AA09FFA:r)

clean_body: Special message from Candace Owens Peter, I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday. But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community. The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities. They hate us because we are winning. Just wearing a White Lives Matter shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady. Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities. BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level. name: United American Patriots
subject: It’s Giving Tuesday - here’s how you can help ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982862:JLmcWuGNN:m:1:3374627611:C7654042060D80F11731CD79E4872A71:r)
---
Peter, November 29th is Giving Tuesday, and the United American Patriots team has established a BIG fundraising goal for the week to support wrongly accused Warriors - $15,000! **UAP has** **a historic number of active cases heading into the new year, and our Warriors need your support more than ever before.**
---
[**HELP US REACH OUR GOAL**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982862:JLmcWuGNN:m:1:3374627611:C7654042060D80F11731CD79E4872A71:r)
---
Giving Tuesday is a national movement to transform the communities in which we live by supporting charitable groups and activities close to our hearts. And our UAP Warriors work harder than anyone to better the world we live in. They...
* Leave their families to be deployed abroad,
* Miss important holidays and milestones,
* Witness horrors we could only imagine,
* Sustain painful injuries,
* And much more.

**They do it all to be treated like nothing more than a common criminal...** These men and women put their lives on the line in service to our country, only to have it turn its back on them... The Heroes we help are completely innocent and in no way deserve the treatment they're getting. The government is ignoring evidence, disregarding testimony, and manufacturing false claims to get these Soldiers put behind bars.
_But you have the opportunity to help them![**You can contribute here to help us achieve our goal for Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982862:JLmcWuGNN:m:1:3374627611:C7654042060D80F11731CD79E4872A71:r)_
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982862:JLmcWuGNN:m:1:3374627611:C7654042060D80F11731CD79E4872A71:r)
---
Peter, there are still too many Heroes wrongfully imprisoned for crimes they didn't commit. And we need your help to get them home to their families. With your support, our organization is able to raise awareness about our Warriors' cases with the media, help them afford the absurd legal fees, and stand alongside them as they fight for justice. _**[We would be honored to receive your support this National Giving Tuesday to further our mission to free these Warriors and reunite them with their families.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982862:JLmcWuGNN:m:1:3374627611:C7654042060D80F11731CD79E4872A71:r)**_
---
[**DONATE TO THE WARRIOR FUND**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61982862:JLmcWuGNN:m:1:3374627611:C7654042060D80F11731CD79E4872A71:r)
---
Thank you in advance, United American Patriots
---
|
---

name: bad bad bad (VPP)
subject: re: the latest Georgia Runoff poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Rev. Raphael Warnock is in trouble

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Our last election this cycle happens one week from today. It’s so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor.
body:
Only 7 days left
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc30e40f3-91f6-4cfc-91a9-899ffbb7ba23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between a Senator Warnock and a Senator (gulp...) Herschel Walker._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4bdbd6f-d409-4f46-97bd-4cd5e8fc4f40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this election due to only 554 votes. 554. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right._** **_Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast.__ _** **_It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor._ **
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25018210-cd32-4e39-a958-3fbeacdce9b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Last weekend, early voting in Georgia began. This decisive runoff election will take place in seven days. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker?_** [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get Georgia Democrats to the polls to strengthen The Peach State and America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbaa54296-f0f8-4dcd-add4-924f99f1ee6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy.**
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55256775/381153327/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDAzODUwNy0wMTcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BBJYOpImzthbXpS3h99pjG-GLtGXPkvKNXiHVlyk6ds=&emci=d1e4c6f7-466f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=a4038507-0170-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=43402272) | Peter – I'm fired up! Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.** **That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Share your opinion on K-12 schools
body:
Do you believe that a proper education is vital to preserving liberty—and that the radical indoctrination now being forced on too many K-12 students poses an existential threat to liberty?

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | |
---
| | Friend, how's your day been so far? Going great, I hope!

After the recent elections, an important question has been on my mind, and I wonder how you would answer it. Here it is:

**Do you believe that a proper education is vital to preserving liberty --and that the radical indoctrination now being forced on too many K-12 students poses an existential threat to liberty?**

[**Yes**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb6040f29b334125951a44a39de3734d&_e=FPavHonNVVp1QqN51uo1-ndEuupiBzGE4fHgrhQpICg11cjlIa69kPEbGtoeX4LsPwsEQTNxygClKKYJ4JjOhhn_DXC1zi1pPAazrptURBl3D5n2dyTaZE9P6JJZLaFlH67Sw7b1yX5P2K6sbe4nhPtVUilsY4Wb_BFrMN4FDRSv640sl-iCuren5DZ1M3iwZNe07yOcPkTG_CeJdAC9ZTRGEAuDV4EcTV2P4uhaJsit5cek3ncP7NEJLqsfYak7qFAiTOAUi1trVHiHaorGMJYn7RqLFuhqCIx5Qjg7PjVY6hYQ3rBgpTPK1RcZuIb87UOrTc9_sRkj1_wI0lRDpK_mYmceLXRQ9wQtV_B39Vxb_7r4AbyUt6xlCkygW0j2AyVqqF5k2B0GdqgnbqJSJpfBMzjsf5--yoccplXbeGk%3D)

[**No**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb6040f29b334125951a44a39de3734d&_e=FPavHonNVVp1QqN51uo1-ndEuupiBzGE4fHgrhQpICg11cjlIa69kPEbGtoeX4LsPwsEQTNxygClKKYJ4JjOhhn_DXC1zi1pPAazrptURBl3D5n2dyTaZE9P6JJZLaFlH67Sw7b1yX5P2K6sbe4nhPtVUilsY4Wb_BFrMN4FDRSv640sl-iCuren5DZ1M3iwZNe07yOcPkTG_CeJdAC9ZTRGEAuDV4EcTV2P4uhaJsit5cek3ncP7NEJLqsfYak7ro1uBKfqcREt3GbYbNfJNWlAMA1Jn5hbTob3SwhmlU_D5P_5Mus0jyIZ4jJEL960VqH2oU7zKsf2GL7JmO_nKKcqueQs2vlStPX9e8FxNhsqbtl0GFn-pvpc61X9wy-L3f0lQGSX_vYqpVb1sBLG_O_GPtYJa8Pge2b-PrfJoOY%3D)

[**I'm Not Sure**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb6040f29b334125951a44a39de3734d&_e=FPavHonNVVp1QqN51uo1-ndEuupiBzGE4fHgrhQpICg11cjlIa69kPEbGtoeX4LsPwsEQTNxygClKKYJ4JjOhhn_DXC1zi1pPAazrptURBl3D5n2dyTaZE9P6JJZLaFlH67Sw7b1yX5P2K6sbe4nhPtVUilsY4Wb_BFrMN4FDRSv640sl-iCuren5DZ1M3iwZNe07yOcPkTG_CeJdAC9ZTRGEAuDV4EcTV2P4uhaJsit5cek3ncP7NEJLqsfYak738w4TFBR3mXDUzt85Vvi0LvLBoYvwjwgMeTyWaxmQ0ghCnnFewQNTZtxaMaiSHiIlzxiYgaBwQSCMCyfsq9f5E0yUwb4zu4nGt11_gzjmVzyUxBddvdL0Ft5oTN5Z4oHU1P7kGfBs53G0N3TKlXW4bLq-IFSbhiGT8mYvISRBMs%3D)

Since you're an informed patriot, you're undoubtedly aware of what's happening in our K-12 schools across the country.

As my boss, Dr. Larry Arnn, put it in a recent issue of _Imprimis_ : "we do have children being turned against their country by being indoctrinated to look on its past...as a shameful time of irredeemable injustice."

And make no mistake, these issues aren't going away because a few radical officials lost their recent elections.

That's because entrenched education bureaucrats will continue to push biased American history and radical ideologies regardless of election results.

If you're like me, when you think back to your school days, you can't imagine your teachers telling you that America is "racist to its core" or "irredeemably flawed."

Sadly, this is what far too many of America's K-12 students experience in classrooms across the country today.

That's why I want to get your answer to my question above.

Your answer will help us understand where you stand regarding education in your state and community--**and if you will still stand with us as we approach a new year.**

Since it is only one question, your answer will only take a second of your time. Just click the button that best reflects your opinion. Thank you in advance for your thoughts!

Enjoy the rest of your day,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=fb6040f29b334125951a44a39de3734d&_t=2GN7u5pmYq2jSeXJ_6Xo3XfJ2m-LrcjOdNLY3BHJmhs-F6rz7KtCcnNx0AQGMRNRb0k-5ozgp1ZKLxhzQRFMu8pMm8Bu8UmaTv_S2X3xeY5eJZNzbeTUeqsissPLhUu3-q77rMxCuyqfST93_JfIK08Q3u_IMiFuXuOfdLpGLM0%3D)

body:
|
---
> _We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC._
Friend,

The 2022 midterm elections were great for the safety of our democracy. Across the country, voters sent Trump-endorsed election deniers a clear message: If you spread conspiracy theories about our elections, you can’t represent us. But the fight isn’t over yet. [**Republican Accountability PAC is all-in on Georgia, and we need your help.**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWJj_h8t2phJW3bWFpX7l5BmLVtG5yr4SZPzVN412x9L3q8_QV1-WJV7CgCFlW4q14_513zYLkW1dDpyR1TVBDbVyJtQB1DbqZDW1B_rRh8t6D0zW31gFX043zkcRW86T_D61ZTQzzW4K_SCz2WzxndW8Bmkxc7K-R2bW8NhknT7_HKjrW4nQw-r8GTDYdVS-0W12p4xXHW7zlpGq8hjmlCW3-FNJ_4mlQbgW3s8J8g5cQVh3W4qCx3h67HdkvW2Q0xzZ8VWlBFW21k2hG7k4WPwW3P24kc30Z8z3W4mMTH_3XSKrfW2bMTXN6Mq4PgW2wfY3y2yHCwGN4g2p7CdwNnd38jy1) Your voices and your support are what made us successful in defeating the candidates in our key races this election cycle. Now we need to rally one more time to ensure that someone as extreme and unstable as Herschel Walker is nowhere near the United States Senate. We’re hitting people where they are too. We have ads live now on YouTube, Facebook, streaming services, and over radio. Dozens of billboards elevating the voices of people like Brenda, Pat, Bob, and Barry are live across the state.
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWJj_h8t2phJW3bWFpX7l5BmLVtG5yr4SZPzVN412x9L3q8_QV1-WJV7CgP9_W3_lftp15N-k4W96QTXl3SMRW7W8JpnrW68nQxRW8nLDVz9213VcW2NFrLq3MXfrsW2dglWk82cqd-W27D4qj6P8g9dW43cW711PXD6HW1zKLf-26KF5VW3hyPZH6YJn2dW7nkVV02lnMwxVs9G3l3B0-9WW476BcD8VP7v_W2NgM89163j57W321zHH58fKySW108GN-7r_Pm3W9cKFzJ81S5p1W4wgTqK6lkk0GW60wm1J2S6bzqN1FgHCpNWVHBW42pslQ26-4RdV-Jnh15l5KZy3gFP1)

That’s what’s going to make all the difference—real voices like yours.
##
You know Herschel Walker is unqualified to be a senator, and we’re going to make sure every Georgian knows that going into this runoff too.
##
[**Support Republican Accountability PAC today so we can keep up the pressure against the MAGA loyalists who are still trying to lie their way into office.** ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWJj_h8t2phJW3bWFpX7l5BmLVtG5yr4SZPzVN412x9L3q8_QV1-WJV7CgYdQW3tnDVy6S14D-W42F43T3prjMHW1kp6qm4XhMG-W58zwqv2jCD7KMPM218GK6k8W7bzyRH39TP9TW8HtyMN6fW2K-W5QxhMz17JzvkN75qFNZc9jwrW6kddF34dmczLW2sNt667B_MzkW6MwDHr6Y80xVW96DVNN8pWQPwW4jMLBM7mSDzNW2pfQLT76zQwfW1N2sqM8VHtfDVyH0r65NZDZ7Vv_fFv1jG9gpW47S4sd9fFX3SW51dBcq3stypQW6PTvvH1_j52BW5XlhJG8DL4Fs3lK51)
##
We’re winning the fight for our democracy. Let’s make one last strong push and deliver another loss to the Trump wing of the GOP.
##
Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

name: Candace Owens
subject: Sorry for the early morning email, but this is too important
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985198:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985198:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985198:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985198:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985198:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985198:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985198:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985199:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985200:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985201:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985202:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985203:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985204:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985205:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985206:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61985198:6l3IcuGKN:m:1:3317145305:60645B764789E194630E2E2DE11E880E:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

name: Kari Lake
subject: Make your voice heard
body:
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu5q09mn1boirh2rpov2rli07flnsjp7ud4vd01g_rp22sh2s8i66or4stj69or4cth2bs)
---

Volunteers across Arizona are making sure that our voice is heard and our ballots are counted, but the fact is many Republican ballots may be invalid.

I’m asking for your immediate help.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989169:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r)
---
Peter,

By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate.

I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race.

Disclaimer: **[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to chip-in to help keep Herschel's campaign funded through December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989169:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r)** But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever.
1. **_Absences_** : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. **If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion.**
2. **_2024_** : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (**both deep red states**) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection.

[** CHIP in $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989170:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r)

3. **_Judges_** : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. **If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want.**
4. **_Federal nominations:_** With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more "level-headed" options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to.
5. **_6 years:_** If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, **it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years.** If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028.

**We simply cannot afford to lose this race.** We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989169:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r)**

**I want Herschel to win.** The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great.

**[Will you do me a personal favor and contribute to Herschel's campaign today? I promised him I would do my best to raise $100,000 for him, and I hope you'll help me deliver on that promise.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989169:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989169:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r)

Jim Jordan

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989169:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989171:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989172:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989173:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989174:JCnS3uGMN:m:1:3331703221:AE2687D3D564930EB9CB891FC00C4AAB:r)
