name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Please watch this special message that I recorded for you 👀
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988970:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988970:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988970:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988971:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988971:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988972:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988973:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988974:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988975:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988970:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988970:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988970:6NQ-BuGN3:m:1:3374627611:1DD46922AE45399FCA8B1485E2B55FD1:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America is a nonprofit 501(c)(4) membership organization. With your gift of $25 or more you will become a Sustaining Member of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, and will receive information regarding the special benefits of your annual membership. Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, at the discretion of its board of directors and officers. If you would like to make a directed contribution to support a particular project, please contact us. Although Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America periodically uses its general treasury funds to engage on important political matters, the organization does not accept funds earmarked for independent expenditure activity or designated for other political purposes in support or opposition to federal candidates.

name: Sean Patrick Maloney
subject: Derek, I promised;
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
[**I’m reaching out to my most loyal supporters with one last request:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55284420/381198493/91184225?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b1_spm_all_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODQ2YWExNS0xODcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_mcT4o__l0BDZQwZG7ojUp5Ez8D2pI5GJv0uKdpAjg=) [_**I just finished sorting through my campaign bills**_** _and I’m still $8,371 in the red.__I wish I didn’t have to ask, but I refuse to accept that only billionaires should run for office. So I’m humbly asking: Can I count on you to chip in $15 and help me pay off this campaign debt? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55284421/381198494/91184225?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b1_spm_all_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODQ2YWExNS0xODcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_mcT4o__l0BDZQwZG7ojUp5Ez8D2pI5GJv0uKdpAjg=) Let me explain, Derek: I know we didn’t get the result we wanted, but I’m so very proud of the campaign we ran.

Grassroots supporters fueled our race from day one and brought us within inches of victory.

We overperformed every expectation in our battle for control of Congress.

You supported me more than I could have ever imagined, and I was constantly humbled by and grateful for your generosity.

But to be honest, I never liked asking you for money, Derek.

I hate that to compete in an election, it takes hundreds of thousands of dollars.

And now, I learned firsthand why it’s tough for regular people to run for office:

Taking on campaign debt is almost always necessary to win. [_**Truly, this system is messed up. I’ll keep fighting so real folks can run for office without the fear of financial ruin. But now I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can afford, to help me pay off my final debt? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55284422/381198496/91184225?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b1_spm_all_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODQ2YWExNS0xODcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_mcT4o__l0BDZQwZG7ojUp5Ez8D2pI5GJv0uKdpAjg=) Derek, when I first announced I was running for Congress, I promised to fight for hard-working folks like you and me.

I knew that, unlike many ultra-wealthy candidates, I didn’t have billions to fund my campaign. [**Look -- I have no regrets for running. We nearly won because folks like you believed in me and chipped in to support what I was fighting for.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55284423/381198498/91184225?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b1_spm_all_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODQ2YWExNS0xODcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_mcT4o__l0BDZQwZG7ojUp5Ez8D2pI5GJv0uKdpAjg=) [_**I’m so grateful -- and now I’m asking you, from the bottom of my heart, to chip in $15 to finish the job. Even a small donation will go a long way toward helping to pay off this debt. Can I count on you one last time? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55284424/381198499/91184225?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b1_spm_all_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODQ2YWExNS0xODcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_mcT4o__l0BDZQwZG7ojUp5Ez8D2pI5GJv0uKdpAjg=) | | [**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55284425/381198502/91184225?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b1_spm_all_v2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODQ2YWExNS0xODcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_mcT4o__l0BDZQwZG7ojUp5Ez8D2pI5GJv0uKdpAjg=)

clean_body: = = Let me explain, Derek: I know we didn’t get the result we wanted, but I’m so very proud of the campaign we ran. Grassroots supporters fueled our race from day one and brought us within inches of victory. We overperformed every expectation in our battle for control of Congress. You supported me more than I could have ever imagined, and I was constantly humbled by and grateful for your generosity. But to be honest, I never liked asking you for money, Derek. I hate that to compete in an election, it takes hundreds of thousands of dollars. And now, I learned firsthand why it’s tough for regular people to run for office: Taking on campaign debt is almost always necessary to win. = Derek, when I first announced I was running for Congress, I promised to fight for hard-working folks like you and me. I knew that, unlike many ultra-wealthy candidates, I didn’t have billions to fund my campaign. = = | | = = = = = I’m so grateful for your support and so lucky to have people like you on my team. name: United American Patriots
subject: Honored to have your support this Giving Tuesday, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989567:JAhnZuGwN:m:1:3331421248:871B0C318659921A5CB40344A6BC6B5E:r)
---
Peter, November 29th is Giving Tuesday, and the United American Patriots team has established a BIG fundraising goal for the week to support wrongly accused Warriors - $15,000! **UAP has** **a historic number of active cases heading into the new year, and our Warriors need your support more than ever before.**
---
[**HELP US REACH OUR GOAL**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989567:JAhnZuGwN:m:1:3331421248:871B0C318659921A5CB40344A6BC6B5E:r)
---
Giving Tuesday is a national movement to transform the communities in which we live by supporting charitable groups and activities close to our hearts. And our UAP Warriors work harder than anyone to better the world we live in. They...
* Leave their families to be deployed abroad,
* Miss important holidays and milestones,
* Witness horrors we could only imagine,
* Sustain painful injuries,
* And much more.

**They do it all to be treated like nothing more than a common criminal...** These men and women put their lives on the line in service to our country, only to have it turn its back on them... The Heroes we help are completely innocent and in no way deserve the treatment they're getting. The government is ignoring evidence, disregarding testimony, and manufacturing false claims to get these Soldiers put behind bars.
_But you have the opportunity to help them![**You can contribute here to help us achieve our goal for Giving Tuesday.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989567:JAhnZuGwN:m:1:3331421248:871B0C318659921A5CB40344A6BC6B5E:r)_
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989567:JAhnZuGwN:m:1:3331421248:871B0C318659921A5CB40344A6BC6B5E:r)
---
Peter, there are still too many Heroes wrongfully imprisoned for crimes they didn't commit. And we need your help to get them home to their families. With your support, our organization is able to raise awareness about our Warriors' cases with the media, help them afford the absurd legal fees, and stand alongside them as they fight for justice. _**[We would be honored to receive your support this National Giving Tuesday to further our mission to free these Warriors and reunite them with their families.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989567:JAhnZuGwN:m:1:3331421248:871B0C318659921A5CB40344A6BC6B5E:r)**_
---
[**DONATE TO THE WARRIOR FUND**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989567:JAhnZuGwN:m:1:3331421248:871B0C318659921A5CB40344A6BC6B5E:r)
---
Thank you in advance, United American Patriots
---
|
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989568:JAhnZuGwN:m:1:3331421248:871B0C318659921A5CB40344A6BC6B5E:r)| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989569:JAhnZuGwN:m:1:3331421248:871B0C318659921A5CB40344A6BC6B5E:r)

name: Candace Owens
subject: Sorry for the early morning email, but this is too important
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988598:JLL5ZuGNW:m:1:3345639852:CA4005F03169D41EFCF54317B78F8E70:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988598:JLL5ZuGNW:m:1:3345639852:CA4005F03169D41EFCF54317B78F8E70:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988598:JLL5ZuGNW:m:1:3345639852:CA4005F03169D41EFCF54317B78F8E70:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988598:JLL5ZuGNW:m:1:3345639852:CA4005F03169D41EFCF54317B78F8E70:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988598:JLL5ZuGNW:m:1:3345639852:CA4005F03169D41EFCF54317B78F8E70:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988598:JLL5ZuGNW:m:1:3345639852:CA4005F03169D41EFCF54317B78F8E70:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988598:JLL5ZuGNW:m:1:3345639852:CA4005F03169D41EFCF54317B78F8E70:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkksl72a63k0kh1179g4uiaa1091qd0r231a71do_rp22sh2s8i66or4stgm2o71chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znrsmi6fo1c2bk82o6pn4j1q28dp8uua6bbj7l5o_rp22sh2s8i66or4stgm2o71chh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zis0fblm60s1bh237i3327nuajmoq4lm9o1kj4to_rp22sh2s8i66or4stgm2o71chh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zsateo6740enspslq48mspvtjq365tqaanv7r3k0).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7mkp5uni9rkd6mo0a0b22kgn0o5gh73oe9e10dg_rp22sh2s8i66or4stgm2o71chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

clean_body: And so is our biggest fundraising goal EVER >> | | = Friend: Giving Tuesday is finally here — and this year we’ve set our most ambitious Giving Tuesday fundraising goal EVER! Thanks to the help of generous Fairness Project supporters like you, friend, we’ve unlocked our Giving Tuesday 2X Match, = = We’ve set a goal to raise $10,000 before midnight tonight to fuel the fights we have ahead in 2023. From identifying more state campaigns to run in the next election cycle to defending direct democracy from attacks by extremist officials, we need to be prepared for what’s to come. $10,000 might seem like a big number, but Giving Tuesday is our MOST critical fundraising day of the entire year, and with fundamental rights like affordable health care and access to abortion hanging in the balance, we need to come out of the gates in 2023 ready to fight. = = 2022 was a landmark election year for ballot measures. We won the first-ever ballot measure campaigns to protect abortion access in the wake of Roe v. Wade being overturned. But now, anti-choice extremists are scared. They’ve seen what we’ve been able to accomplish and are finally realizing that banning abortion is a losing position. Instead of siding with voters and preserving access to our most essential health care, they are trying to make it harder to use ballot measures to protect reproductive care. We’re seeing it in Ohio, and soon we’ll be seeing it across the country. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your help, friend. = Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter, I know I’ve asked a lot of you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Not a repeat of 2020
| |
---
| | | Peter,

I know I've asked a lot of you. But the 2022 election isn't over yet. The election results are officially in.
| **_[Georgia Election Results:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986423:6HEX9uGN2:m:1:3346849603:87FAF98A248C4FE090973AD11B3A75B6:r "Georgia Election Results:")_****Herschel Walker (R) - 48.5%****Raphael Warnock (D) - 49.4%****Chase Oliver (L) - 2.1%****-- \---------------------------****Runoff election has been triggered!**
---

I wish I had better news, but this fight isn't over - not by a long shot._To win in Georgia, you must earn more than 50% of the vote._

**_I 'M HEADED TO A RUNOFF ON DECEMBER 6TH TO DECIDE THE FINAL WINNER OF THIS RACE._**
**_ _**
[EMERGENCY DONATION FOR THE RUNOFF FUND](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986423:6HEX9uGN2:m:1:3346849603:87FAF98A248C4FE090973AD11B3A75B6:r)
---

Getting here was a massive undertaking. We were outspent by Senator Warnock $38 million to $101 million. We had a MASSIVE financial disadvantage.

It wasn't easy, but we pushed back and **FORCED** Senator Warnock into a runoff.

_But now our cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are funneling_** _MILLIONS_** _into Raphael Warnock 's campaign account._

**_[The only way we can fight back and win this race is with your help. Can I count on you to rush a donation to the runoff fund and save Georgia?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986423:6HEX9uGN2:m:1:3346849603:87FAF98A248C4FE090973AD11B3A75B6:r "The only way we can fight back and
win this race is with your help. Can I count on you to rush a donation to the runoff fund and save Georgia?")_**

[EMERGENCY DONATION FOR THE RUNOFF FUND](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986423:6HEX9uGN2:m:1:3346849603:87FAF98A248C4FE090973AD11B3A75B6:r)
---

We cannot compete with Warnock's massive arsenal of cash without your support.

**_[Will you rush a donation before midnight to get me the resources I need to supercharge my runoff campaign?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986423:6HEX9uGN2:m:1:3346849603:87FAF98A248C4FE090973AD11B3A75B6:r "Will you rush a donation of $35
or more before midnight to get me the resources I need to supercharge my runoff campaign?")_**

[EMERGENCY DONATION FOR THE RUNOFF FUND](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986423:6HEX9uGN2:m:1:3346849603:87FAF98A248C4FE090973AD11B3A75B6:r)
---

To victory,

Herschel Walker

| |

name: Georgia Runoff Alert
subject: this is too important for Dems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend, we weren't planning to email again so quickly, but this is too important:

name: United American Patriots
subject: It’s Giving Tuesday - here’s how you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989547:6HcltuGNb:m:1:3317145305:C53B7AAB352A8AE6246B4C45093E037C:r)
---
Peter, November 29th is Giving Tuesday, and the United American Patriots team has established a BIG fundraising goal for the week to support wrongly accused Warriors - $15,000! **UAP has** **a historic number of active cases heading into the new year, and our Warriors need your support more than ever before.**
---
[**HELP US REACH OUR GOAL**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989547:6HcltuGNb:m:1:3317145305:C53B7AAB352A8AE6246B4C45093E037C:r)
---
Giving Tuesday is a national movement to transform the communities in which we live by supporting charitable groups and activities close to our hearts. And our UAP Warriors work harder than anyone to better the world we live in. They...
* Leave their families to be deployed abroad,
* Miss important holidays and milestones,
* Witness horrors we could only imagine,
* Sustain painful injuries,
* And much more.

**They do it all to be treated like nothing more than a common criminal...** These men and women put their lives on the line in service to our country, only to have it turn its back on them... The Heroes we help are completely innocent and in no way deserve the treatment they're getting. The government is ignoring evidence, disregarding testimony, and manufacturing false claims to get these Soldiers put behind bars.
_But you have the opportunity to help them![**You can contribute here to help us achieve our goal for Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989547:6HcltuGNb:m:1:3317145305:C53B7AAB352A8AE6246B4C45093E037C:r)_
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989547:6HcltuGNb:m:1:3317145305:C53B7AAB352A8AE6246B4C45093E037C:r)
---
Peter, there are still too many Heroes wrongfully imprisoned for crimes they didn't commit. And we need your help to get them home to their families. With your support, our organization is able to raise awareness about our Warriors' cases with the media, help them afford the absurd legal fees, and stand alongside them as they fight for justice. _**[We would be honored to receive your support this National Giving Tuesday to further our mission to free these Warriors and reunite them with their families.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989547:6HcltuGNb:m:1:3317145305:C53B7AAB352A8AE6246B4C45093E037C:r)**_
---
[**DONATE TO THE WARRIOR FUND**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989547:6HcltuGNb:m:1:3317145305:C53B7AAB352A8AE6246B4C45093E037C:r)
---
Thank you in advance, United American Patriots
---
|
---

name: Giffords.org
subject: It’s Giving Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re writing to ask you to choose Giffords today.
#

Friends -
Today is Giving Tuesday, the day Americans across the country give back by making donations to support causes they believe are making a difference.
We’re writing to ask you to choose Giffords today.
Here’s why these individual donations are so important to our work:
The first online, small-dollar donation we received came from a high school teacher in Ellicott City, Maryland. Her name is Shannon, and she gave 30 dollars shortly after news of our new organization became public.
On that morning, we would have never imagined that nearly 1,000,000 individual donations would follow Shannon’s—all giving toward the same goal: saving lives from gun violence.
It’s amazing.
And those donations have gone on to fund our work passing lifesaving laws in states across the country; they’ve helped us elect gun safety majorities in the Senate and state legislatures; they’ve helped us pass the first major federal gun safety legislation in decades.
But our work is far from finished. So please choose Giffords today:
[**Can Gabby count on you to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Giffords PAC today? The donation itself is just as important as the amount, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221129-1-15&t=1&akid=2791%2E3935704%2ExInvPj)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-nov22.oKotj2&refcode=em221129-1-15&t=20&akid=2791%2E3935704%2ExInvPj)**
---

---

---

Thank you,
The team at Giffords

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
| | | Peter,
---
When the 118th Congress convenes in January, we’re going to have the highest number of veterans serving in Washington in _decades._

These conservative warriors are ready to roll up their sleeves and get to work for America, and Team Waltz is by their side 100% of the way.

Mike knows what it’s like to take the skills of the battlefield to the halls of Congress, and he’s so excited to show our new GOP veterans the ropes - but first, he has one more goal before he can get started.

**Col. Mike Waltz’s end of month deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and he needs YOUR help to reach his goal.**

**[Pitch in before MIDNIGHT TOMORROW NIGHT to help this American hero reach his critical deadline.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=6bff750e8afc407cb3077c07f6fff0fd&_e=LDbyLgStnFO_KXq2u_NTTbaEQXyvKJ0QLJw2op9WqspI1AlUHSfe7040pnx11uXc_yWkiu6GIhgLOod8kGRJPDPafvADL5ijDFm5CfpAW__31LY5VcJj9GQsTGLCA4BaMulwXtP8WoDR77SrkWhyepjc-R6vrui-z6gXcx4In9_VJdk5T8zpyOBjr-_1fr2YlYoTGipTxaI0nmiNZbYdRYcLzFq3z8KFY1Gv2QjgfKkhhYHj6uWcOz4STicWC9_e7WQsEgr2Ptz5AJMTp-W1J8-ytEpIvJMc7xmPYO_W3YLdHEBqpOoUM3K7aSpqWqBH) **

name: Dave Kubal
subject: Pray for Amy Coney Barrett
body:
Even though Dobbs has long been decided by the Supreme Court, pro-abortion activists aren’t cooling down their anger at the br
| | |
---
Dear Prayer Warrior, [**Will you sign a prayer card today for Amy Coney Barrett?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zipatbdkcqc5k2suit8fmv3hvfufvodgmkvhfaco_) Even though _Dobbs_ has long been decided by the Supreme Court, pro-abortion activists aren’t cooling down their anger at the brave Justices who overturned 50 years of legally mandated abortion.Within the past few weeks, protesters surrounded Justice Barrett’s house, banging on drums and shouting at the Justice while screaming that she is “illegitimate and unfit.”This is clear harassment of a Supreme Court Justice, which is illegal – but the pro-abortion Biden administration is turning a blind eye. [**Join me in blanketing Justice Barrett and her family with prayer as they face persecution for her courage.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5gogfqo744ggb15kmtro1sk4bqhsnd7p4eknbfo_) Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s home is not the only place she’s being targeted for protecting the unborn. Hundreds of “literary figures” have just penned a letter to Penguin Random House, calling for them to cancel their book deal with Barrett.What is the reason they’re citing?The fact that she voted to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.Friend, the radical Left truly wants to ruin the lives of anyone who promotes biblical values and fights for the right to life.They want to make our lives miserable so we lose the courage to fight – and Justice Amy Coney Barrett is their latest target. [**Will you sign a prayer card for Justice Amy Coney Barrett to let her know you’re standing with her despite abortion activists’ efforts to harass and censor her?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcmelnd6ndoeisamt5nl5qqk86gnjhgjl8k9fjs0_) Amy Coney Barrett has never been one to back down when faced with attacks, and we've seen these personal and spiritual attacks appear since she was first introduced as the nominee to replace Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.And attacks from the forces of spiritual opposition, you and I know, will be waged against anyone who stands up for the Word of God.As believers, we must join together and ask our Heavenly Father to:
---
| |
* Keep Justice Barrett and her family healthy and safe from the enemy's snares (Psalm 141: 9-10).
* Ensure Justice Barrett would show no fear toward the evil that assails her (Isaiah 8:12), but rather overcome it with a zeal and passion for His laws which bring life and liberty to all (Proverbs 10:29-32).
* Sustain Justice Barrett so that she will continue to love His word and seek His wisdom diligently (Proverbs 8:17), remaining open and teachable to Godly counsel and heaven's wisdom (Proverbs 1:7).
* Grant Justice Barrett and her family increased grace and blessing as she heeds His voice and obeys His word (Proverbs 21:1).

---
| | Today, I need your help as a prayer leader in your community to combat any and all attacks on Amy Coney Barrett and her young family with around the clock prayer protection. [**Join the prayer team for the Justice by signing your prayer card for Amy Coney Barrett, and uplift herwith a personal note to remind her she's not fighting alone.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zso46jhoe4gkja4547o0t3o25j9iks5kupmq2p68_) Our mission at Intercessors for America is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders. We've delivered prayer cards from Christians like you to conservative leaders such as President Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Justice Clarence Thomas.As his enemies ramp up their attacks --- we must also ramp up our efforts to fight back in the most powerful way possible --- **_with prayer._** [**So don't delay in signing your PRAYER CARD for Justce Amy Coney Barrett.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrbbf7nhesrf0pv4ppojhj79ndebofrdlarthqkg_) Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcskmbels0i52fqu4mls536r19butl4do8omjb3g_rp22sh2s8i66or4stgm4p34cth2bs)
---
Dave KubalPresident & CEO Intercessors for America (IFA)
---
[**SIGN THE PRAYER CARD**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvudmtof2uddnbsaocjg8ej219dusdmb93qcv5d8_)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsndtg7p3ino0i0n2fsg6rai5d4ii3l33d5k5nug_)
---
Intercessors for America (IFA) is a 501(c)(3) ministry organization and was founded in 1973 when God impressed upon the hearts of a group of godly, respected men the necessity of prayer and fasting.
---

Do me a favor, Peter — I want you to pat yourself on the back right now. I mean it. Democrats not only defied expectations on November 8th, but also rejected Republican extremism across the country. The “red wave” was met with a blue wall of angry voters who rose up to defend our democracy. Who made their voice heard to protect women’s healthcare and abortion rights. And who believe in President Biden’s vision to move the country forward. But I hate to say it — that was only the beginning of this fight, Peter. **Republicans are going to spend every waking moment over the next two years attacking President Biden’s ambitious agenda and building momentum for a 2024 rematch against Donald Trump.** **[We can’t afford to sit back and relax. It is going to take the support of every one of our grassroots donors to take this next step in our journey to support President Biden as he fights to build America back. Can we count on you to help us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal and protect the president’s ambitious agenda?>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55248616/381123951/-883878435?refcode=em_UTC_FR_EOM_GearinguptoprotectBidensagenda_112922_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMTEwMDhlLWY2NmYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PLkLH9ZKNlCpqxmBT6i6zjcvan3eRbxVhHtM7m58C_0=)** Unite the Country helped expose the lies and disinformation spread about President Biden with a wave of digital and television content in 2020 and 2022. Now, we need to do it again in 2024, but we won’t stand a fighting chance against Donald Trump and his allies’ massive war chest without your support. clean_body: More like a red puddle. | = Do me a favor, Peter — I want you to pat yourself on the back right now. I mean it. Democrats not only defied expectations on November 8th, but also rejected Republican extremism across the country. The “red wave” was met with a blue wall of angry voters who rose up to defend our democracy. Who made their voice heard to protect women’s healthcare and abortion rights. And who believe in President Biden’s vision to move the country forward. But I hate to say it — that was only the beginning of this fight, Peter. Republicans are going to spend every waking moment over the next two years attacking President Biden’s ambitious agenda and building momentum for a 2024 rematch against Donald Trump. = Unite the Country helped expose the lies and disinformation spread about President Biden with a wave of digital and television content in 2020 and 2022. Now, we need to do it again in 2024, but we won’t stand a fighting chance against Donald Trump and his allies’ massive war chest without your support. There is simply way too much on the line to sit out on what could be the most consequential presidential election of our lifetime, Peter. So I need to know you’re with us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Julianna Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Please watch this special message that I recorded for you 👉
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988910:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988910:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988910:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988911:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988911:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988912:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988913:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988914:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988915:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988910:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988910:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988910:JXWXXuGNn:m:1:3374012347:F2BA66E34149F44317A6A9F39EE9F31F:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America is a nonprofit 501(c)(4) membership organization. With your gift of $25 or more you will become a Sustaining Member of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, and will receive information regarding the special benefits of your annual membership. Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, at the discretion of its board of directors and officers. If you would like to make a directed contribution to support a particular project, please contact us. Although Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America periodically uses its general treasury funds to engage on important political matters, the organization does not accept funds earmarked for independent expenditure activity or designated for other political purposes in support or opposition to federal candidates.

name: Candace Owens
subject: It takes a community to achieve our mission!!
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988961:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988961:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988961:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988961:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988961:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988961:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988961:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988962:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988963:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988964:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988965:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988966:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988967:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988968:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988969:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988961:JTiFXuGNZ:m:1:3372944669:AC091548AEA6FB6D6AF1F9826C4C1487:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

name: Save the Senate
subject: The next 10 minutes could make a world of difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
|
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61984641:6pRr_uGNl:m:1:3368395361:EA02DA48E58DEDA793C141F61CA198E3:r)
---

Herschel Walker is a man on a mission, and our future is on the line.

We know what it's like to lose in Georgia. We can't repeat the horrendous ending. Fortunately, Herschel knows what it takes to run that's why we're placing our bets on this Heisman Trophy winner.

**[Don 't let us leave anything on the field by donating in the next 10 minutes to claim our 10X-MATCH for Herschel Walker!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61984641:6pRr_uGNl:m:1:3368395361:EA02DA48E58DEDA793C141F61CA198E3:r "Don’t let us leave anything on the field by donating in the next 10 minutes to claim our
10X-MATCH for Herschel Walker!")**

---
| | | [CHIP IN $15 -> $165 IMPACT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61984642:6pRr_uGNl:m:1:3368395361:EA02DA48E58DEDA793C141F61CA198E3:r "CHIP IN $15 → $165 IMPACT")

| | | [CHIP IN $25 -> $275 IMPACT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61984643:6pRr_uGNl:m:1:3368395361:EA02DA48E58DEDA793C141F61CA198E3:r "CHIP IN $25 → $275 IMPACT")

| | | [CHIP IN $35 -> $385 IMPACT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61984641:6pRr_uGNl:m:1:3368395361:EA02DA48E58DEDA793C141F61CA198E3:r "CHIP IN $35 → $385 IMPACT")

| | | [CHIP IN $50 -> $550 IMPACT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61984644:6pRr_uGNl:m:1:3368395361:EA02DA48E58DEDA793C141F61CA198E3:r "CHIP IN $50 → $550 IMPACT")
---

**The next 10 minutes could make a world of difference.**

This is your chance to maximize your impact on the Georgia Senate race and give the GOP our best chance at deadlocking the Senate to stall Joe Biden's agenda. Don't wake up on December 7th wishing you had done more to help Herschel win.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter ,It’s official: I’m headed to a runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Not a repeat of 2020
| |
---
| | | Peter ,

I know I've asked a lot of you. But the 2022 election isn't over yet. The election results are officially in.
| **_[Georgia Election Results:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986427:6JtbxuGtN:m:1:3350876382:B8CB4F14222005EFB36C694F02DE97F1:r "Georgia Election Results:")_****Herschel Walker (R) - 48.5%****Raphael Warnock (D) - 49.4%****Chase Oliver (L) - 2.1%****-- \---------------------------****Runoff election has been triggered!**
---

I wish I had better news, but this fight isn't over - not by a long shot._To win in Georgia, you must earn more than 50% of the vote._

**_I 'M HEADED TO A RUNOFF ON DECEMBER 6TH TO DECIDE THE FINAL WINNER OF THIS RACE._**
**_ _**
[EMERGENCY DONATION FOR THE RUNOFF FUND](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986427:6JtbxuGtN:m:1:3350876382:B8CB4F14222005EFB36C694F02DE97F1:r)
---

Getting here was a massive undertaking. We were outspent by Senator Warnock $38 million to $101 million. We had a MASSIVE financial disadvantage.

It wasn't easy, but we pushed back and **FORCED** Senator Warnock into a runoff.

_But now our cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are funneling_** _MILLIONS_** _into Raphael Warnock 's campaign account._

**_[The only way we can fight back and win this race is with your help. Can I count on you to rush a donation to the runoff fund and save Georgia?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986427:6JtbxuGtN:m:1:3350876382:B8CB4F14222005EFB36C694F02DE97F1:r "The only way we can fight back and
win this race is with your help. Can I count on you to rush a donation to the runoff fund and save Georgia?")_**

[EMERGENCY DONATION FOR THE RUNOFF FUND](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986427:6JtbxuGtN:m:1:3350876382:B8CB4F14222005EFB36C694F02DE97F1:r)
---

We cannot compete with Warnock's massive arsenal of cash without your support.

**_[Will you rush a donation before midnight to get me the resources I need to supercharge my runoff campaign?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986427:6JtbxuGtN:m:1:3350876382:B8CB4F14222005EFB36C694F02DE97F1:r "Will you rush a donation of $35
or more before midnight to get me the resources I need to supercharge my runoff campaign?")_**

[EMERGENCY DONATION FOR THE RUNOFF FUND](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61986427:6JtbxuGtN:m:1:3350876382:B8CB4F14222005EFB36C694F02DE97F1:r)
---

To victory,

Herschel Walker

name: Jim Jordan
subject: THE last uncalled Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Senate needs Herschel’s vote to stop Dems from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=06a1432baf0447a49715edc2539fe05c&_e=1pUDxSWFLATbYtLh68qE6G0t4B5TDGXKAddCl8i1jZ3Xh-oFXlK2e-mAqXoMMcqGljEzbdcCM65mfc-PXaw8oI4idPJZYEbKUKeMWTeqqNoiXkuaAHkXYFd7sEuMyI17w7Kx6qpzfRWT382uWyQIIHEav5uT1W08LGQGvH0GoP-1JHl3riTxZjenLOA_ghQQjeDKSe6BzRDxQZWHiCT4jJbpQLPdbWp4HYT78BytNxdGELkB9VJAAs7V1JC-Xjm0dDvyN9-NyUVioV4WS1fJ5LP8V9dK3BA-apvQThjcItuk_Cgx5CoW4KUJbWFXZU8x-2W4XbQ4ZKZl-8hZX_2-4aXjq8UY-GjWC1eK5mNctSrNL-sS0eB4fYCQK10xNacLWTtrKRQZI0kUX-ghI6cs_VZ2rdbf20072FaoxdWNBEAF21qbOq5s5X2G93fI5uEr6qG7UuC_c2XBxXthOgmUog%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate.

I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race.

Disclaimer: **[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to chip-in $5 to help keep Herschel's campaign funded through December 6th.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=06a1432baf0447a49715edc2539fe05c&_e=1pUDxSWFLATbYtLh68qE6G0t4B5TDGXKAddCl8i1jZ3Xh-oFXlK2e-mAqXoMMcqGljEzbdcCM65mfc-PXaw8oI4idPJZYEbKUKeMWTeqqNoiXkuaAHkXYFd7sEuMyI17w7Kx6qpzfRWT382uWyQIIHEav5uT1W08LGQGvH0GoP-1JHl3riTxZjenLOA_ghQQjeDKSe6BzRDxQZWHiCT4jJbpQLPdbWp4HYT78BytNxdGELkB9VJAAs7V1JC-Xjm0dDvyN9-NyUVioV4WS1fJ5LP8V9dK3BA-apvQThjcIts5HoPbNjwHKHCZg0HujP_KHt_ZOgFBFnoBuy-K5c06BxI7vlBU4T2U2H9T4YiRcoSlws_6T3yR1hqim-8eS-Nn9xgOfkYzUXfs5ZG23zJ3EIt8712lDIAxDs4tKq4b7fMt-VJJGbOh6ouoBELos7LC2ysQZZg465ZANcU-KYU2fA%3D%3D)** But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever.
1. **_Absences_** : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. **If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion.**
2. **_2024_** : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (**both deep red states**) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection.

[** CHIP in $5 ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=06a1432baf0447a49715edc2539fe05c&_e=1pUDxSWFLATbYtLh68qE6G0t4B5TDGXKAddCl8i1jZ3Xh-oFXlK2e-mAqXoMMcqGljEzbdcCM65mfc-PXaw8oI4idPJZYEbKUKeMWTeqqNoiXkuaAHkXYFd7sEuMyI17w7Kx6qpzfRWT382uWyQIIHEav5uT1W08LGQGvH0GoP-1JHl3riTxZjenLOA_ghQQjeDKSe6BzRDxQZWHiCT4jJbpQLPdbWp4HYT78BytNxdGELkB9VJAAs7V1JC-Xjm0dDvyN9-NyUVioV4WS1fJ5LP8V9dK3BA-apvQThjcItukwKo_slRlMo52ZDYaBLAjsIJQ9CC5BP4uxU5qZgXLFwRXJAtUIE2uFZjQNGfDH7k4iQA0_r9p2qPsCx1U9cTxH4_BGpCVVIKa0Cp_FP5-ofw11mqm7r-xlBtTmJrWLJuMBkALkOuNy_U5NcA0VB9xI3DH-Ft-Nt4_WkieB33z9Q%3D%3D)

3. **_Judges_** : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. **If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want.**
4. **_Federal nominations:_** With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to.
5. **_6 years:_** If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, **it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years.** If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028.

**We simply cannot afford to lose this race.** We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in $5 today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=06a1432baf0447a49715edc2539fe05c&_e=1pUDxSWFLATbYtLh68qE6G0t4B5TDGXKAddCl8i1jZ3Xh-oFXlK2e-mAqXoMMcqGljEzbdcCM65mfc-PXaw8oI4idPJZYEbKUKeMWTeqqNoiXkuaAHkXYFd7sEuMyI17w7Kx6qpzfRWT382uWyQIIHEav5uT1W08LGQGvH0GoP-1JHl3riTxZjenLOA_ghQQjeDKSe6BzRDxQZWHiCT4jJbpQLPdbWp4HYT78BytNxdGELkB9VJAAs7V1JC-Xjm0dDvyN9-NyUVioV4WS1fJ5LP8V9dK3BA-apvQThjcItvuoX-iMM1xcc7WBq6WMm6tVcYZbCAc_xSoLbUSFvWDY-D_lL_8gh-AnhRWF1UviT_ylGQAIoj70TUQRYJLnJj3JJs3VhrAmnao3KyXWXQqGYt3Q8PVnjQ9sPl6RmtJ9UMSuLrKqTTJ6DzwA6Js7CcKiAkDYrDXF_44W_1qf2VGqA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: The Senate needs Herschel’s vote to stop Dems from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. | Fellow American, By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate. I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race. Disclaimer: But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever. 1. Absences : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion. 2. 2024 : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (both deep red states) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection. 3. Judges : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want. 4. Federal nominations: With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to. 5. 6 years: If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years. If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028. We simply cannot afford to lose this race. We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. I want Herschel to win. The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. Thanks, Jim Jordan | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. subject: Double your Giving Tuesday gift now!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, A generous donor just informed us that they are willing to match all #GivingTuesday donations made between now and midnight. [Make your donation right now to help us meet our goal of $50,000 and get your gift MATCHED.](https://act.myngp.com/el/TwjYbuM51XMRPrzm2iefNZZNawLo_NXzuNd4sonwx3U=/yCdaH4q77-8ynazzI25BFn40CXg5t2E6Xpoqnu5nxsA=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TwjYbuM51XMRPrzm2iefNZZNawLo_NXzuNd4sonwx3U=/yCdaH4q77-8ynazzI25BFn40CXg5t2E6Xpoqnu5nxsA=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes) Pride Fund is taking on gun violence with a multi-faceted approach. We're electing more Democrats who will stand up and be champions on the issues, we're fighting for federal legislation at the Capitol, and we're taking legal action in courts to fight for stronger gun safety laws. We would not be able to do any of this life saving work without the support from grassroots donors like you. Thanks for standing with us and standing up for commonsense gun reform and LGBTQ equality. [Donate right now to have your gift DOUBLED!](https://act.myngp.com/el/TwjYbuM51XMRPrzm2iefNZZNawLo_NXzuNd4sonwx3U=/yCdaH4q77-8ynazzI25BFn40CXg5t2E6Xpoqnu5nxsA=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes) During the 2022 midterm elections, we were strategic with our election efforts, we also organized massive volunteer recruitment efforts to make phone calls and canvass door-to-door to get out the vote in our most critical races. Working together, we helped Democrats maintain control of the Senate and prevented Republicans from the massive takeover in the House and Senate that analysts predicted. In the end, Republicans only have a 7 seat majority in the House, with two seats still undecided. We must work together to ensure Senator Warnrock wins his re-election to represent Georgia in the Senate in his runoff election December 6th. This added seat will mean Democrats have a stronger majority in the Senate, which is essential to passing legislation.
We would not be able to do any of this life saving work without the support from grassroots donors like you. Thanks for standing with us and standing up for commonsense gun reform and LGBTQ equality. | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: VoteVets
subject: Have you ever wondered where your money goes? Take a look
body:
[1]VoteVets

Ever wonder where your contributions to VoteVets go? Here’s a look:

We were the fourth leading spending organization among Democrats this cycle, spending over $23 million dollars of small-dollar, grassroots money.

We aired ads all across the country that moved polls and led Democrats to victory.

We even ran this ad in Georgia, exposing Herschel Walker for defrauding Veterans and the American Government, that moved polls by 10 POINTS!

VoteVets has accomplished a lot this cycle, but we still have one more race to go: Georgia

Can you rush a contribution to VoteVets to keep our Herschel Walker ads on air? With just one week to the Georgia runoff, we need to reach as many Georgians as possible.

CONTRIBUTE: https://act.votevets.org/go/3912?akid=7198%2E3013755%2E5LipZD

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: The latest from our runoff election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'm emailing you because Georgians just began voting in our runoff election. The next **seven** days will decide whether we have what it takes to keep this seat blue, and I need you by my side to win. **Here's why:**
* **FIRST:** Results from the general election showed our people-powered campaign _narrowly_ leading my Trump-backed opponent, Herschel Walker (R).
* **BUT THEN:** After our grassroots movement forced this election to a runoff, national Republicans started flooding this race with millions to launch attack ads and turn the tides against us.
* **NOW:** With Georgians already casting their ballots, we're falling short of the resources we need to get out the vote and win.

There is far too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. But I don't take a cent from corporate PACs – our campaign is 100% fueled by folks like you – so your grassroots support is the only thing that can power us to victory.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more before our last end-of-month fundraising deadline so we can mobilize voters, keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55253453/381141044/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5118-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjUzYmU3MS1mYjZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3FU1RiBlS1a2OcMIyB2L_LAKZZB6sT_3RCyq8zF3tg=)**

Let's go win this!

–Rev. Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you're with me, _[ **please donate now to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55253458/381141049/-1468610671?refcode=jtk5118-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjUzYmU3MS1mYjZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3FU1RiBlS1a2OcMIyB2L_LAKZZB6sT_3RCyq8zF3tg=) _If you'd like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, **text "GEORGIA" to 52005**.

Thank you!

– Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55253459/381141050/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5118-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjUzYmU3MS1mYjZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3FU1RiBlS1a2OcMIyB2L_LAKZZB6sT_3RCyq8zF3tg=) **Text GEORGIA to 52005 •[Visit our Team Warnock Store](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55253460/381141051/-1115795912?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjUzYmU3MS1mYjZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3FU1RiBlS1a2OcMIyB2L_LAKZZB6sT_3RCyq8zF3tg=&emci=8c700051-616b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=2653be71-fb6f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=1586379) **

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Good news & bad news in Georgia
body:
The vote is on!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td926ceb2-c01a-4795-923e-d15bc9096fd4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_Your $5, $10, or $25 donation will support Raphael Warnock’s campaign in buying ads, making phone calls, knocking on doors, and reminding voters to get to the polls._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99592f50-dd90-45f5-8eeb-a1bb995c0a64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We have some good news and some bad news. **_The good news? Polls show Senator Warnock leading 2%, too close to take comfort, but it's a lead and we'll take it! Also, early turnout is surging-- fantastic!!_** **But now the bad news. Mitch McConnell's SuperPAC is funneling $50 million into the race to elect unqualified-in-every-way- humanly-imaginable Herschel Walker. Walker is a terrible candidate, but he’s their guy.**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6be851d-cc0d-4c72-8454-c76bbc427c35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Yet, the last time we had a slight lead like this, it was Tim Ryan beating another awful candidate in Ohio, J.D. Vance. Then McConnell's SuperPAC--along with billionaire James Bond villain Peter Thiel--dropped in $50MM and stole a seat out from under us in a torrent of smear and innuendo via tv sets, radios and smart-phones across Ohio._** **_We can't let them do it again._ That's why Senator Warnock set a significant goal of raising $2 million before the end of the month. ** [**_Will you join us and other good folks around the country in giving Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can right now!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc24e968-679f-4980-b469-a8ae3b1269bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Our democracy thanks you.
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T701fa8cb-b6ba-4d3c-8acb-e3675251560a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b1a6331-16c4-497c-a64a-23c2611200c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

[ Hawaii’s Mauna Loa volcano, located on the Big Island, has begun to erupt for the first time since 1984. Mauna Loa is the world’s largest active volcano and one of five volcanos that make up the Big Island. Lava is threatening to reach neighborhoods as it flows downhill but so far no evacuation orders have been issued and no homes have been affected. But state health officials are urging people to cut back on outdoor exercise due to toxic smog caused by the spewing of sulfur dioxide and other volcanic gases. ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5s1dtds0l3tpc8ip7q5tikk4bp6gl47meemr4n0_rp22sh2s8i66or4stgm6pj5cph2bs)
