name: Candace Owens
subject: Sorry for the early morning email, but this is too important 🚨
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988832:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988832:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988832:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988832:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988832:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988832:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988832:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988833:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988834:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988835:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988836:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988837:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988838:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988839:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988840:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988832:JHMOeuGfN:m:1:3372576248:C36B34E1DF80041EFF67622D4AFFDDE2:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests. Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures. BLEXIT Student Movement The BLEXIT Student Movement is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time! The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts. The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike. I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities. Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. Thank you, Candace Owens Co-Founder & President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: re: Giving Tuesday 2022
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988945:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988945:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988945:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988946:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988946:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988947:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988948:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988949:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988950:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988945:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988945:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988945:JB50euGN8:m:1:3373497171:7C12CE216ADEFFF9AD0B68FF49F90895:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America is a nonprofit 501(c)(4) membership organization. With your gift of $25 or more you will become a Sustaining Member of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, and will receive information regarding the special benefits of your annual membership. Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, at the discretion of its board of directors and officers. If you would like to make a directed contribution to support a particular project, please contact us. Although Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America periodically uses its general treasury funds to engage on important political matters, the organization does not accept funds earmarked for independent expenditure activity or designated for other political purposes in support or opposition to federal candidates.

name: Candace Owens
subject: Peter, sorry for the early morning email, but this is too important!
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988503:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988503:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988503:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988503:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988503:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988503:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988503:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988504:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988505:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988506:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988507:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988508:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988509:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988510:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988511:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988503:JjYPSuGKN:m:1:3350876382:91283D4300276A31DE787E3935E96E91:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: re: Giving Tuesday 2022 ➡
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988456:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988456:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988456:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988457:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988457:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988458:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988459:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988460:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988461:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988456:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988456:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988456:6kaXSuGN8:m:1:3346849603:4D03FA1070520F0708E02AD8E715D56E:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---

name: Supreme Court Alert
subject: Peter, this is embarrassing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, this is embarrassing.

How is it that the Left can get over **ONE MILLION** signatures to impeach Clarence Thomas, but State GOP's **_[pledge to DEFEND Justice Thomas](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r "pledge to DEFEND Justice Thomas")_** is **STILL** short by over 100,000 signatures!?

---
| | | [SIGN THE PLEDGE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r)
---
Peter, please **_[sign the pledge](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r "sign the pledge")_** and forward this email to three of your fellow patriots. We **MUST** protect Justice Thomas! **_[Sign NOW:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r "Sign NOW:")_**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PLEDGE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r)
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------

Subject: He defends your rights. Will you defend him?
From: Supreme Court Alert
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r)**

Peter, Justice Thomas is under threat.

The petition to **IMPEACH **him has climbed to **1.25 MILLION** signatures! And now RADICAL Squad member Ilhan Omar is leading the movement.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r)
---

**Peter, this is getting out of hand. **We MUST protect Clarence Thomas at all costs. **_[Please sign State GOP HQ's pledge to DEFEND our most conservative Justice.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r "Please sign State GOP HQ’s pledge to DEFEND our most conservative Justice.")_**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PLEDGE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r)
---
Justice Thomas has done so much to protect our rights during his time on the Supreme Court. We cannot allow Ilhan Omar and her mob of crazed Leftists to win this fight.

**_[Sign to protect Clarence Thomas in his time of need, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989863:JHYUSuGeN:m:1:3345639852:E66194BBC0B91D3787869A9F4734C2F8:r "Sign to protect
Clarence Thomas in his time of need, .")_** It's the least you can do to repay him for his service.

---
1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675
Washington, DC 20004

Text FREEDOM at 25317 to opt-in to State GOP's campaign alerts, updates and news.

Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible.

This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Josh Harder
subject: The speaker's gavel
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/UuIi0aJh1O9Vi2xfXq3-ZGTB-eHqMvuuUjyCLYhppDY=/B2TMfb2VnRNyL5ce_aKPC3g0HUMIcVeK2p3-tQpd5pA=?refcode=E19660-20221129-McCarthySpeaker-header-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25) | Hi Peter, I wanted to give you an update on what's been going on in the House since the election. Republicans officially flipped the House and gained a slim majority (still TBD on if it's 5 or 6 seats). This means the only way Kevin McCarthy gets the votes he needs to be Speaker is if he bows down to... Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz. Yep, McCarthy is about to hand power over to the most extreme factions of his party. We got a glimpse of what this future looks like just now on Twitter. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/UuIi0aJh1O9Vi2xfXq3-ZGTB-eHqMvuuUjyCLYhppDY=/1zpkx7RX0v3zABouR8Tn8iyTE2Wi7dkLb0-a7M3FXgQ=?refcode=E19660-20221129-McCarthySpeaker-graphic-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25) Yes, this is one of the Members of Congress who will decide the future of the Republican Party over the next few weeks. **So what are we going to do about it?** First off, this week we have real work to get done in Congress. The Senate is about to codify marriage equality across the country. We need to pass electoral reform asap. And we absolutely have to keep the government funded. We also have a historic week ahead of us as Democrats. Tomorrow we're going to elect a new generation of congressional leadership led by Hakeem Jeffries. It's a big deal and I'm excited to work alongside him to make sure we're fighting like hell for our values (and against these idiotic Republican "investigations" on the horizon). So, as McCarthy bends to the extreme parts of his party, we as Democrats will stand up and show what a strong alternative looks like. **[If you believe we need this counterweight to McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene, please chip in now to help us fight back.](https://act.myngp.com/el/UuIi0aJh1O9Vi2xfXq3-ZGTB-eHqMvuuUjyCLYhppDY=/B2TMfb2VnRNyL5ce_aKPC3g0HUMIcVeK2p3-tQpd5pA=?refcode=E19660-20221129-McCarthySpeaker-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25)**

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, I wanted to give you an update on what's been going on in the House since the election. Republicans officially flipped the House and gained a slim majority (still TBD on if it's 5 or 6 seats). This means the only way Kevin McCarthy gets the votes he needs to be Speaker is if he bows down to... Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz. Yep, McCarthy is about to hand power over to the most extreme factions of his party. We got a glimpse of what this future looks like just now on Twitter. Yes, this is one of the Members of Congress who will decide the future of the Republican Party over the next few weeks. So what are we going to do about it? First off, this week we have real work to get done in Congress. The Senate is about to codify marriage equality across the country. We need to pass electoral reform asap. And we absolutely have to keep the government funded. We also have a historic week ahead of us as Democrats. Tomorrow we're going to elect a new generation of congressional leadership led by Hakeem Jeffries. It's a big deal and I'm excited to work alongside him to make sure we're fighting like hell for our values (and against these idiotic Republican "investigations" on the horizon). So, as McCarthy bends to the extreme parts of his party, we as Democrats will stand up and show what a strong alternative looks like. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | Let's get to work! \- Josh = =

body:
| | | **$5** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today.

Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.

Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With exactly one week until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $5 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please: Will you split $5 now between me and the DSCC to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia and across the country?**

**Here's a special link just for you:****[www.dscc.org/georgiarunoff](https://go.dscc.org/go/11024?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221129-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockThreeDollar-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221129-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockThreeDollar-Pros-sl1&akid=8918%2E9716520%2ELOJ7Q0)**

Thank you for pitching in. I truly appreciate your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:
| | If you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8fF9CaOg7q1OSztj8dZMg9Kxm-a6G8cXurqNYJQNVYT04q23IZHZV8YbhxJn6ruLhLtq5DaeaqMOYO8smvTcG4yOaKp3szF5cNj7zwql7X1EkygEZHA9QZ94XJxQDCRAMF8f5a2sdUd9kk-pM6TnGmUOo8tVQAuD-qRg_bkbzy3se9573KlEzmgGmpdZAADcznybSBwGFbaM5uwkv3ih3ooiENPgb4ZuIjgjXxEP2Fl_E8Cbp5xFe88MEug191_IXv0WE3UHtEWMCELsfhY5F4A/3rk/GXcXxyL4S7a_Yqop0_FS3A/h0/gVcfc3sNfLKWmFM2_JuXmSuuIk2JYHumrUH7lCZCLqo) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wHz7Tq1dhnIJn6UWjGXISFrGvIYxMzaIrERMskedeaDI3G5gMXTB0JhqCrtqJ5wTFJ3KNXduyd8PZddy4jVuxeoCqAidmxLoCLd1SrmdLYJEoXq-JGf0OYMxrfw7b7bb5dS3cXrMQCWzw-CO4-7_wN4OaBylh1bM2VnvzpetmarRkUsaz2Njkror4kRroAv6_DL34D8g_MoPmlM2de54zfL9orwlzHG5pCnRlGeIDCdZGOSZyO2W4LFZUu1V2qeC35Lvf77KSEXsnGUFlX5y3bLyfm_fsWsYtTK1JjZdLGEpRNbmL4XgMYXrQUaPFwGpQ/3rk/GXcXxyL4S7a_Yqop0_FS3A/h1/vqm7OwcvQoOb4_8D-qIkWEJFMalu4gcrFfI9v5zTV2s) Peter,

Today is one of the most crucial days of the year for networks like ours: **Giving Tuesday**. We’re reaching out to let you know why it’s so important that you support the work of our partner organization, Vote To Live, this Giving Tuesday.

FIRST... We invested over a million dollars into federal and statewide candidates for the 2022 cycle.

THEN... Our volunteers contacted 2.6 million low-propensity Black voters directly through our phone banking and text banking efforts and encouraged them to turn out to the polls.

NOW... We’re celebrating 106 wins and counting this election cycle!

There’s no one making more impactful and concrete efforts to #BuildBlackPoliticalPower than The Collective Network, Peter. But our work is far from finished — **we still have a runoff to win in Georgia, and the outcome of that race could change EVERYTHING (we’re not exaggerating).**

[Please consider making a donation of $10 to Vote To Live this Giving Tuesday. Step by step, our vision is taking shape and we are making a difference, and it's thanks to your support. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yj6cBoP2vcn6KEpSm74SwRHohHAX8g5ATnPCv71yIyljYKEL7y4fDqHaI8IztpoOKrdO9ubOgFe5BwtfSC4GGsWXweUqBjpMFCkIjTVCKHtCa9w-q5dlqgEXJMuTh9D6lp9k4tTcKRQj0fi1ydbrj_QPWYrHdrwOnBFy2DkjR7oN7varxHGDjJ7YFlSYdDXrYBpnUmvX0lCirvlHuMf1hHK5_x6SJdXJ-IyAdnx-aAVG2te0CjqNv9Dq1lk7LqAe_YLnwA5N-ortUH75zisbejP/3rk/kbl3YUH0TTSK1dNuzgcuGA/h0/X-MdMsBTPiJGOnyWWSYc0REB1jUeQKL1AlvPEM8O5HE)

In 2021, 7 Directions led a collaborative prayer-walk for the health of local waterways and to educate surrounding rural communities about the dangers of the Mountain Valley Pipeline/Southgate Extension.
---
_**We can do this together.**_ As most of you know, 7 Directions of Service is a small, Indigenous-led grassroots team that has been standing up to the fossil fuel industry and systemic oppression since well before becoming a nonprofit. We'd like to thank our volunteers and donors who've believed in our vision and shown us support over the years. Even a small donation can go a long way to make our hands-on Education Programs, Community Projects and Campaigns possible. Your donation goes to:
* Achieving Rights of Nature for the Haw River
* Canceling the Mountain Valley Pipeline/Southgate Extension
* Blocking the Manchin-Schumer Dirty Deal and industry-driven threats against frontline EJ Communities across Turtle Island
* Spreading Indigenous History, Language and Cultural Revitalization
* Nurturing Rematriation and Restoring Place-Based, Indigenous Land Practice

This Giving Tuesday you can make a one-time or monthly donation to our causes. We appreciate any amount you can give.
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55257916/381155826/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYyMGRkNi0wMjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKsf6ocnhiQYD4x7BdIl-PfcJGTXQUlgBu4CfsyJDto=&emci=823498da-b66f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=81f20dd6-0270-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=7731215)

| | **When my friend and colleague Senator Raphael Warnock**[**says we've been here before**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55257917/381155827/-1443263555?refcode=2022-11-29-warnock&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81f20dd6-0270-ed11-819c-00224825858d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYyMGRkNi0wMjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKsf6ocnhiQYD4x7BdIl-PfcJGTXQUlgBu4CfsyJDto=) **... he's absolutely right.** A runoff election in Georgia and a Republican candidate spewing lies to make Donald Trump proud. Sound familiar? You bet. _Two years ago, when this last happened, progressives across America got to work and, alongside our Democratic friends in Georgia, made the critical difference in two close, close races._ **So here's the big question, with one week to go before Election Day:**[**Can we do it again?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55257918/381155828/-1443263555?refcode=2022-11-29-warnock&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81f20dd6-0270-ed11-819c-00224825858d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYyMGRkNi0wMjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKsf6ocnhiQYD4x7BdIl-PfcJGTXQUlgBu4CfsyJDto=) The most recent polling shows Rev. Warnock with a narrow lead. That pretty much mirrors what we saw after election night, where we were **ahead by****less than 40,000 votes** (out of nearly 4 million total). This election next week is winnable, but it's going to be very, very close. **And the Republican attack machine? Oh boy, is it going full-speed. Anything to prop up a desperate, failing candidate like Herschel Walker.** So, while Rev. Warnock and Georgia Democrats are going full-speed, we need to be there for them, to ensure they have the resources to get out the vote ahead of Tuesday's election. [**Would you please rush a grassroots donation of $8 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55257921/381155840/-1443263555?refcode=2022-11-29-warnock&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81f20dd6-0270-ed11-819c-00224825858d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYyMGRkNi0wMjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKsf6ocnhiQYD4x7BdIl-PfcJGTXQUlgBu4CfsyJDto=) Oh, and be sure to [**check out Rev. clean_body: | | | | When my friend and colleague Senator Raphael Warnock= ... he's absolutely right. A runoff election in Georgia and a Republican candidate spewing lies to make Donald Trump proud. Sound familiar? You bet. Two years ago, when this last happened, progressives across America got to work and, alongside our Democratic friends in Georgia, made the critical difference in two close, close races. So here's the big question, with one week to go before Election Day:= The most recent polling shows Rev. Warnock with a narrow lead. That pretty much mirrors what we saw after election night, where we were ahead byless than 40,000 votes (out of nearly 4 million total). This election next week is winnable, but it's going to be very, very close. And the Republican attack machine? Oh boy, is it going full-speed. Anything to prop up a desperate, failing candidate like Herschel Walker. So, while Rev. Warnock and Georgia Democrats are going full-speed, we need to be there for them, to ensure they have the resources to get out the vote ahead of Tuesday's election. = Oh, and be sure to = – featuring his best friend: = Onward! body:

You need him so we can keep America great. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe427598607f409eac6c189cbad034b1&_e=t-DgpcMgl7FgufeGGHEoCOrKrkDvIY9zZIvydUZUnZT47SBe5m3BL8oZLo6TIQnScEzh11Y_SAQeKEiOP0WGii_BS8RziXBsCNkFMBqKCirEn6czeqbwLG7m8N7desTpR4usqPQCkBgWDmVtenxI_Z9r7aXkNTXhKMUAm81O8rWM1f0BLe4th9l1hE38RindvfdrcrVlXl0jYusJLeFQEmLgUDsyyeKsSB0Jr_Cbrr5J53oxy-KdomjCYgfPTqNZmdjc7m3y9MhPgb5ri4Kt6DAjk0m2fkSjQSLgCwLuYfAvnrCTGl7Gzb5-uoAaY2y8jgd11T7pouy5ePltOk69maxVdWOwN7fwN8TDGaMwXobkE3--uvpS9HnALIT80Xrm1qAlKNksAR-rZvqYz1-fdeZ2SuceHn23y-uJxYU-a9l9KxpvNeVhx4zRJ6WL3sic)

Fellow American,

By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate.

I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race.

Disclaimer: **[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to chip-in $5 to help keep Herschel's campaign funded through December 6th.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe427598607f409eac6c189cbad034b1&_e=t-DgpcMgl7FgufeGGHEoCOrKrkDvIY9zZIvydUZUnZT47SBe5m3BL8oZLo6TIQnScEzh11Y_SAQeKEiOP0WGii_BS8RziXBsCNkFMBqKCirEn6czeqbwLG7m8N7desTpR4usqPQCkBgWDmVtenxI_Z9r7aXkNTXhKMUAm81O8rWM1f0BLe4th9l1hE38RindvfdrcrVlXl0jYusJLeFQEmLgUDsyyeKsSB0Jr_Cbrr5J53oxy-KdomjCYgfPTqNZmdjc7m3y9MhPgb5ri4Kt6DAjk0m2fkSjQSLgCwLuYfA3HyySOLoPBlXXp-DjDHafiBvBe8YLtzxDXEjJnZXDzs8BE1Ahx4m-FNvaxx8wTJX241Wot5aSBvglq0zFejMvuHS6B8PhNTrWl2ilTgfM3pBa__lToB1VduWTwO_u62VTqCB_NEHcIcLZb8i8eLYz)** But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever.
1. **_Absences_** : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. **If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion.**
2. **_2024_** : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (**both deep red states**) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection.

[** CHIP in $5 ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe427598607f409eac6c189cbad034b1&_e=t-DgpcMgl7FgufeGGHEoCOrKrkDvIY9zZIvydUZUnZT47SBe5m3BL8oZLo6TIQnScEzh11Y_SAQeKEiOP0WGii_BS8RziXBsCNkFMBqKCirEn6czeqbwLG7m8N7desTpR4usqPQCkBgWDmVtenxI_Z9r7aXkNTXhKMUAm81O8rWM1f0BLe4th9l1hE38RindvfdrcrVlXl0jYusJLeFQEmLgUDsyyeKsSB0Jr_Cbrr5J53oxy-KdomjCYgfPTqNZmdjc7m3y9MhPgb5ri4Kt6F2LUnVG6bhk9Sq3vC6DGDECN9tnS58zpQ6KgVVzjEScuXgtcXggf7S--eMu2tX1eCqFyMVVbgK_5gYJMrWQAqtS6m26i7GQPdacKJ3CMyUU94o-ZrJij7p7R-OD-X3o1OcaWn4fr7o8peciZwgmxbzrZ6a_hnFLm12NpPRhEOa-7tvga8ggdw1AoIZG8FR9UA%3D%3D)

3. **_Judges_** : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. **If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want.**
4. **_Federal nominations:_** With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to.
5. **_6 years:_** If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, **it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years.** If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028.

**We simply cannot afford to lose this race.** We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in $5 today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe427598607f409eac6c189cbad034b1&_e=t-DgpcMgl7FgufeGGHEoCOrKrkDvIY9zZIvydUZUnZT47SBe5m3BL8oZLo6TIQnScEzh11Y_SAQeKEiOP0WGii_BS8RziXBsCNkFMBqKCirEn6czeqbwLG7m8N7desTpR4usqPQCkBgWDmVtenxI_Z9r7aXkNTXhKMUAm81O8rWM1f0BLe4th9l1hE38RindvfdrcrVlXl0jYusJLeFQEmLgUDsyyeKsSB0Jr_Cbrr5J53oxy-KdomjCYgfPTqNZmdjc7m3y9MhPgb5ri4Kt6DAjk0m2fkSjQSLgCwLuYfAbwIqxX0APLWwnVfuDHx5QqgzE4Q-uzJuxtVQQC1Y-9PVdU6SQcYjNrPJMhroe44MtL_PcKmBtW4Hb-gszQolmJ_RQjv6wentoO0RsiBfoU7BwMHjRYhG9-DkDqOWIW_o2tlYS19CDsc3i7jU0nGWt)**

**I want Herschel to win.** The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great.

**[Will you do me a personal favor and contribute to Herschel's campaign today? I promised him I would do my best to raise $100,000 for him, and I hope you'll help me deliver on that promise.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe427598607f409eac6c189cbad034b1&_e=t-DgpcMgl7FgufeGGHEoCOrKrkDvIY9zZIvydUZUnZT47SBe5m3BL8oZLo6TIQnScEzh11Y_SAQeKEiOP0WGii_BS8RziXBsCNkFMBqKCirEn6czeqbwLG7m8N7desTpR4usqPQCkBgWDmVtenxI_Z9r7aXkNTXhKMUAm81O8rWM1f0BLe4th9l1hE38RindvfdrcrVlXl0jYusJLeFQEmLgUDsyyeKsSB0Jr_Cbrr5J53oxy-KdomjCYgfPTqNZmdjc7m3y9MhPgb5ri4Kt6DAjk0m2fkSjQSLgCwLuYfATcH0M3RWxFckR4mk0DtbFRTjINR3cRwBSJegLThFKYzI3_Bd9aJRfJqK4MUN1STCDZmXjggIE29_fjWYNNDIM8qbL1JrRLv-ie13bD9gMCH3xtU-oasRQx25UPkg8Uyc0bmTEkpxopEF_Zm5RvFkD)**

Thanks,

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our goal before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Every day, we’re working to elect representatives who will fight for the
people, not massive corporations. People across the country deserve a
system of government that they can rely on — one dedicated to improving
the lives of all, not just a wealthy few.

On Giving Tuesday, that mission is in even greater focus. We’re fighting
for a country where all people have a fair stake in our economy, are
valued in their communities, and know that they belong here.

Peter, our work is
powered 100% by the grassroots and we need your support before midnight to
reach our $30,000 Giving Tuesday fundraising goal because our fundraising
has slowed down over the last few weeks.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121997?refcode=em20221129-26303&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26303%2E1203867%2EeihNRk ]We operate on a shoestring budget compared to our impact and we’re
counting on you to help us reach this goal. Please, will you contribute
right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121997?refcode=em20221129-26303&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26303%2E1203867%2EeihNRk ]Contribute $3

Remember we don’t have corporate PACs or billionaire donors we can call
when our fundraising slows down. We’re relying on thousands of people
across the country pitching in what they can because they believe in the
future we’re fighting for.

We need policies that match the scale of the crises we’re facing —
Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, criminal justice reform, a living wage
for all workers, and so much more.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121997?refcode=em20221129-26303&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26303%2E1203867%2EeihNRk ]But in order to elect more Justice Democrats who are willing to go up
against the establishment, we need your support before our midnight
deadline. Will you make a contribution right now?

Thank you so much for your support,

Team Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26303%2E1203867%2EeihNRk ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26303%2E1203867%2EeihNRk ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221129-26303-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26303_1203867_eihNRk&akid=26303%2E1203867%2EeihNRk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26303%2E1203867%2EeihNRk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]But in order to elect more Justice Democrats who are willing to go up against the establishment, we need your support before our midnight deadline. Will you make a contribution right now? Thank you so much for your support, Team Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

body:

---
Peter, Georgia will forever hold a special place in my heart.
---
When I became the first Republican in history to win Georgia's 6th congressional district, I knew The Peach State would play a pivotal role in our elections for decades to come.
---
_And right now in Georgia 's runoff election, Herschel Walker is our only hope of stopping Joe Biden and Kamala Harris from gaining a 51-seat Senate majority. _
---
**_That 's why George Soros has spent a FORTUNE in Georgia to attack Herschel and effectively hand the most radical Senate majority in history to Biden and Kamala on a silver platter. _**
---
But Herschel has something these left-wing cronies NEVER will - grassroots patriots like YOU.
---

body:
Your donation will help our party hit its goal and continue electing Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. | |
---
Earlier this month, young people, seniors, parents with children in tow, and working people all made their voices heard. People around our country -- including you, Derek -- helped protect the Senate. You also ensured we lost fewer seats in the House than in any Democratic president’s first midterm in the last 40 years. _This is your victory._ But now, Donald Trump is officially running for president again -- and Trumpism is on the ballot in Georgia’s runoff election next week. clean_body: Your donation will help our party hit its goal and continue electing Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. | | Earlier this month, young people, seniors, parents with children in tow, and working people all made their voices heard. People around our country -- including you, Derek -- helped protect the Senate. You also ensured we lost fewer seats in the House than in any Democratic president’s first midterm in the last 40 years. This is your victory. But now, Donald Trump is officially running for president again -- and Trumpism is on the ballot in Georgia’s runoff election next week. It’s clear that our work isn’t over. Indeed, it is only just beginning. Will you be one of the 19 more supporters needed from Manassas to chip in $7 to the DNC before tomorrow's end-of-month fundraising deadline? Your donation will help our party hit its goal and continue electing Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. Donald Trump told us women should be punished for having an abortion. He installed a right-wing Supreme Court majority that paved the way for extreme abortion bans across the country. He provided tax giveaways to the wealthiest Americans and corporations while sabotaging American health care, had the worst jobs record since the Great Depression, and incited a violent mob to attack the Capitol to try to overturn an election he knew he lost. When voters went to the polls earlier this month, they knew what they stood for, so they knew what to fight for. And it was not Trump’s agenda. We have more to do than win just a single election, Derek. So I’m asking: Thank you for all that you do, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. | | Peter – I'm fired up!

Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.**

**That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.

**_[So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $25 or more right now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help us hit our final end-of-month goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55263614/381162668/1583625711?refcode=20221129.3_RW_A38&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjI0MjBlMy0wNjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3YSahkDvwBtVIXs23vNOAyKcXgarLcAfPbGsftfrTE=)_** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Kari Lake
subject: My message to the People of Arizona & the United States:
body:
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e487094771f6460791922687a98b7a1b&_e=GrqdRYNJPJj8s993EoSl9x6hzHSbXQ72Wgk2fwAtb7xQbM6VeukljV8hFckqahTvZhMGbgB6rmgsaxCNBMhRDk-S8UZdJB84NJR3TKgCWoE7cy4w_lssl9WFjEJq_nHL2xnaeN6xaDolNqy6WKuquaUdK-isbe9ZbrI-Qk-JPSDx-Hcpd129Zmf0AmXsZ1Tqp3e08d7Ak2bnGuCHdh0DY5m9t5NiARHdCRbTQplGxJohe8HwBezsRzkKG6lO1zXGaClv4SAx4WDEsyLks2fOz3XVvidnMd2S69kZDqjCOK6j0yMfcwPGioc__lMtRn3CGTSRI42nEUbpcFexFxBXsy0_dnm6-zEqlN2xjVFhfi0Lt__NHXIVFXTttWLZs3dfjthUhNnqKcaGK0g86CSdBqZkoF7kWz-FeU8wu3zEprF8W4ID_1W2oyx1FtK2D573FK_4Ow9hmm7kZLG9EhWgKEsh2LZLnJKiyNQqxden7o5OvoluN3UtYDPm3dWXvQeW)
---

To the People of Arizona and of the United States:

Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history.

Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures.

Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair.

This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country.

Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were.

I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections.

clean_body: | To the People of Arizona and of the United States: Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history. Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures. Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair. This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country. Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were. I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections. | Thank You, Kari Lake Candidate for Arizona Governor * Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Schrier
subject: One week until Georgia's Senate election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Today marks one week until the crucial Georgia Senate run-off election! Did you see Kim's message, Peter?

Today marks one week until the crucial Georgia Senate run-off election! This is our last chance to expand our Senate majority, but defeating extremist Herschel Walker won't be easy. Outside groups are spending big to flip this seat red, so Senator Raphael Warnock needs our support to fight back in these final days.

**[Will you split a donation right away to help Senator Raphael Warnock protect his seat and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55264463/381166237/-609692942?refcode=em22_221129_warno2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221129_warno2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODI1NTE1Mi0wNzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2mjOInwcBXOiaNWsDc4djt6UMlmGdeCEiy5suVPDG7o=)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier
Subject: Senator Warnock is counting on us
Date: Friday, November 18, 2022 [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55264464/381166238/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODI1NTE1Mi0wNzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2mjOInwcBXOiaNWsDc4djt6UMlmGdeCEiy5suVPDG7o=&emci=7525b06c-5c6f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=d8255152-0770-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=15820338)
Team:

This Election Day, voters in Washington State and across the country took a stand at the ballot box and rejected extremism.

In Washington, we beat the odds and won our toss-up race, even though election experts favored our opponent. Marie Gluesenkamp Pérez shocked the country by defeating one of the most extreme Republicans in the nation and flipping Washington's 3rd District blue. And we defended our narrow Senate majority. But there's still one critical race left.

**On December 6, Senator Raphael Warnock will be facing extremist Herschel Walker in the Georgia runoff election.** This is our chance to expand our Senate majority and continue to pass legislation that will make a meaningful difference in people's lives – but Senator Warnock has a tough fight ahead of him and he needs our help to win.

Outside groups are spending big to flip this seat red, so Senator Raphael Warnock needs our support to fight back in these final days. = \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier Subject: Senator Warnock is counting on us Date: Friday, November 18, 2022 Team: This Election Day, voters in Washington State and across the country took a stand at the ballot box and rejected extremism. In Washington, we beat the odds and won our toss-up race, even though election experts favored our opponent. Marie Gluesenkamp Pérez shocked the country by defeating one of the most extreme Republicans in the nation and flipping Washington's 3rd District blue. And we defended our narrow Senate majority. But there's still one critical race left. On December 6, Senator Raphael Warnock will be facing extremist Herschel Walker in the Georgia runoff election. This is our chance to expand our Senate majority and continue to pass legislation that will make a meaningful difference in people's lives – but Senator Warnock has a tough fight ahead of him and he needs our help to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Senator Warnock led on Election Day by less than 1 point, and we know this runoff race will be just as close. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls. clean_body: | | Hi there, As Josh’s Finance Director, it is my job to ensure we organize our funds. With the 2022 race wrapped up, it is critical we leave November financially stronger than ever. Here’s the thing: The NRCC is desperate to expand its slim majority in the House. They are already planning how to unseat Frontline candidates like Josh. We need to be on top of our finances, and do everything we can to defend Josh. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. ** | = | = | = | = | = | = The NRCC is relentless and will spend all means necessary to widen its slim majority. Let’s remind them that Josh is a fighter, his bipartisan solutions are the future, and that we will never back down. = Thank you for your continued support, Marina Pearce Finance Director for Gottheimer for Congress | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Please watch this special message that I recorded for you📩
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989028:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989028:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989028:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989029:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989029:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989030:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989031:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989032:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989033:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989028:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989028:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989028:JZPq4uGN1:m:1:3372944669:CAB1869F73B27971A02533A98EB4991E:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America is a nonprofit 501(c)(4) membership organization. With your gift of $25 or more you will become a Sustaining Member of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, and will receive information regarding the special benefits of your annual membership. Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, at the discretion of its board of directors and officers. If you would like to make a directed contribution to support a particular project, please contact us. Although Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America periodically uses its general treasury funds to engage on important political matters, the organization does not accept funds earmarked for independent expenditure activity or designated for other political purposes in support or opposition to federal candidates.
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: Don't donate because it's Giving Tuesday ➡
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988844:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988844:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988844:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988844:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988844:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988844:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988844:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988845:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988846:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988847:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988848:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988849:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988850:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988851:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988852:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988844:JRGU4uGbN:m:1:3371812801:9510680D1A2E6CDDF49CC5ACE37D7C28:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

name: Britainy Beshear
subject: Help me wish Andy a happy birthday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It would mean the world to Andy. Hey Peter,

I'm reaching out because today is a very special day -- **it's Andy's birthday!** I want to make it his best birthday yet, so I'll need your help.

Andy has been working hard to help Kentucky recover from COVID-19, invest in our schools, expand access to affordable health care, spur record-breaking economic development, and more. Still, he finds time to be an exceptional father, a supportive husband, and a proud dog dad to Winnie. He's given so much to us, so I wanted to do something to make his birthday extra special this year.

**I'm hoping to surprise him with 500 new donations from grassroots supporters before our birthday celebration tonight.** It would mean the world to him to see an outpouring of support from people across the Commonwealth.

[**Can I count on you? For Andy's 45th birthday, pitch in $45 (or whatever you can) and help me surprise Andy tonight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55266335/381169864/1012506187?refcode=em22_221129_Andy_fndd_gq_act_bdy_BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221129_Andy_fndd_gq_act_bdy_BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTdmYjZkNC0wNzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wj4qPuXZK9oRUDxF9fK8AAeRH-NH3bGplxwCN-CI35U=)

We're going to give him a list of all his supporters who chip in to help us reach our goal, and I know he would be so grateful to see your name on that list.

I can't think of a better gift than Andy seeing the support he has from Kentuckians across the state, but I'm counting on your help to pull this off.

[**Before our celebration tonight, chip in $45, or any amount you can, and help us make it Andy's best birthday yet.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55266336/381169866/1012506187?refcode=em22_221129_Andy_fndd_gq_act_bdy_BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221129_Andy_fndd_gq_act_bdy_BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTdmYjZkNC0wNzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wj4qPuXZK9oRUDxF9fK8AAeRH-NH3bGplxwCN-CI35U=)

Thank you!

Britainy | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55266337/381169867/1012506187?refcode=em22_221129_Andy_fndd_gq_act_bdy_BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221129_Andy_fndd_gq_act_bdy_BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTdmYjZkNC0wNzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wj4qPuXZK9oRUDxF9fK8AAeRH-NH3bGplxwCN-CI35U=)

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: re: Giving Tuesday 2022
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989141:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989141:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989141:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989142:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989142:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989143:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989144:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989145:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989146:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989141:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989141:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989141:6tXy5uGN3:m:1:3350876382:0BF40044CCE9CFDF2DC44FAA8FD6C7BE:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206

name: Chris Trull
subject: Giving Tuesday ask for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Major runoff one week from today| | |
---
Peter, Today is Giving Tuesday, and the future of our democracy has never needed your gift more than it does today. The 2022 mid-term elections are not over. We’ve got a tough fight on our hands in Georgia. Wisconsin has serious battles going into 2024. [**Will you split a donation between Senator Warnock and Congresswoman Moore to protect our democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55266602/381170166/1942320025?refcode=1129&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTNlNDZlZi0wNzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUgHMSrXLjgGTxi2ytTwkgMgbMGJMDQ3z9ycpZNbOPw=) Holding Warnock’s seat gives U.S. Senate Democrats more leverage from committee assignments to passing legislation that moves America forward. And you know Gwen will do everything in her power to deliver a blue Wisconsin again in 2024. The Georgia runoff is one week from today!
