name: Candace Owens
subject: Peter, I’m not emailing you just because it’s Giving Tuesday
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988535:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988535:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988535:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988535:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988535:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988535:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988535:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988536:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988537:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988538:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988539:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988540:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988541:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988542:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988543:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988535:6fgG5uGmN:m:1:3346849603:568BA7D7B22F3759C1F8D25F9A57BBC2:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

On this Giving Tuesday, [show your support ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55293551/381234930/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NhODg4Ni0zMjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82wdGyYXWKUt5B8bnvhFr1aQhFv1OvPHdgGNoWhLHLg=&emci=5285f168-1070-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=2cca8886-3270-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=9512399)for healthy democracy - your investment in [Build Alaska’s Future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55293552/381234931/-83532908?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NhODg4Ni0zMjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82wdGyYXWKUt5B8bnvhFr1aQhFv1OvPHdgGNoWhLHLg=&emci=5285f168-1070-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=2cca8886-3270-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=9512399) will help keep the public policy discourse accurate and transparent, and ensure Alaskans have the information they need as we work together to build a deliberate, inclusive, and sustainable economic future for our state and nation. Meet the match with iHeartMedia! BuildAlaska.org and iHeart are working together on radio and digital spots to provide clear and accessible information, and iHeart is matching donations dollar-for-dollar to fund this campaign. Help us get messages out to the public such as these from [Marcie Obremski of IBEW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55293553/381234932/-803653937?v=GsHJ24hMHEs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NhODg4Ni0zMjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82wdGyYXWKUt5B8bnvhFr1aQhFv1OvPHdgGNoWhLHLg=&emci=5285f168-1070-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=2cca8886-3270-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=9512399) and [Clay Koplin, former mayor of Cordova](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55293554/381234933/660247699?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NhODg4Ni0zMjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82wdGyYXWKUt5B8bnvhFr1aQhFv1OvPHdgGNoWhLHLg=&emci=5285f168-1070-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=2cca8886-3270-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=9512399) on the importance of civil discourse and working together as is evidenced by the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill. **7 days.**
That's how long we have before the Dec. 6 runoff election deadline to pull ahead and win this runoff.
**7 million.**
That's the number of registered voters across Georgia that we need to reach with our people-powered message.
**$43,264.**
That's how much we need to raise by midnight to stay on track to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal and mobilize the voters who will decide this race.

Team, three weeks ago, we celebrated a historic win together. We flipped IL-13 blue for the first time in three decades and made history by electing me as the first woman to serve Central and Southern Illinois in Congress.

In a year where Republican super PACs spent millions trying to push down Democrats across the country, we stood strong in our values and focused on our communities. But, our work isn’t over, and the attacks are far from finished. That’s why I’m humbly asking: [**Will you pitch in $10 or more ahead of tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55293932/381236129/567133887?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.29_b1_tn_all-nd&refcode2=55669599-3370-ed11-819c-00224825858d&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTY2OTU5OS0zMzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zghubeh-dpgKQSSDevJvZumyZ2oZ8rk_UuBcK0NiJNw=) | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55293933/381236130/353348678?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.29_b1_tn_all-nd&refcode2=55669599-3370-ed11-819c-00224825858d&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTY2OTU5OS0zMzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zghubeh-dpgKQSSDevJvZumyZ2oZ8rk_UuBcK0NiJNw=)

clean_body: = Team, three weeks ago, we celebrated a historic win together. We flipped IL-13 blue for the first time in three decades and made history by electing me as the first woman to serve Central and Southern Illinois in Congress. In a year where Republican super PACs spent millions trying to push down Democrats across the country, we stood strong in our values and focused on our communities. But, our work isn’t over, and the attacks are far from finished. That’s why I’m humbly asking: = | = = Voters in Illinois’ 13th District sent a message loud and clear on November 8th: They want a leader who will put working families first and ensure that we invest in an economic recovery that doesn’t leave anyone behind. I’m so thankful that voters instilled their trust in me to deliver these results for them, and I’ve already hit the ground running – attending New Member Orientation and preparing to serve our district in Congress. = I couldn’t have gotten here without you, and now, I need to know:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thank you for your support, Nikki Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. . | | =

As we head into the final month of the year, we’re solidifying our 2023 election plans and gearing up for a full push in January.

Amanda knows the power of community-driven grassroots movements. She’s spent her career working to empower everyday Houstonians to be the change we need.

But, team, election season has gotten longer and longer, making grassroots-supported campaigns like ours even harder to run. We can only win with the support of regular people like you and the Houstonians we’re engaging with every day. That’s why we’re reaching out now.

**_[We’re up against a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline, and if we’re going to compete in 2023, we need your help now. Gabe hasn’t even replaced Herrell in the halls of Congress yet, and she’s already plotting to take this crucial House seat back. And if we aren’t careful, she could succeed: _we narrowly flipped NM-02 from red to blue by just 1,342 votes this November._
We know Gabe is preparing to fight for the people of New Mexico’s 2nd district, including our fundamental rights to reproductive choice, affordable healthcare, good-paying jobs, and a clean and safe environment.
While Gabe focuses on serving you in Washington, we need to build our grassroots resources to defend this seat from Herrell and the far-right GOP. The 2022 election may be over, but the race to 2024 had already begun.

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: our work isn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Three weeks ago today, voters in OH-13 sent a loud and clear message about the type of leader they want to be their voice in Congress: Someone who puts the needs of this community before special interests and who will always stand on the side of working families.

Peter,

Three weeks ago today, voters in OH-13 sent a loud and clear message about the type of leader they want to be their voice in Congress: Someone who puts the needs of this community before special interests and who will always stand on the side of working families.

**I am deeply grateful for the trust my home community, the Birthplace of Champions, has instilled in me.** I have already hit the ground running in new member orientation, and I couldn’t be more excited to serve you in Congress.

[**I couldn’t have gotten here without the support of this team, so with our first end-of-month fundraising deadline since Election Day at midnight tomorrow, I have to ask: Will you chip in $3 or more to help us continue our operation and begin building the critical infrastructure we’ll need to win again?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55294193/381237080/-1743402759?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.29_b1_es_all-nd&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBmYmJiOC0zNDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4MV8MU7CtXF3d1ZZHYIrsCVpgG9UMCaf3N3N3OpcHc=)

Peter, in the weeks leading up to Election Day, Republicans spent over $7 million against me in order to mislead voters and misconstrue my record.

**It was this people-powered movement – fueled by folks giving what they could, when they could – that helped us push back and deliver a resounding victory.**

Our work is only just beginning. It will always be my number one priority to center the voices of working families here in Northeast Ohio, and that means organizing within our community as early as possible.

[**So, Peter, please consider chipping in $3, $30, or whatever you can spare to help us begin building the infrastructure for my re-election campaign and help us continue growing this grassroots movement, together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55294196/381237083/-1743402759?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.29_b1_es_all-nd&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBmYmJiOC0zNDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4MV8MU7CtXF3d1ZZHYIrsCVpgG9UMCaf3N3N3OpcHc=)

Thank you,

Emilia Sykes

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55294197/381237084/-1743402759?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.29_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBmYmJiOC0zNDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4MV8MU7CtXF3d1ZZHYIrsCVpgG9UMCaf3N3N3OpcHc=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55294198/381237085/-1743402759?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.29_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBmYmJiOC0zNDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4MV8MU7CtXF3d1ZZHYIrsCVpgG9UMCaf3N3N3OpcHc=)

**[Peter, I have a late request before we close the books on November — $5. It might not seem like the kind of money that can help strengthen our progressive movement, but if everyone reading this tonight chips in just $5, I know we can. Can I count on you? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55294779/381239114/234291150?amount=5&refcode=MTFC_202201129_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTc3ZWMzNi0zNzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKuzIkX4x0t4qLuoVLcd7qbVkhXDbE4HLkSRGhGiaWE=)** | [CHIP IN $5 TO ELECT MARK TAKANO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55294780/381239115/234291150?amount=5&refcode=MTFC_202201129_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTc3ZWMzNi0zNzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKuzIkX4x0t4qLuoVLcd7qbVkhXDbE4HLkSRGhGiaWE=)

I wanted to reach out and say thank you.

Together, our team has made some real differences in Congress. Because of your support, I’ve been able to fight for things us progressives value most.

I’ve championed veterans care, labor rights, racial justice, and more. **But I’m not done.**

**I’ll never stop fighting for equality, freedom, and justice for all Americans. And I’ll need your help.**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55295335/381242574/-696062415?refcode=EM_FR_221129WarnockSplit_FR_RRF_90DO__NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGUyZTc3OC0zOTcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjaCkLiUdmML0GwOJFFYrV0WyzuIyfRh4ChZW2pouXQ=) In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:** [**Please, will you chip in $10 or more right now to split between me and Lisa Blunt Rochester so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55295338/381242577/1203984151?refcode=EM_FR_221129WarnockSplit_FR_RRF_90DO__NG_TESTA_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGUyZTc3OC0zOTcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjaCkLiUdmML0GwOJFFYrV0WyzuIyfRh4ChZW2pouXQ=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55295341/381242580/-696062415?refcode=EM_FR_221129WarnockSplit_FR_RRF_90DO__NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGUyZTc3OC0zOTcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjaCkLiUdmML0GwOJFFYrV0WyzuIyfRh4ChZW2pouXQ=)** I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.

**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever.** [**So please, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more between me and Lisa Blunt Rochester to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to continue our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55295345/381242583/1203984151?refcode=EM_FR_221129WarnockSplit_FR_RRF_90DO__NG_TESTA_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGUyZTc3OC0zOTcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjaCkLiUdmML0GwOJFFYrV0WyzuIyfRh4ChZW2pouXQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Raphael Warnock and Lisa Blunt Rochester:_ | | ****[$3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55295347/381242588/-696062415?refcode=EM_FR_221129WarnockSplit_FR_RRF_90DO__NG_TESTA_EL15&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode2=EL3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGUyZTc3OC0zOTcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjaCkLiUdmML0GwOJFFYrV0WyzuIyfRh4ChZW2pouXQ=)****

clean_body: = In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it. My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: = = I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress. They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Raphael Warnock and Lisa Blunt Rochester: | | **= | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Reverend Warnock Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . **

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Our fight has only just begun.
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988904:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988904:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988904:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988905:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988905:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988906:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988907:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988908:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988909:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988904:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988904:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988904:6GVUUuGNI:m:1:3372576248:61B670B7A367623CA83EA0696DCECEFD:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---

Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of Susan B. Although Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, at the discretion of its board of directors and officers. If you would like to make a directed contribution to support a particular project, please contact us. Although Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America periodically uses its general treasury funds to engage on important political matters, the organization does not accept funds earmarked for independent expenditure activity or designated for other political purposes in support or opposition to federal candidates. name: Candace Owens
subject: It takes a community to achieve our mission.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988895:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988895:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988895:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988895:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988895:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988895:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988895:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988896:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988897:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988898:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988899:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988900:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988901:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988902:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988903:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988895:6Eu4UuGrN:m:1:3373497171:3D2236235B4665BDEAA3B61D65A2685D:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: our fight is far from over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
in fact, it’s only just begun
|
---

Team,

For the past five years, this grassroots team has powered the NDRC’s work to secure fair maps and defeat gerrymandering across the country. **I’m proud to report that our grassroots efforts made an incredible difference in the midterm elections.**

For the first time in years, more Americans will live under a state government entirely controlled by Democrats than by Republicans. That’s in large part because fair maps made it possible for Democrats to flip state legislative chambers in states like Michigan and Minnesota. And, leading up to the race for Congress, our work helped secure what _The New York Times_ called “the fairest maps in 40 years.” As a result, we helped prevent an illegitimate red wave.

**Together, we helped prove that,_wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win_. Now, it’s up to us to continue our fight for fairness. [_If you’re able, will you pitch in to support the NDRC’s work before the end-of-month deadline?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55280625/381186845/-1390373953?amount=30&refcode=20221129.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkZTRmODRkLTEwNzAtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AbTb766jYdYKIsYMGBxd3nEErQUooiEBctAIvxKIuXs=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**The truth is that our fight is far from over – in fact, it’s only just begun.** In states like Wisconsin and Florida, maps are still gerrymandered. Meanwhile, Republicans have declared that they now view redistricting as an ongoing fight, rather than a once-a-decade battle. GOP map manipulators are preparing _right now_ to ramp up their efforts, so we need to be prepared to hold them accountable.

Here at the NDRC, we’re committed to continuing our work to end gerrymandering once and for all. We’re continuing our multi-pronged strategy by working to help elect fair-minded judges, supporting plaintiffs in lawsuits, holding map-manipulating politicians accountable, and much more.

**Simply put, we have a lot to celebrate, but we also have a lot left to do.[_If you’re still with us in this fight, I hope you’ll make a quick donation to power the next phase of our work before the end-of-month deadline._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55280632/381186852/-1390373953?amount=30&refcode=20221129.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkZTRmODRkLTEwNzAtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AbTb766jYdYKIsYMGBxd3nEErQUooiEBctAIvxKIuXs=)**

Thank you, team,

– Eric H. Holder, Jr.

clean_body: in fact, it’s only just begun | Team, For the past five years, this grassroots team has powered the NDRC’s work to secure fair maps and defeat gerrymandering across the country. I’m proud to report that our grassroots efforts made an incredible difference in the midterm elections. For the first time in years, more Americans will live under a state government entirely controlled by Democrats than by Republicans. That’s in large part because fair maps made it possible for Democrats to flip state legislative chambers in states like Michigan and Minnesota. And, leading up to the race for Congress, our work helped secure what The New York Times called “the fairest maps in 40 years.” As a result, we helped prevent an illegitimate red wave. Together, we helped prove that,wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win. Now, it’s up to us to continue our fight for fairness. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The truth is that our fight is far from over – in fact, it’s only just begun. In states like Wisconsin and Florida, maps are still gerrymandered. Meanwhile, Republicans have declared that they now view redistricting as an ongoing fight, rather than a once-a-decade battle. GOP map manipulators are preparing right now to ramp up their efforts, so we need to be prepared to hold them accountable. Here at the NDRC, we’re committed to continuing our work to end gerrymandering once and for all. We’re continuing our multi-pronged strategy by working to help elect fair-minded judges, supporting plaintiffs in lawsuits, holding map-manipulating politicians accountable, and much more. Simply put, we have a lot to celebrate, but we also have a lot left to do.= Thank you, team, – Eric H. Holder, Jr. = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=93d0205a6e7b45bbac200f156c6fdff6&_e=nrPv0JMqJ4FuErbi06mC11BKL2EPTS3IppSXhNnQrmwyGh6zXPEV3FMOw1IZFCcGzW1vBjo4ue9qDoRExMjS3dAQy7El3vl5b3a9fF24LJqEGO3iF7LVn1KoaqCKXme4k_ROr-RLvLnFO7I0sAYm9tNVSxmWSgEDI_oXxyBUqsy84ip50ncWU1zGwiXGWuug8g8b6lQ6aumFL7jjmA6dpiW_IbyWYYf4S8z-MBgmnnUEyheNocGVPQjIoIpqgjqcxc2eBUMwjMo_P_uBXiBedeYHZwtUTJ61JLQ1Sn2P_tNTMHZYHHMjJScrKOWNteAaC9sUkMNC7Ex06x-QCrIJk45be5rXOtMc-6ZIf2ZZKK1YIafiefaBmJJpkttiSArPBGj-ZBv3OEUQap2NeaW0ANL_lpruwBmeBcEURbFS3PlfSEN2Ps5Zx44x01tcYV2lAKyZkhW_rZVJmC4qvrL4ZbSZnMzrKFrxGyQ32c85bY0%3D)

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: This Giving Tuesday, can you support three local organizations working to provide food and support services to asylum seekers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re launching a fundraiser for three organizations that provide food and support services to asylum seekers arriving in NYC.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221129-3662-header&t=1&akid=3662%2E2526796%2EbsS3fE)
For Giving Tuesday, we’re launching a fundraiser for three organizations that provide food and support services to asylum seekers arriving in NYC with nothing but the clothes on their backs – many sent as part of an anti-immigrant stunt by Texas Gov. Greg Abbott.
100% of your donation will go to these three community organizations – Make the Road NY, New Immigrant Community Empowerment (NICE), and City Island Rising – to support families looking to make a better life for themselves this year.
[If you’re able to lend a hand to those in need this giving season, please chip in $6 or whatever you can to help these three incredible organizations ramp up their relief efforts.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221129.Cp3mZh&refcode=em20221129-3662-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3662%2E2526796%2EbsS3fE)
**[Contribute $6](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221129.Cp3mZh&refcode=em20221129-3662-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3662%2E2526796%2EbsS3fE)**
**_100% of your contribution will be split between these three organizations:_**
* **New Immigrant Community Empowerment creates pathways to success and empowerment for essential immigrant workers, and provides critical services and resources to prevent worker exploitation and ensure workers' safety and rights are respected. As asylum seekers arrive looking for employment, NICE provides workforce development training, know-your-rights education, and safety training for work permits that might cost an asylum seeker hundreds of dollars to obtain privately.**

* **Make the Road NY** offers an array of education, health, and legal services for immigrant and working class communities in NYC. Make the Road has been meeting asylum seekers new to NY as they disembark at the bus station to offer supportive services like housing assistance referrals and case management, and to distribute prepaid cell phones, Metrocards to access public transit, and cash assistance.

* **City Island Rising** ’s goal is to strengthen the social and cultural fabric of New York’s diversity by leveraging community-driven solutions to city-wide problems. As more asylum seekers arrive in NYC, City Island Rising is operating a food pantry and clothing drives to support migrant families that came here with little to nothing while they await immigration hearings.

We’ve seen this movement step up to achieve incredible things before. **Just last year, together we raised $7.36 million for mutual aid groups and other relief programs, and we need your help to continue to provide urgent relief to those in need – especially during the holidays.**
[If you are able to donate, please pitch in $6 — or whatever you can afford — and your donation will be automatically split between these three organizations working to build power for local working class and immigrant communities.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221129.Cp3mZh&refcode=em20221129-3662-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3662%2E2526796%2EbsS3fE)
Wishing you and your loved ones a happy holiday season.
— Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221129?refcode=em20221129-3662-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=23&refcode2=3662_2526796_bsS3fE&akid=3662%2E2526796%2EbsS3fE)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221129-3662-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=24&akid=3662%2E2526796%2EbsS3fE)**

clean_body: We’re launching a fundraiser for three organizations that provide food and support services to asylum seekers arriving in NYC. For Giving Tuesday, we’re launching a fundraiser for three organizations that provide food and support services to asylum seekers arriving in NYC with nothing but the clothes on their backs – many sent as part of an anti-immigrant stunt by Texas Gov. Greg Abbott. 100% of your donation will go to these three community organizations – Make the Road NY, New Immigrant Community Empowerment (NICE), and City Island Rising – to support families looking to make a better life for themselves this year. 100% of your contribution will be split between these three organizations: New Immigrant Community Empowerment creates pathways to success and empowerment for essential immigrant workers, and provides critical services and resources to prevent worker exploitation and ensure workers' safety and rights are respected. As asylum seekers arrive looking for employment, NICE provides workforce development training, know-your-rights education, and safety training for work permits that might cost an asylum seeker hundreds of dollars to obtain privately. Make the Road NY offers an array of education, health, and legal services for immigrant and working class communities in NYC. Make the Road has been meeting asylum seekers new to NY as they disembark at the bus station to offer supportive services like housing assistance referrals and case management, and to distribute prepaid cell phones, Metrocards to access public transit, and cash assistance. City Island Rising ’s goal is to strengthen the social and cultural fabric of New York’s diversity by leveraging community-driven solutions to city-wide problems. As more asylum seekers arrive in NYC, City Island Rising is operating a food pantry and clothing drives to support migrant families that came here with little to nothing while they await immigration hearings. We’ve seen this movement step up to achieve incredible things before. Just last year, together we raised $7.36 million for mutual aid groups and other relief programs, and we need your help to continue to provide urgent relief to those in need – especially during the holidays. Wishing you and your loved ones a happy holiday season. — Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Friends—I'm fired up!

Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team
is on the ground right now—knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who
will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50
million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect
Herschel Walker. I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could
get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.

That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so
we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters
in this final stretch and win. But with time running out before this
critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31711?t=1008&amount=32&akid=6460%2E3611125%2EXXDNfm ]So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $32 or more right now between
me and Tim Ryan to help us hit our final end-of-month goal, reach more
voters, and keep Georgia blue?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Patty Murray
subject: We must protect the freedom to marry who you love
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Sign on now to support the Respect for Marriage Act.
#
Peter,
Good news: this week, the Senate passed the Respect for Marriage Act — legislation that takes meaningful steps to defend the fundamental freedom to marry who you love in this country.
**[We can’t rely on the far-right Supreme Court to even uphold, let alone protect marriage equality. Will you sign the petition now and show your support for the Respect for Marriage Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55297035/381246897/1275946413?refcode=pm_221129_1&ms=pm_221129_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjQwOTc3OS0zZDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEJRwPg3fFyfHnVaIxkZKTT-zr_oanoUX4OvFPOhk5w=&emci=064950e4-7167-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=66409779-3d70-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=13116610)**
This legislation is crucial. We already know the Supreme Court is willing to reverse its own precedent on matters like abortion rights. If decisions like _Obergefell_ are struck down, we need laws like the Respect for Marriage Act on the books to help ensure the fundamental right to marry who you love is protected.
**[LGBTQ+ families in Washington state and across the country should not have to live in fear of a Supreme Court decision ripping apart their families. Add your name in support of getting the Respect for Marriage Act to President Biden’s desk.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55297036/381246898/1275946413?refcode=pm_221129_1&ms=pm_221129_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjQwOTc3OS0zZDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEJRwPg3fFyfHnVaIxkZKTT-zr_oanoUX4OvFPOhk5w=&emci=064950e4-7167-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=66409779-3d70-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty Murray

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55297037/381246899/29519553?refcode=pm_em_221129_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjQwOTc3OS0zZDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEJRwPg3fFyfHnVaIxkZKTT-zr_oanoUX4OvFPOhk5w=)****

Friend,
Our Washington values came out on top on Election Day. Now, it's up to us to lead with those values front and center.
That's why I've set a bold goal of reaching 1,000 donations before our November end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow. Look, this is no typical end-of-month fundraising deadline. It's the **FIRST** deadline since the midterm election, and the **LAST** end-of-month deadline before Washington state's legislative session fundraising freeze begins. So please, help us reach our goal before we close the books on this historic month.

Earlier this month, I was proud to represent Washington state at a historic U.N. Climate Change Conference. I left with hope, but also determination that we must do more to stop our world from careening down a deadly warming path.
So when the legislature convenes at the start of the year, Democrats have a mandate to lead with the urgency that this moment demands. We'll continue fighting to pass bold legislation to combat the climate crisis, and I'll be pushing for us to enshrine the right to choose into the state constitution.
But before the legislative session begins along with the state-mandated fundraising freeze, I'm coming to you with an urgent ask to help us hit our 1,000-donation goal. This is an inflection point in the fight for our Washington state values, and we can't afford to spend the next few months on the sidelines.
[_**Please, chip in $10 right now, so we can head into Washington state 's legislative session with the strength we'll need to tackle the issues that matter most.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/d39jSgwAGET9/QTZoL3EwbHlSck50VjlEbVl3MHVmTzJZU2s0VUNTZ2h2aXRSQUJ0ZUJjVTFkenBDbGtNTVRheGd1ZVNhZmtJUEdtdERqaXNhMlRhNk82cjNoVVQ3WkhCOWhVUmgzc1R3Zk9WYjEyMjJ0eXc9S0/anFuMkgydUcrYlJWdGpNN3NEbStNY2RURS8xRjJQbWMxYWkwYkxFN3Rodz0S1)
Thank you, as always, for being a part of this campaign.
Very truly yours,
Jay

| | | My friend, We had an overwhelming response to last week's survey. One thing is clear: _**Americans are ready to move past Donald Trump and look to the future.**_ We'd like to share some of the answers we received. name: =?utf-8?Q?United=20American=20Patriots?=
subject: It’s Giving Tuesday - here’s how you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Help us reach our Warrior Fund goal | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=83727a5246&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, November 29th is Giving Tuesday, and the United American Patriots team has established a BIG fundraising goal for the week to support wrongly accused Warriors - $15,000! **UAP has** **a historic number of active cases heading into the new year, and our Warriors need your support more than ever before.**
---
[**HELP US REACH OUR GOAL**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c9e8f65227&e=fdefed58de)
---
Giving Tuesday is a national movement to transform the communities in which we live by supporting charitable groups and activities close to our hearts. And our UAP Warriors work harder than anyone to better the world we live in. They...
* Leave their families to be deployed abroad,
* Miss important holidays and milestones,
* Witness horrors we could only imagine,
* Sustain painful injuries,
* And much more.

**They do it all to be treated like nothing more than a common criminal...** These men and women put their lives on the line in service to our country, only to have it turn its back on them... The Heroes we help are completely innocent and in no way deserve the treatment they're getting. The government is ignoring evidence, disregarding testimony, and manufacturing false claims to get these Soldiers put behind bars.
_But you have the opportunity to help them![**You can contribute here to help us achieve our goal for Giving Tuesday.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=75c60ce7ad&e=fdefed58de)_
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c90eea3a85&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friendd, there are still too many Heroes wrongfully imprisoned for crimes they didn't commit. And we need your help to get them home to their families. With your support, our organization is able to raise awareness about our Warriors’ cases with the media, help them afford the absurd legal fees, and stand alongside them as they fight for justice. _**[We would be honored to receive your support this National Giving Tuesday to further our mission to free these Warriors and reunite them with their families.](google.com/https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=giving-tuesday&utm_content=av)**_
---
[**DONATE TO THE WARRIOR FUND**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=35cd4e4b17&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you in advance, United American Patriots
---
|
---
|

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Peter, don’t abandon Herschel Walker on the 1-yard-line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Win the last race of 2022
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61983091:66CD0uG6N:m:1:3331421248:0E6398F3F5F0700305FA7C19AB834B67:r)
---
| _**RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED**_
**Election Day: Dec 6th**

**Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022!**
---

I know I've asked a lot from you, Peter. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option.

We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you.
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TO THE RUNOFF ACTION FUND](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61983091:66CD0uG6N:m:1:3331421248:0E6398F3F5F0700305FA7C19AB834B67:r)
---
This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can't thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I'm asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight.

Herschel's cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel **MILLIONS** into Raphael Warnock's campaign fund.

**_[The only way to fight back and win this race is with your help. That's why I'm coming to you and asking you to rush a contribution of any amount.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61983091:66CD0uG6N:m:1:3331421248:0E6398F3F5F0700305FA7C19AB834B67:r "The only way to fight back and win this race is with your help. That’s why I’m coming
to you and asking you to rush a contribution of any amount.")_**
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TO THE RUNOFF ACTION FUND](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61983091:66CD0uG6N:m:1:3331421248:0E6398F3F5F0700305FA7C19AB834B67:r)
---
Democrats are gearing up for the fight of their lives in a desperate attempt to keep Georgia blue.

**_[Can we count on you to make an emergency contribution to the runoff action fund and help us win the final race of 2022?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61983091:66CD0uG6N:m:1:3331421248:0E6398F3F5F0700305FA7C19AB834B67:r "Can we count on you
to make an emergency contribution to the runoff action fund and help us win the final race of 2022?")_**

My very best,
Nikki Haley

name: M. Dorado
subject: The fight for fair maps is far from over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Donate today to take action.
|
---

Team -- I keep thinking about this quote from A.G. Holder when I consider what’s next for the fair democracy movement.
* * *
[**“The fight for fair maps is far from over, with two redistricting cases before the U.S. Supreme Court. We must also realize that too many Americans in many states continue to be impacted by partisan and racial gerrymandering.” -- A.G. Holder.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55299465/381254473/-1585539253?refcode=20221129_AOTL_F_eom3_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzYTE1NWZmLTQxNzAtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ANdLUTZjJskBH4gRWMz2rI5absZSdtDqC9KZWsFQsxQ=)

**[The fight continues. name: Candace Owens
subject: I’m not emailing you just because it’s Giving Tuesday. 👉
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988697:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988697:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988697:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988697:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988697:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988697:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988697:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988698:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988699:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988700:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988701:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988702:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988703:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988704:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988705:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988697:JSn90uGiN:m:1:3360412034:B21812F4DF41CA40701712B166589D53:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

subject: We MUST protect Justice Thomas!

body:
|
---
| | | Peter, this is embarrassing.

How is it that the Left can get over **ONE MILLION** signatures to impeach Clarence Thomas, but State GOP's **_[pledge to DEFEND Justice Thomas](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989961:J_R1RuGNQ:m:1:3346849603:5D7BBA892CE2C60F74FAF38B3D87A09D:r "pledge to DEFEND Justice Thomas")_** is **STILL** short by over 100,000 signatures!?

| | | [SIGN THE PLEDGE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989961:J_R1RuGNQ:m:1:3346849603:5D7BBA892CE2C60F74FAF38B3D87A09D:r)

name: Becca Balint
subject: What I heard from you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Over 400 Vermonters shared their priorities with me. Here they are: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55299953/381258871/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBhNjQ2My00MzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9qFbHlx2EiRuU3BMPQ5LPQezjZ5kPMH_iVAEyRlHw0=&emci=7c09453d-3870-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=f80a6463-4370-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=43402272) | Peter: When I set off for New Member Orientation in DC earlier this month, I opened up a survey to allow Vermonters to share their priorities directly with me. I wanted to let you know that my team and I have looked through every single response – because when I say I will carry your hopes, dreams, and wishes with me to Washington, _I mean it._**__ Here are just a few of the things I’ve heard from you so far:** _“Sustaining my private practice in pediatric physical therapy while being able to afford to live in Vermont with my children. The large businesses/monopolies in my opinion do not serve the needs of their patients in our rural state. I am unable to qualify for Public Service provider student loan forgiveness because I have a private practice ...even though my practice only accepts VT Medicaid for insurance coverage!!”_ _“As a retired teacher, I volunteer at our local food shelf and also started a program to offer homemade soup to our local food shelf. While working on the hunger issue, I am shocked to learn that mega-farms receive huge subsidies while our local farms in VT receive nothing. Meanwhile, many thousands of Americans are food insecure.”_ _“Of course every one of these things is super important. But voting rights is probably number one as it’s key to everything else. Good to have you there fighting for us. It is an act of bravery to step up at this time to fight for our democracy by and for the people.”_ _“First, congratulations, Becca! Based upon ongoing reports about global warming, we need to move away from corporate interests and toward truly common needs. Curbing climate change will take all of us.”_ _ “I am extremely concerned about the increasing power of Wall Street and large corporations over all aspects of our lives and its displacement of the role of government in the formulation and execution of public policy.”_ **While challenging the status quo on all of these issues won’t be easy, our win earlier this month proves that we have the people-power needed to make meaningful change here in Vermont – and we’re just getting started. ** **[If you believe that change is possible, and that people like us have the power to transform our political system, then please contribute $3 to help us finish this month strong and prepare to hit the ground running in Washington in 2023!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55299954/381258872/-502515835?refcode=E19666-20221129-EOM1-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBhNjQ2My00MzcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9qFbHlx2EiRuU3BMPQ5LPQezjZ5kPMH_iVAEyRlHw0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | clean_body: Over 400 Vermonters shared their priorities with me. Here they are: | | Peter: When I set off for New Member Orientation in DC earlier this month, I opened up a survey to allow Vermonters to share their priorities directly with me. I wanted to let you know that my team and I have looked through every single response – because when I say I will carry your hopes, dreams, and wishes with me to Washington, I mean it._ Here are just a few of the things I’ve heard from you so far: “Sustaining my private practice in pediatric physical therapy while being able to afford to live in Vermont with my children. The large businesses/monopolies in my opinion do not serve the needs of their patients in our rural state. I am unable to qualify for Public Service provider student loan forgiveness because I have a private practice ...even though my practice only accepts VT Medicaid for insurance coverage!!” “As a retired teacher, I volunteer at our local food shelf and also started a program to offer homemade soup to our local food shelf. While working on the hunger issue, I am shocked to learn that mega-farms receive huge subsidies while our local farms in VT receive nothing. Meanwhile, many thousands of Americans are food insecure.” “Of course every one of these things is super important. But voting rights is probably number one as it’s key to everything else. Good to have you there fighting for us. It is an act of bravery to step up at this time to fight for our democracy by and for the people.” “First, congratulations, Becca! Based upon ongoing reports about global warming, we need to move away from corporate interests and toward truly common needs. Curbing climate change will take all of us.” “I am extremely concerned about the increasing power of Wall Street and large corporations over all aspects of our lives and its displacement of the role of government in the formulation and execution of public policy.” While challenging the status quo on all of these issues won’t be easy, our win earlier this month proves that we have the people-power needed to make meaningful change here in Vermont – and we’re just getting started. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you again for trusting me to represent our state in Congress. I am so grateful. Talk soon, Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P.O. Box 291, Burlington, VT, 05402

clean_body: Raphael Warnock raised over $50 million in fewer than 30 days, outraising us by millions. | It just happened again, Fellow American. Raphael Warnock raised over $52 million in fewer than 30 days, outraising us by millions. That's nearly TWO MILLION DOLLARS PER DAY! Fellow American, we don't need to raise $52 million between now and the runoff election next Tuesday (although it would help). We just need to make sure our message is reaching Georgia voters - especially during this crucial week of early voting. Runoff elections are all about turnout and motivation. Right now, my opponent has a MAJOR cash advantage, and the early voting numbers make it clear this will be another incredibly close race. Please, Fellow American, help us catch up, fully fund our new ads, and turn out voters across Georgia. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Has any other org asked this today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
We doubt it.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4384?t=2&akid=13126%2E53494%2EgzKRrZ) Friend: On Giving Tuesday, countless great organizations are asking for your support. But we doubt any of them are asking this: | [**_Will you help us make sure $370 billion gets spent wisely?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4384?t=3&akid=13126%2E53494%2EgzKRrZ)
---

| [SUPPORT OUR WORK](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4384?t=4&akid=13126%2E53494%2EgzKRrZ)
---
Over the last two years, Evergreen helped draft and pass over $370 billion of climate investments. This money can do a world of good for the climate—but only if state governments and federal agencies pursue the most effective policies and feel pressure to be bold and ambitious.
We have the policy expertise and—with your help—the advocacy power to make that happen.
That's why after 6,000 hours of research, Giving Green awarded us their highest endorsement—for the second year in a row. **Their recommendation is an evidence-based promise that every dollar you donate to us will go as far as possible in the fight against the climate crisis.**
_"[Evergreen is] a nimble organization that is highly adept at timing its policy development and advocacy to the political climate."
—Giving Green, 2021_
_"We think Evergreen's nimble makeup, connections to governors' offices, and targeted focus on specific states could result in big impacts in the years ahead."
—Giving Green, 2022_
Giving Green doesn't just recommend organizations doing good work. **They only recommend high-impact groups where grassroots donations actually make a difference.** With your support, we're ready to scale up our operations and expand capacity to cover these crucial new climate opportunities.
[_**We're poised to make huge progress this year, but we can't do it without you. So this Giving Tuesday, will you step up and make your first tax-deductible donation to Evergreen Collaborative and help put our hard-won climate investments to work?**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4384?t=5&akid=13126%2E53494%2EgzKRrZ)
[CHIP IN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4384?t=6&akid=13126%2E53494%2EgzKRrZ)
---
-Team Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13126%2E53494%2EgzKRrZ). | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
---

subject: Georgians are heading to the polls

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55300483/381266423/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_EOM_AC_20221129_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg0MDYxMS00NjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oR_xeRwUhm2XPInYBlpd-I8vYJyhlDHvpJ0eJ0uqpmM=&emci=3f7d40d3-2e70-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=1c840611-4670-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=252045)

I'm fired up! Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.** **That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal. **[So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Martin Heinrich’s campaign to help us hit our end-of-month goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55300484/381266424/80330231?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_EOM_AC_20221129_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg0MDYxMS00NjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oR_xeRwUhm2XPInYBlpd-I8vYJyhlDHvpJ0eJ0uqpmM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Raphael Warnock and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55300485/381266425/80330231?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_EOM_AC_20221129_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg0MDYxMS00NjcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oR_xeRwUhm2XPInYBlpd-I8vYJyhlDHvpJ0eJ0uqpmM=)

body:
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=964697049ae3409199b031c2673d7dc3&_e=2nW0aPZwAIJyZ_M1yRxeXH6VgoH5a-Qu6KDR4z4ZK8uNTDVWyP1vlc7h73vSgACk-f_6QULjKr34V2sSQBDiCQt8sXtr9GeW31tTBnhlg4fO0Nbw7jIvDjkIoi5NIeYU-DOqvmK4EAW43NoOD71vPo_SLeVG-QyRRMcWrvFitNvidoD3kUfloBAYbBTh5MIMg1bEvFeakxS3LYfcvvDDRva1lZBexBnuwhrllCgoABpxS_Kf2Tb8udctkJ2TwpDO8Y5RusSZ6PttmAYbsVG5YBOlAhtipUW2j0iORMsAI0vjZURQo-NZMkC9MYU63Hg3a8QGCuK03Hf-RqzxV5f537mL0Am14FBucbNYT6BY7SHy3slmmqu0FqpnTTf31Cz8o6hSewJPqVABvKMFyFOSE8Dra8yhrUVy2ib92w0KMAsYwg-LGodiSG67QkElBJ8KwW6K3dXrpRRD1DLyP8wLNtVDnoZMAx5zw1nde_MWq_DxYNWZUMISIio-4bnXNofihQdWpwiYftRiTEyDlMkvNzLeABHidbxx7m0Vdap_0aU%3D)

Volunteers across Arizona are making sure that our voice is heard and our ballots are counted, but the fact is many Republican ballots may be invalid.

I'm asking for your immediate help.
