name: Tiara Parker, Pride Fund
subject: I Was Shot & Survived A Mass Shooting. Let's Fight For Gun Safety Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter,

Today is Giving Tuesday, the biggest donation day of the year for organizations like Pride Fund. I was shot in a mass shooting and survived and I have been fighting for changes to our gun laws ever since. Please read this email and hear my story and why this is important. A little over six years ago, I was celebrating at Pulse Nightclub — my little cousin Akyra had just graduated from high school and about to attend college. But that night, our celebration turned into a nightmare when Akyra, 20 strangers, and I got as close as possible in a tiny bathroom stall and prayed that our lives would not be taken. Pulse was an LGBTQ night club that was targeted by a man filled with hate and armed with an assault rifle and a large amount of ammunition. That night, 49 people were killed and 53 others were wounded, and countless others were permanently scarred from being a part of the tragedy.

I hope on this Giving Tuesday you will consider donating to Pride Fund. The Pride Fund is the only LGBTQ political organization solely focused on enacting gun policy reforms to ensure safety for all. A generous donor has agreed to MATCH your donation, DOUBLING your impact. Click here to make a donation. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-givingtuesday22?refcode=2000&amount=25&recurring=yes

I was shot, not only in my side, but I also sustained a grazed hip, burned back, and injuries to my right arm and legs. I was lucky — not everyone was fortunate enough to live. My cousin, Akyra Murray, was shot and murdered in the second deadliest mass shooting in American history.

That’s why I joined Pride Fund to End Gun Violence as a member of the Board of Advisors. Everyone can make a difference, and I’ve chosen to take my anger, my frustration, my pain and dedicate it to changing our country’s inadequate gun laws through political advocacy. I’m asking you to make a donation to Pride Fund. Can you pitch in $49, or whatever you can for #GivingTuesday, to honor the 49 victims at Pulse, including my cousin Akyra, as well as the 5 LGBTQ victims in Colorado Springs, and the victims of gun violence everywhere? DONATE HERE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-givingtuesday22?refcode=2000&amount=25&recurring=yes

On November 20th, another man filled with hate combined with an assault rifle conducted a mass shooting at another LGBTQ night club, killing five people and injuring 25 others. The death toll would have been much greater if a heroic former soldier in the Army and a drag queen had not attacked the shooter and took him down.

Gun violence is a plague affecting our nation and everyone is at risk. Mass shootings happen everywhere - LGBTQ nightclubs, churches, schools, shopping centers, movie theaters, parks, public events, workplaces. It has to stop. We must continue changing our gun laws at the state and federal level. That is why Pride Fund to End Gun Violence is so critical. Our organization is doing the work to move gun reform in the right direction to restrict access to assault weapons and large capacity magazines, to enact safe storage laws so guns aren't left in the open for children to access and hurt themselves or others, to enact "red flag" laws across the country so family and friends can report someone that is potentially dangerous and needs evaluation and their guns be temporarily taken until the person is deemed not a threat, and the list goes on and on of what we are fighting for to make communities everywhere more safe. We advocate and push for these types of laws, but most importantly we are very active in the election process to ensure gun reform advocates win their elections and that NRA backed Republicans lose. That increases the chances of laws passing with stronger Democratic majorities.

I hope you’ll join me in my fight to help change our nation’s gun laws by donating whatever you can this #GivingTuesday, in honor of all the gun violence victims taken too early and giving Pride Fund the resources it needs in our mission to change our gun laws and save lives. Your donation will be MATCHED by a generous donor. Please donate today by clicking here. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-givingtuesday22?refcode=2000&amount=25&recurring=yes

Tiara Parker

Pride Fund to End Gun Violence

Board of Advisors

DONATE- https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-givingtuesday22?refcode=tiara&amount=25&recurring=yes

To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved?

Not subscribed to Pride Fund's emails? Sign up here. https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-7357247923588756736

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Copyright © 2016 Pride Fund to End Gun Violence, All rights reserved. |
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/gFzPAHkmogGNebNIT0R0TrSpHfdLGLaFHx76_uu3tj0=/6mXJyzqJXwbnLhyKx5HQqfTNcKFEUzlCZnukC2RcZ2s=.

Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
PO Box 32377
Washington DC 20007 United States

BUT IF 1,000 PA Democrats chip in before tomorrow’s final end-of-month deadline, we can boost Democrats like Sen. Warnock to victory and EXPAND our Senate majority! clean_body: Raphael Warnock raised over $50 million in fewer than 30 days, outraising us by millions. | It just happened again, Friend. Raphael Warnock raised over $52 million in fewer than 30 days, outraising us by millions. That's nearly TWO MILLION DOLLARS PER DAY! Friend, we don't need to raise $52 million between now and the runoff election next Tuesday (although it would help). We just need to make sure our message is reaching Georgia voters – especially during this crucial week of early voting. Runoff elections are all about turnout and motivation. Right now, my opponent has a MAJOR cash advantage, and the early voting numbers make it clear this will be another incredibly close race. Please, Friend, help us catch up, fully fund our new ads, and turn out voters across Georgia. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Democratic Party of Georgia
subject: Less than one month

body:
We still have a chance to keep this seat blue.

|
---
| Peter,

We’ve been saying for weeks that the races in Georgia were going to be close, and now Rev. Warnock has officially advanced to a runoff.

We still have a chance to keep this seat blue, but it’s going to take a bunch of hard work and resources.

Unlike the post-2020 runoffs, we've had just under ONE MONTH to reach every single Democrat in Georgia and make sure they turn out to vote again.

[_**The only way we’re going to win is if grassroots supporters like you pitch in whatever you’re able to so we can start things off on the right track. Will you rush a donation split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and Fight for Progress so we can continue fueling our voter outreach program?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55285634/381203621/748748839?refcode=BLU-FFP-20221129-EM-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YmIwNjZiLTFjNzAtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_iC4V8Uj3yOpkt4PClT6E8LxYhCQ74pX8r28Wg2TVH0=)

This is our last chance to expand our critical Senate majority, and we can’t do it without YOUR help.

[_**Rush a donation NOW!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55285635/381203622/748748839?refcode=BLU-FFP-20221129-EM-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YmIwNjZiLTFjNzAtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_iC4V8Uj3yOpkt4PClT6E8LxYhCQ74pX8r28Wg2TVH0=)

**The race for 2024 to take back the House and prevent Donald Trump from EVER setting foot in the White House again begins RIGHT NOW.

clean_body: Team, with Election Day behind us, we ended up holding our majority in the Senate, but Republicans will hold a slim majority in the House come January. What this means is simple...| | | = | | Friend, with Election Day behind us, we ended up holding our majority in the Senate, but Republicans will hold a slim majority in the House come January. What this means is simple... The race for 2024 to take back the House and prevent Donald Trump from EVER setting foot in the White House again begins RIGHT NOW. It will only take flipping a few seats in 2024 to regain our Democratic House majority, but to do it, we will need your help. = | | Brendan is already working with his colleagues and potential 2024 candidates in swing districts to make sure we regain our Democratic majority next election. But we need to work together on this to succeed. Tomorrow is our first post-election deadline, and we need to show that we're ready to fight. If we want to ensure Kevin McCarthy's time as Speaker is as short as possible, we need to start working now. Will you stand with Brendan and our team as we begin laying the groundwork for a blue wave in 2024? = Thanks for standing with us. Team Boyle | | ---|--- | | Paid for by Citizens for Boyle. Citizens for Boyle P.O. Box 14310 Philadelphia, PA 19115 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | |

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
Voting is underway in our critical runoff Senate race.
#
It’s official: voting is underway in our critical runoff Senate race.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you contribute $3 right now to my campaign to keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221129-1-t3&t=1&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million — and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.
**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win — but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks — but we're falling short, and I need your help.**
[**Please, will you make a $3 donation to my campaign right now so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221129-1-t3&t=2&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=mandela-em-warnock.s7exWr&refcode=em221129-1-t3&t=21&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=mandela-em-warnock.jHthYk&refcode=em221129-1-t3&t=22&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=mandela-em-warnock.KagZuK&refcode=em221129-1-t3&t=23&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=mandela-em-warnock.lt3jYp&refcode=em221129-1-t3&t=24&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=mandela-em-warnock._AE7VY&refcode=em221129-1-t3&t=25&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221129-1-t3&t=26&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
Thank you for all that you do.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
Mandela is counting on people like you to fund this campaign. [**Make a contribution to stand with Mandela today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandela-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=4097_196590_WRnKFR&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR)
Be sure to [**visit our campaign store**](https://store.mandelabarnes.com/?t=31&akid=4097%2E196590%2EWRnKFR) to check out all of the latest Mandela merchandise.
To receive important updates from our campaign, text JOIN to 99749 or [**if you're on a mobile device, follow this link to opt in to text updates.**](https://mandela.afy.ai/GaB1F)
[](https://mandela.afy.ai/GaB1F)
By providing your cell phone number you consent to receive recurring text message updates from Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin, including by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Message and data rates may apply. [Privacy Policy](https://mandelabarnes.com/privacy-policy) and [Terms of Service](https://mandelabarnes.com/terms-of-service).

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Rural America was overlooked by Dems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
We were the secret weapon to surprising midterm victories | | | Hi Peter – By all accounts, Democrats had a surprisingly successful midterm election season. **We defeated the odds, holding onto the Senate and expanding our majorities in state legislatures.** We prevented right-wing GOP candidates from taking over districts, and we organized Democratic voters like never before. **Rural voters were the secret weapon to these surprising midterm victories, especially in states like North Carolina, Virginia, and Pennsylvania.** We supported candidates like John Fetterman, Abigail Spanberger, and Wiley Nickel. In addition to helping dozens of federal campaigns, we also supported state and local Democrats, many of whom won their races by just a few votes. **The truth is, Republicans**** _and_****Democrats have consistently overlooked rural Americans,** despite our ability to influence hundreds of seats across the country. Our organization set out to turn that tide around and engage rural Democrats across the country. **We succeeded, activating volunteers to engage with thousands of rural voters across the country.** We proved that rural voters align deeply with the priorities of the Democratic Party, and we also demonstrated that Democrats can't win without rural communities. **That face won't change anytime soon, which is why we need to continue fighting to make sure rural communities are prioritized on the campaign trail and in government. You can help fund our efforts to build power in rural America by chipping in what you can[here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gcw23uaYZ2g0y--ecIhNf9s1QoZbVo9gOgL71QJSKWe5NnhKlgRjpWuk4jHXPD9h373AJ0qOyKyM3uKVtM8jP-Uvpo1M1aT6MNOD1OkV4_Fgd8PWqKSshsiMuMaECUUg55XnYO1CQWgK8zUMTfs0zttKx4HdBpHfjnU8zJ3FcKP8PKW1468kVEiksiFO7a-ElzmL0m-lpYLQ0_VIGitDja97ZaeIyw9iM462dmdW4SUNCgqDMEIg9TXhO_cPY4K2s2dIBFSyFaug7VKWQnvdVgJbe3gsZqryXXBB7ikKd9Dk6rH7kwsWpkvrELBrghi0K-HgoNCiZ31HXp1xRuIHCGyA/3rk/hfDPRg2LSHqxYHDH1W7fVQ/h0/XBHjUCg9v_T8rY8UVNxmUA7M36Zg3EcGiQcbiG2tr0E). ** **[CHIP IN NOW********](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gcw23uaYZ2g0y--ecIhNf9s1QoZbVo9gOgL71QJSKWe5OFpSqd_uQMfsl8GUzYLD4mvf8X0eGw39Jwna1ZdNb6LvwJE78dkLFXJg7HUUTrHFx1tg4IDi52zLRw8eRD7jFNGM9XZOmoSb78fzQLFAWM2Ng2lpL9qcoQMBkCqZFZP-icdi6AsrMfqrE3oVJgwOTWAm3oEYzRKU78hOlrVkHssj189hjyRZrWopQvQ3WKmHXDRUpMLWn8RKXwRCSK13Di4c61uNHf6sMtRZhDzN9Wx0_6ScnDswbgylG_9IO4BZrG5a8BEuWzKNksUZYmQ4qoWJsTDSIIlya0enlbtDvKMA/3rk/hfDPRg2LSHqxYHDH1W7fVQ/h1/p6iL8mn4PiEiM8sW2EOSWHP4A7apOA57A-3m2-dskiU)** Thank you for contributing to our organization, and we look forward to your support as we build a Democratic movement in rural America. – United Rural Democrats
---

United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. **Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: asking you personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support
| | |
---
Friend, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $3 or more right now between me and Maggie Hassan to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55287365/381211528/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2125-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTI4NGM3Ny0yMDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YD1HeuwDBit67elmqlnaIMWy2Y8wvzOMU-vy6p-tCZU=)**
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**

**[Please, friend, will you split a donation of $3 or more now between me and Maggie Hassan so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55287366/381211530/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2125-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTI4NGM3Ny0yMDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YD1HeuwDBit67elmqlnaIMWy2Y8wvzOMU-vy6p-tCZU=)**

clean_body: With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support | | | Friend, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking:= GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Raphael Warnock and Maggie Hassan and will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do. – Rev. subject: We MUST protect Justice Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, this is embarrassing.

How is it that the Left can get over **ONE MILLION** signatures to impeach Clarence Thomas, but State GOP's **_[pledge to DEFEND Justice Thomas](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989971:6CBMguGNO:m:1:3350876382:FD4CF9D4488BBAABCF13F8FE176C7D25:r "pledge to DEFEND Justice Thomas")_** is **STILL** short by over 100,000 signatures!?

---
Peter, please **_[sign the pledge](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989971:6CBMguGNO:m:1:3350876382:FD4CF9D4488BBAABCF13F8FE176C7D25:r "sign the pledge")_** and forward this email to three of your fellow patriots. We **MUST** protect Justice Thomas! **_[Sign NOW:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989971:6CBMguGNO:m:1:3350876382:FD4CF9D4488BBAABCF13F8FE176C7D25:r "Sign NOW:")_**

Subject: He defends your rights. Will you defend him?

Peter, Justice Thomas is under threat.

body:
To help us catch up to our goal before midnight on Wednesday, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. | | |
---
| | Hi – we hate to be the bearer of bad news, but our team is running dangerously short of our November fundraising goal – and the consequences could spell disaster for state Democrats if we don’t get back on track ASAP. To help us catch up to our goal before midnight tomorrow, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. **Can you take a look at what we have on record for you?** | **Name** | **Email** | **Status** | **Suggested Gift**
---|---|---|---
Janet M. | – | Contributed | N/A

Mark C. | – | Contributed | N/A
If everyone who received this email chipped in $7, we wouldn’t need to send another email for this entire month. But that isn’t how this works – not even close.
**However, if just 7 more committed Democrats in your area rush a donation before our deadline tomorrow, it should be enough to put our fundraising back on track.**
[Can you chip in an urgent $7 ($21 impact!) gift right now to help our team close the gap? Every dollar will be put to work helping elect state Democrats across the country.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wAg9gBPS4rAJB5A4gY_FK-AYic2eIvl6chyi6ybjW5VBMt8SrQUIcCkCaf3R0xHNwcC3JWv6-B732yy5uZQj7bZprvsWaFMSEo31TnVYKRtJz9MGImsc_Xf5Iljubo2dpTssUX2H9aLdE8bOQ6BmVrUieLYP4UT3dbjdUIJU4bGTBlTgCg3UjP8GPrKgE21CCjWE7M0uMV0T_U24P04IOjgW5HnvzaoSHaWJSzBDCXy1WYndTJpuYnwvv4CDyyEJlFxlA03Um8rVyomD0JPBvQWIs3_DvboLuo-qZbMcj432la351zgGKwC-rnQ_185Yrc3krmDIg_AvGq8PgS-XiXYKjC_H6P2BNlLpU6qIWELYQm-xNj3si7NAAV19WVCIacx7JgHU9U9UFVOvRv5fMnsxQQsf_rQ0Ka-CxddkOB8dkiqOnocL3jUZ8LyoN2oHyJxzwqzAW-AFic3iob1k0_v7LsiMDjZLfVkdB1juCAAq7mUag-e08JmnM0ZZ3-9nK4fYAL_ZDXawUPtU7T6z8L/3rk/7ZPCYGx3RjaNVvjcLCDGRA/h1/E12_kuviGQSogpF4XZjAbdlXj_6NY6oaRlOE6GKH1B8)
We can’t afford to fall behind on our fundraising right now – here’s why:
* Trump announced his 2024 presidential campaign – he’s going to be dead-set on building power at the state level, so we can’t risk losing _any_ ground.
* We had some MASSIVE wins in the midterm elections – flipping chambers in Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Minnesota, so state Republicans are sure to be laser-focused on pick-up opportunities in special elections and Virginia next fall.
* We need to keep the powerful grassroots momentum we’ve built to elect state Democrats now, in 2023, and beyond.

Each of these fights is too important to sit out – and your support is the key that makes it possible to give it our all on every front. That’s why I have to ask one more time:
[Be one of the 7 Democrats we need in your area to fight back and power this movement: Rush a $7 donation to help us elect Democrats to statehouses across the country and it’ll be triple-matched until midnight tomorrow >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wAg9gBPS4rAJB5A4gY_FK-AYic2eIvl6chyi6ybjW5VBMt8SrQUIcCkCaf3R0xHNwcC3JWv6-B732yy5uZQj7bZprvsWaFMSEo31TnVYKRtJz9MGImsc_Xf5Iljubo2dpTssUX2H9aLdE8bOQ6BmVrUieLYP4UT3dbjdUIJU4bGa2GYdT1LCh2RHdS4P80L0ZzOMmSwgRpPZds2mIZ6C6gmxlhgwo5aOL7hBr2wRfCm6AbNea--illxVSkh5hG14FEg1gSSFVOhIwrcF5faaqqoUJEo8ia-mVaY4PCXIioWvq1PfVDVpruHDWIRxCauWol2cCkocLgMI-5NHG7T6LpEdzxqr5o7NaVt5oHijN10fc2UDCZq0Mu-nnqnxihx3cHpTWXti07LZmeLJmx4i26Z1a-uy1t1v_fbh7Xp7wC0mXs-3MYUQkWeBVM36Edl3u4gP0rOmysVWnPd1g9MUSYGcq3kMYAZ6OWH_tMR_OUeAB2ULPDRlYZ9ku9I4uAKpW2izU-ThLUZMa95e8QdO-U/3rk/7ZPCYGx3RjaNVvjcLCDGRA/h2/ttzOFUuH-dWd_zFGSADz1LlPOCmQzXIcGKu3UYnYFoQ)

clean_body: To help us catch up to our goal before midnight on Wednesday, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. | | | | | Hi – we hate to be the bearer of bad news, but our team is running dangerously short of our November fundraising goal – and the consequences could spell disaster for state Democrats if we don’t get back on track ASAP. To help us catch up to our goal before midnight tomorrow, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. Can you take a look at what we have on record for you? | Name | Email | Status | Suggested Gift ---|---|---|--- Janet M. | – | Contributed | N/A On File | | PENDING | $7 Deborah T. | – | Contributed | N/A Mark C. | – | Contributed | N/A If everyone who received this email chipped in $7, we wouldn’t need to send another email for this entire month. But that isn’t how this works – not even close. However, if just 7 more committed Democrats in your area rush a donation before our deadline tomorrow, it should be enough to put our fundraising back on track. We can’t afford to fall behind on our fundraising right now – here’s why: Trump announced his 2024 presidential campaign – he’s going to be dead-set on building power at the state level, so we can’t risk losing any ground. We had some MASSIVE wins in the midterm elections – flipping chambers in Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Minnesota, so state Republicans are sure to be laser-focused on pick-up opportunities in special elections and Virginia next fall. We need to keep the powerful grassroots momentum we’ve built to elect state Democrats now, in 2023, and beyond. Each of these fights is too important to sit out – and your support is the key that makes it possible to give it our all on every front. That’s why I have to ask one more time: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks, Team DLCC ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a9e3df0a55f4aadbc44b84e893a82ce&_e=VDqmKn2pXZNxNUGEGYtRCt8Jks_ruOAdUSmBdWnbdqy0mKAyQZ5SRv1xSzCd8lFMIDeMMwgM0HN_cQJg463Ppu1xFRUXJgKrz-P3cRLaS_cYWZHO3QqDVXe0TvAL3r0gY68BG1Ic7xaLlR0sSOkcZp1qhoqxF0gYeDsU7sKD1pMa6Fg5n7FmD1m0fHPmDKwMQiuOt0LzUq43Zux5J-9XDVppqwbLt5wUTFrL9cgzjNmHZmAz7VUj4Rl1zfBgAH1rCImxkQ18QV19KiLXH3Jb3s9ogHB7qc7Y0-wqN0i46Yf_rtI8WEmWBtmyg4A1vMw5)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a9e3df0a55f4aadbc44b84e893a82ce&_e=VDqmKn2pXZNxNUGEGYtRCt8Jks_ruOAdUSmBdWnbdqy0mKAyQZ5SRv1xSzCd8lFMIDeMMwgM0HN_cQJg463Ppu1xFRUXJgKrz-P3cRLaS_cYWZHO3QqDVXe0TvAL3r0gY68BG1Ic7xaLlR0sSOkcZii9kJ9YWxNWhEeu462NtwEL6TfKYiyjQH_qFfqEzN2lshi_U2VeCs7_Z7fHrqsbQf8KBdBnpHqSUgYrxGsKTPzCjVgekgZdOSnVya6p3KGV4cuacjnBcUmkC1NYyy_JwuZiX3kguuIAuSfQt646qMCrlVSPoY7moxjp55fFzZkc)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a9e3df0a55f4aadbc44b84e893a82ce&_e=VDqmKn2pXZNxNUGEGYtRCt8Jks_ruOAdUSmBdWnbdqy0mKAyQZ5SRv1xSzCd8lFMIDeMMwgM0HN_cQJg463Ppu1xFRUXJgKrz-P3cRLaS_cYWZHO3QqDVXe0TvAL3r0gY68BG1Ic7xaLlR0sSOkcZgww8OOQLOH3Ih2J-ca69m3uBX3mjd65_ajuqdr4LVZKzCrYUnXM0Us6lHgQpF5SCQ0Df_Efhrlt-KxbeaC6KORlCB_Pbdx2Eha-bJAs8lXtMBb-QMEhdAdEHIMJtN9T4tV6mcHtseNSf93O_tj847f9Vy0EfQ_StZzG1pbLzvT6)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a9e3df0a55f4aadbc44b84e893a82ce&_e=VDqmKn2pXZNxNUGEGYtRCt8Jks_ruOAdUSmBdWnbdqy0mKAyQZ5SRv1xSzCd8lFMIDeMMwgM0HN_cQJg463Ppu1xFRUXJgKrz-P3cRLaS_cYWZHO3QqDVXe0TvAL3r0gY68BG1Ic7xaLlR0sSOkcZihHYZzHq_Bkgr7QOeeCynVzlP4x8runik84Co5K3ppeps5DnSADOl5s3YkeHWWVdNmWpq48igfpUf2QoaMwbNupurre0RKkMJq9f495jqP5aQDJ7g0LSgof8lGLIGeVr7xcX4jhoS-oiqzug_5t_mT_M2NrSRdeddc_EZb89mCa)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a9e3df0a55f4aadbc44b84e893a82ce&_e=VDqmKn2pXZNxNUGEGYtRCt8Jks_ruOAdUSmBdWnbdqy0mKAyQZ5SRv1xSzCd8lFMIDeMMwgM0HN_cQJg463Ppu1xFRUXJgKrz-P3cRLaS_cYWZHO3QqDVXe0TvAL3r0gY68BG1Ic7xaLlR0sSOkcZqoy7ioXzDAq0pFEJ1jYMsHKxGKZhrhWQgsF-3q16100CWwcpuhAihpmaE1_1EuipOTSzHDSKrSG6RVDsQhy8Ab90-ZgivSka8wXuZUywiNzmFGjGiJZfNpVnK-RBB9gupRd8uMsb_4pXmm6Y4tUc7pSr1MHk8TZMYUuA7gK9R4z)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... clean_body: Raphael Warnock raised over $50 million in fewer than 30 days, outraising us by millions. | It just happened again, Peter. Raphael Warnock raised over $52 million in fewer than 30 days, outraising us by millions. That's nearly TWO MILLION DOLLARS PER DAY! Peter, we don't need to raise $52 million between now and the runoff election next Tuesday (although it would help). We just need to make sure our message is reaching Georgia voters - especially during this crucial week of early voting. Runoff elections are all about turnout and motivation. Right now, my opponent has a MAJOR cash advantage, and the early voting numbers make it clear this will be another incredibly close race. Please, Peter, help us catch up, fully fund our new ads, and turn out voters across Georgia. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (via Democrats.org)
subject: Will you split a $10​ donation between my campaign and the DNC ahead of tomorrow’s fundraising deadline and next week’s runoff election?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
With my runoff election just seven days away -- and our end-of-month deadline tomorrow -- our work to expand our Senate majority hangs in the balance. | |
---
Derek, I'm no political insider or career politician. I'm the son of a Georgia preacher who's committed my life to service. I'm ready to keep up our critical fights for justice in Washington, from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom -- but I can't do it alone.
With my runoff election just seven days away -- and our end-of-month deadline tomorrow -- our work to expand our Senate majority hangs in the balance. Mitch McConnell and his extreme Republican allies are turning all of their efforts and money toward this election. It’s going to be tough, but I know this team can get the job done. **Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC ahead of tomorrow’s fundraising deadline and next week’s runoff election?**

clean_body: With my runoff election just seven days away -- and our end-of-month deadline tomorrow -- our work to expand our Senate majority hangs in the balance. | | Derek, I'm no political insider or career politician. I'm the son of a Georgia preacher who's committed my life to service. I'm ready to keep up our critical fights for justice in Washington, from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom -- but I can't do it alone. With my runoff election just seven days away -- and our end-of-month deadline tomorrow -- our work to expand our Senate majority hangs in the balance. Mitch McConnell and his extreme Republican allies are turning all of their efforts and money toward this election. It’s going to be tough, but I know this team can get the job done. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC ahead of tomorrow’s fundraising deadline and next week’s runoff election? Since we launched this campaign, the GOP and outside groups have been pouring money into attack ads to oppose our people-powered movement. It’s no surprise; last year’s runoff elections were some of the most expensive Senate races in history. But the GOP is willing to spend whatever it takes to defeat me and prevent Democrats from expanding the Senate majority, so I’m a little worried. This runoff election is going to be close and our critical fight for justice isn’t over. I'm once again counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this movement to victory: Thank you for your support and everything you do. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Pramila's iPhone
subject: It all comes down to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter,

From the moment I first launched my campaign for Congress in 2016, I have
never wavered in my belief in our grassroots movement. And I know what
else I believe in: outsized spending and dark money should not buy our
elections.

I don’t believe that our politics and policies should be bought, so I
won’t be either. I have never accepted a single cent from corporate PACs
or dark money groups, and I never will. And I know that it only makes our
movement stronger, because people power wins.

Just look at the incredible cohort of progressives I was proud to endorse
this cycle — Maxwell Frost, Greg Casar, Summer Lee, Delia Ramirez, and
many more — who will join me in the ranks of the Progressive Caucus as we
fight every day on your behalf.

I say this because I want to remind you that what we do now matters. In a
couple short months, our new session of Congress will begin, with
Republican control of the House, but also with more progressives than ever
before.

This time of the year can be challenging for campaigns, when we take stock
of our resources and make sure we reach all of our goals for the year —
all while fundraising declines and many of us log off for the holidays.

I’m writing to you now because I wanted to personally make a request. My
team has set a goal for us to reach $50,000 by midnight tomorrow, as we
close the books on November 2022.

I am not here to guilt trip you. There is no imaginary donor who will
triple match your donation, and the sky is not falling. Just you and me,
and my sincere hope that you will recognize the importance of this moment.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23838?refcode=em20221129-1898&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1898%2E420207%2E3zEvyH ]If you are in a position to make a contribution today, I would
appreciate it greatly. Please know that your support always makes a
difference for us.

At the end of the day, every election I’ve won, every fundraising goal
I’ve hit, every milestone I’ve worked with our Progressive Caucus to
achieve — it all comes down to you.

Thank you for your steadfast support.

Pramila

(Sent from my iPhone)

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221129-1898-footer&t=1002&refcode2=1898_420207_3zEvyH&akid=1898%2E420207%2E3zEvyH

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1898%2E420207%2E3zEvyH

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Let’s make some change in Texas!
body:
Celia Israel for Austin
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1119ce17-56ed-4ff6-b0f9-228b3e968494/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **[_Let's make some change in Texas! Rush $5, $10, or $25, to progressive candidate, Celia Israel in the Austin mayoral runoff._](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8696820a-5351-469e-bb05-050097194e4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** On December 13th there will be runoff in Austin, Texas, the 11th largest city in the country, a few thousand people shy of a population of 1 million. On election night--November 8th--State Rep. Celia Israel led State Senator Kirk Watson by 15,000 votes, 121,862 to 106,508, even though Watson had outspent Israel by more than 2:1. But nobody reached the magical 50% threshold, so just like in the Georgia Senate race, there will be a runoff, just a week later. There is no bad guy in this race. Kirk Watson served admirably as a then-young, Austin Mayor 1997-2001, ran for Attorney General and came up short, and then successfully served as a state senator, before trying to win his old job back. He is the kind of experienced, liberal politician you wanna see stay involved as an advisor, but, like in Washington, it is time for new blood in Austin. Celia Israel has not only been an outstanding state representative, but she is Latina and a lesbian, which would be a first for Austin, and just the kind of barrier we need to keep knocking down until there are none left standing in our way. We need different perspectives in our higher offices, and as one of the power centers in Texas, failing right-wing Republicanism in the state executive offices and running the state legislature, Austin will be a Democratic power center over the next few years in Texas.
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Celia Israel for Austin Mayor!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T067ead76-d798-40d0-bd41-c7cb4a883e89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | It is not healthy to choose our leaders by who can raise and spend the most money in a democracy, an advantage Watson surely enjoys from having been on the scene longer, not to mention the Chair of the Austin City Chamber of Commerce. **[So in the name making history, diversity of background and experience, grassroots campaigns not decided by big checks and getting the right fighter in what will be one of the top offices Democrats hold in Texas, can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Celia Israel in her race to become the next Mayor of Austin?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1476fb89-e07a-4ce9-aca2-25b110e65225/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks so much, Team Blue Amp.
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**Celia Israel for Austin**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbce604de-2c22-405b-bfbc-7d83911c6905/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e0107e4-7f02-4233-b9ef-cb8abaacb7dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=28f0d5c4cf404e2d89c41452e8d081b7&_e=eqzpUGF1F8KIXZfGG6mFNphPT51I_UKAXPOMzpcDXayITOtojXigYcfmn__AxT4kT8oC64wPTtJlJgK-GfQjolg5OOIsX6UZAoohJZluSW4GTbLaku4SxF04OajbhCGMHxyQio1TRCMSZBo2blncZu7w7OkE3Rq21z3Nwb9gEKoSm-roTyi8_LO9rypXkY6thIcpG_tst6aTZJU9-eqdelr1wm82vU1Hetu1d4Lz0gVgLfTIHxcPg2WROOohPge_od71gkILgamr5Y7dqN-yoziPIi86KRhEOWXRpOLzo5c%3D)

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=28f0d5c4cf404e2d89c41452e8d081b7&_e=eqzpUGF1F8KIXZfGG6mFNphPT51I_UKAXPOMzpcDXayITOtojXigYcfmn__AxT4kT8oC64wPTtJlJgK-GfQjolg5OOIsX6UZAoohJZluSW4GTbLaku4SxF04OajbhCGMHxyQio1TRCMSZBo2blncZoM-TfpSV7m7jfnNKXS0-byT_wvHWfhRUJMbVropFuCKweE56H56IWzkvg-M3_He5_EVbQHrjFRUYMxyy9cbo9Jo6SnyxYjcqXdxtEneJCdN8o-uj3LTXlqVBjfbnx4g__99aqBA8nfEWRHqz9-A66g%3D)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. name: Candace Owens
subject: I am asking you to support our mission 🙏
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988976:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988976:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988976:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988976:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988976:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988976:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of $25, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988976:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988977:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988978:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988979:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988980:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988981:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988982:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988983:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988984:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988976:65LnjlGgN:m:1:3374012347:D1B667BC29F26F9B180F10752F8A5DB5:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: re: Giving Tuesday 2022 👉
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988672:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988672:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988672:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988673:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988673:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988674:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988675:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988676:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988677:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988672:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988672:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988672:JgWjNlGgN:m:1:3369487795:C3398057ED3BB697633F122484710ADE:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America is a nonprofit 501(c)(4) membership organization. With your gift of $25 or more you will become a Sustaining Member of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, and will receive information regarding the special benefits of your annual membership. Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of Susan B. Although Susan B. disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFQIzSqBtPLJyFcDxkf8ctYq__wnUIW5ki97Ka5mWXv7gp7t2s-w8TULaGxv_bERNmjcnTobCBnB7aGnwjReWI7I5WzeqCxoiip6bFydvfp6QYNhNp22vpvzDauHvv0K0qOXU7ssdLFrwXc9gax_vY7uWQqCgjd7uhbH9Dea94YyUaP1G6RMeUZ0vpEqwieBsFv3j6sodFg64sq-0uY2Xzs-Ug7cBldtW2YSaOIgluoW6RhgO5zLjm4Gs0tTCCd4BeZUWvIHwZ5trrDC0wvqnAOqBA1zF8wtdbT5neEwFo5D/3rk/iLZ0NKbXQLC-I9mwKdF3sA/h0/EOtBMxqHF9JoB6wXzP6xxe7-zDyq2ylk1EpyEUX0rPk)

Hey Peter, I hope you enjoyed your Thanksgiving holiday. I spent some time reflecting on how thankful I am to be able to serve the people of Illinois’ 17th District in Congress. I’m reaching out today because my first end-of-month fundraising deadline as a Congressman-elect is coming up tomorrow. Here are a few reasons why it’s important:
* **Our campaign had to spend nearly all of the money we raised to win this seat.** Thanks to impressive grassroots contributions from supporters like you, we were able to prevail. Now is the time to start building a base of resources for our re-election campaign.

* **The Republicans are going to keep trying to flip this seat.** With all the money they funneled to my 2022 opponent’s campaign, dark money GOP super PACs are showing no signs of letting up. And now that they have the House majority, they’ll look to expand it in 2024 by flipping IL-17. We can’t let them do that.

* **Early resources will be critical for us to fend off potential challengers.** The earlier we build a strong foundation of grassroots fundraising, the better. I have no doubt that another far-right candidate will announce a run against me before too long, and a strong showing for this first deadline will be a great first step toward fending off whoever the Republicans throw at us.

**[With all of that in mind, will you chip in $5or more before tomorrow’s deadline and help us meet our goal of raising $15,000 by the end of November?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzH1mfhdCQ03sQUZHOixn1upxDjg9fASf--b5zOyVnWjeOdcHqB4L6uFAxGFgEzTbuoqjX8g5tZHngLuSTH97tIsrfD4yWdBsHhnYeUINUDNNpT4Zxoo3XAaW6gs5awGiU9j8ObYDSr3MrVgXuenByu_7nsv0b7imgi4yqsxFLcMYs7pSqqHLk3mkatpODm1gKBHSF1fOLVkpXV5wXoEk1pDO9O-jJPNwYzhrSvBlKwzzegOrYPfcVr8zfO1OAf7NmMQLdsd2pUc8St4LemZXWxkRQiH61UVDQM2ov4HhOfPFdxS3LTkvviQi9Ahs2VJN0WtatDyAp2JmfjdhylJqK8o/3rk/iLZ0NKbXQLC-I9mwKdF3sA/h1/ye8yyZehflycT8CNS6e5lcs9pIqOL4nApLIr95tn80c)**

You know what, Derek? Herschel Walker has said some pretty wild stuff. But we were really shocked when we heard this one:
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zNra5tIr9qXBOFThEXgvzdv_svxipCOTgNSP6SjFonH2n9k5jMOX1yzDD9_psIARomr_XWwdhXGvOzsIyJCyGJDZaHSY6BulSTfworTyggANrFVBIFZQL4MGaB1kiNlgHrt31FIN_Q_VnEZlHSUROyRnCD9TVpm4jgCKCvaOrZbrrSuomAwyZMAzFh3iZYvyiE8XII0AS4ugvO3QpAusfb-5Q4PU1tsaGn-ewc8TvYCFkss0c7hnQVR0tyG91e-Zv13G1yViMCDOc3CEGZ6yz8A9zZSl3ROmEGzS53lkZ1pwL9rbGYb-t2NoRwBar2OHCrh4UDi7oIwxp-WCBssQ6a7WC2LcxHRIu23BkHF8WxJLc5yVOdF-I1uoOGWX0wYtw5Ks6CLZwDTjiQeqOy3uA5DqwQzz_furog3EPvVvLDR5LGaJpxeiiQ9XIcqWuyH8E/3rk/AsihLEdcSiS_hsT_pbKQZw/h3/oDR2KVpS0lMDff2WjyibogZncrW-QdOTQf9YXr-mOqA)
---
More specifically:
---
**_Christine Dolan: What do you say to those young people who are voting?_** **_Herschel Walker: Well, first of all they don't know that the grass is not greener on the other side. That they think there's somewhere better. If they know somewhere better than the United States of America, then my thing is why don't you go there? Tell me. Let me know who that is because I can tell ya right now there's not. I think our biggest problem is we have not shown our kids that most of the people today earned their right to change America. What I mean by that is that there are people who have died or have given their life up. There is people who have given their life up for this flag. They have given this life up for this national anthem. They have given that their life up for our freedom and this liberties that we have in this country today and we're taking it for granted. Well I don't want that to happen. And I'm not being tough. I'm sayin' if you know a place better, you go there, but you lose your citizenship here in the United States of America. And when you come back here, you come back legally like we should be defending the border._**
---
First of all: _**what?**_ Second of all: Young people do not want to go leave the United States of America. We want to better it. We are working hard to make sure that our country is better than the one we were born into, **because the most patriotic thing people can do is try to improve their country. It's as simple as that.** We here at the Young Democrats of America are working hard to improve our country and to make sure that we are electing leaders who will truly work hard for their constituents and to us that is clearly Senator Raphael Warnock, not Herschel Walker. [Because of that, we are helping pay for housing for Young Dems who are going to help knock doors in Georgia and a potential donor is helping match what we raise. We are doing everything we can to re-elect Senator Warnock for the people of Georgia and the people of America. clean_body: Help us get to our goal by midnight | Hey there- We just wanted to make sure you saw this. We are about to get the phone with Senator Warnock to make calls for his campaign and we would love to tell him that we reached our goal so we can send canvassers down to Georgia. We greatly appreciate anything you can afford right now. \- YDA -\--------- Forwarded message --------- From: The Young Democrats <info@yda.org> Date: November 29, 2022 at 8:45 EDT Subject: FW: 🎵Herschel hates us. Herschel hates us. Herschel HATES us. We don't care 🎵 | You know what, Derek? Herschel Walker has said some pretty wild stuff. But we were really shocked when we heard this one: | More specifically: Christine Dolan: What do you say to those young people who are voting? Herschel Walker: Well, first of all they don't know that the grass is not greener on the other side. That they think there's somewhere better. If they know somewhere better than the United States of America, then my thing is why don't you go there? Tell me. Let me know who that is because I can tell ya right now there's not. I think our biggest problem is we have not shown our kids that most of the people today earned their right to change America. What I mean by that is that there are people who have died or have given their life up. There is people who have given their life up for this flag. They have given this life up for this national anthem. They have given that their life up for our freedom and this liberties that we have in this country today and we're taking it for granted. Well I don't want that to happen. And I'm not being tough. I'm sayin' if you know a place better, you go there, but you lose your citizenship here in the United States of America. And when you come back here, you come back legally like we should be defending the border. First of all: what? Second of all: Young people do not want to go leave the United States of America. We want to better it. We are working hard to make sure that our country is better than the one we were born into, because the most patriotic thing people can do is try to improve their country. It's as simple as that. We here at the Young Democrats of America are working hard to improve our country and to make sure that we are electing leaders who will truly work hard for their constituents and to us that is clearly Senator Raphael Warnock, not Herschel Walker. Do you want to make Herschel Walker incredibly upset while defeating him at the polls? Donate more money to the Young Democrats. We're fall into two groups that he clearly hates the most. Democratically yours, The Young Democrats of America | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. body:
| | | Help us reload for the next cycle | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDtOeNwmpjImtA3FJgkDSPCtjWqmkga1WhZKnIaYgRNiYuI4DGAiRrFzE5VXZi_l1ce4awjxJkZCVnAjBhDUVNqt_CJ-3JR4YltUjYCVEKKWA4lQfH7yWvyTYNQ0IdvcmC-rQ4XD2GOchlmFhZ4NaXMs4v5Ww4XG18i44Vb1oxlX3jHWf7y-6bJ1gUVStdWWb7g29nIHdKgKYCPZ2pp8LSwnCOXD_iPUD3mhojV5GkHg2aUXzKCB8M1exgBRvflTewDcfdnUecO4hFJp3XWgCMJcSejXWGG0XBf9EtkRzU3RWA5NRpCf3HqziJEuQgOcsaLb9qs3V7pzSTOuvt628aLWBiJrvP5NGsqJ5uCj6ZjED0c_sFcMKBVbnxcTWFPM4MzYU2eAurV0t0tJJICBWKBpoWOjZILgYMdjmL_lG0Ads/3rk/QQbobdCLQX-qY2jntJv7aA/h0/wYGMVLqUX9mlGijuplJARDIcV00M1R2JhI1Fr10TUOA)

| Team,

2022 was a good year for our party. We re-elected Mark Kelly and flipped the governor’s office with Governor-elect Katie Hobbs.

**But our fight isn’t over.** We’re currently in a recount for the Arizona Attorney General’s race – a very important statewide office that would make this year even better if we flip it.

We also have room for improvement in 2024. Despite running in completely new districts, we maintained our numbers in the Arizona legislature, keeping Republicans to the thinnest majority possible.

But redistricting favorable to Republicans also saw us lose two Congressional seats – winning them back will be crucial to gaining control of the U.S. House again.

**[Team, we gave it everything we had to win in 2022, and we need to start refilling our coffers. We’re launching a small $2,000 end-of-month goal to kickstart our path to a fully blue Arizona. clean_body: | | | Help us reload for the next cycle | | | Team, 2022 was a good year for our party. We re-elected Mark Kelly and flipped the governor’s office with Governor-elect Katie Hobbs. But our fight isn’t over. We’re currently in a recount for the Arizona Attorney General’s race – a very important statewide office that would make this year even better if we flip it. We also have room for improvement in 2024. Despite running in completely new districts, we maintained our numbers in the Arizona legislature, keeping Republicans to the thinnest majority possible. But redistricting favorable to Republicans also saw us lose two Congressional seats – winning them back will be crucial to gaining control of the U.S. House again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, AZ Dems | The Arizona Democratic Party is working around the clock to ensure Democratic candidates are elected up and down the ballot — candidates who will fight for what YOU value most, like affordable healthcare for every Arizonan, economic stability and job opportunities for working families, and representation for the most marginalized among us. Help us continue to build a party that is fighting for all Arizonans. Become a monthly donor. **** Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. I recently announced that I am not running for the Democratic Leadership in the next Congress, but I will continue to represent my beloved San Francisco in the House of Representatives.
[I’m honored to help bring up the next generation of Democratic leaders that will move our country forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55291975/381228544/1694517773?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODE5YmEwOS0yZDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_yfco78NwkYFEbZFDryz3cns2wMT4nUH6s4sfH9158=)
And I couldn’t be more excited to see what they achieve. We’re in good hands.
But make no mistake: this does not mean I’m abandoning the fight to elect Democrats and protect our Democracy.
[**_So I’m already planning ahead for the next election to ELECT incredible Democrats, DEFEAT extremist Republicans, and support our amazing new Democratic Leadership that will fight for working families. I’m hoping for another 6,500 gifts before my End of Month Deadline to show the country that Democrats are just getting started delivering for the American people. Can I count on you? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55291976/381228546/1694517773?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODE5YmEwOS0yZDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_yfco78NwkYFEbZFDryz3cns2wMT4nUH6s4sfH9158=)
There’s no denying that Democrats just achieved historic wins this cycle that defied expectations and shut down the red wave everyone thought was coming. You made that happen.
I’m so proud of everything we’ve accomplished TOGETHER.
[And if you’re proud too and want to protect our progress, I hope you’ll consider joining our cause before my End of Month Deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55291977/381228547/1694517773?refcode=20221129_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODE5YmEwOS0yZDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_yfco78NwkYFEbZFDryz3cns2wMT4nUH6s4sfH9158=)
It would mean so much to me personally.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lavern=20Spicer?=
subject: Giving Tuesday
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4d89adb85f&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello PeterToday, November 29th, is Giving Tuesday. Here at Curley’s House, we’re in giving mode seven days out of the week...Since our inception, Curley’s House of Style, which is staffed by volunteers, has assisted hundreds of thousands of needy people who are unable to get help from other agencies or have run out of options and resources.Besides operating a food bank, Curley’s House offers programs designed to help residents through job skills training and placement, referral services, information on healthcare and nutrition, financial literacy, and a “Love Thyself” mentoringprogram that builds self-esteem in abused, homeless and HIV/AIDS-infected women.
| [DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dcb1de7731&e=fdefed58de)
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=30f8ad2263&e=fdefed58de)
At this time of the year, we are overrun with people coming and needing more help than usual for the holidays. It breaks our heart to turn anyone away, but with the costs of food and goods this year, we’re running on short supply.We had an incredibly successful turkey drive for Thanksgiving and were able to feed thousands. We need to keep that pace up for Christmas, and on this Giving Tuesday we’re asking you to give to our food bank so that we can do just that.
| [DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=af57a75264&e=fdefed58de)
---
**And just so you know, whatever that you donate to Curley’s House is tax-deductible as we are a non-profit organization. So please, give generously as possible.****You will be helping us feed families right here in America.Please pitch in anything you can with your generous spirit of giving today!**
| [DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8ffa4c7e11&e=fdefed58de)
---
With love and gratitude,Lavern SpicerFounder of Curley’s House

We hope you had a great Thanksgiving, Peter. We hope you enjoyed some downtime after what was a very busy election year. We’re now turning our focus to 2023 and Indiana’s municipal elections. Democrats have the opportunity to flip key mayoral races that will help us not only create a better future for our families but also set us up for success in the 2024 statewide races. **That means it’s already time for us to start building our team of Indiana Democrats.** [**The first monthly deadline of the 2023 elections is Wednesday at midnight and we need your help. It’s so important to start strong -- so, please, rush a donation of $15 or more if you’re able before midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55292423/381230524/1643342139?refcode=221129-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWNjZjQ2My0zMDcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jXdaK7wj4roLhdGoIPJlCDt8xOBm3kqGmLJvlPnj_Pg=) We need more and more strong Hoosier Democrats to step up to run for office at the local level – mayors and city council and more – and we need to show them that we have their backs as they make decisions on stepping up to run in their communities. **We would not be able to build our party in Indiana without your generous support.** Thank you, Indiana Dems HQ

body:

Peter Willis,

Early voting is underway in Georgia, and
voter turnout has been strong!

However, this race is still anyone's to win. Mitch McConnell and the
billionaires are flooding Georgia with attack ads that lie about Reverend
Warnock’s record.

That's why we must expand our organizing in this final week. In 2020, we
helped deliver Georgia to Democrats by raising turnout by 11% per voter
contact — and we need to talk to as many supporters as possible.

name: Candace Owens
subject: Peter ,they hate us because we are winning.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989034:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
Special message from Candace Owens

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989034:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)

Peter,

I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday.

But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community.

The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities.

**They hate us because we are winning. **

Just wearing a _**White Lives Matter**_ shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady.

**I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses.**

**Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. [**_I am asking you to support our mission at this critical time to prepare for 2023. Can you chip in any amount today? Click here >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989034:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)**

Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities.

**BLEXIT Chapters**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation.

**Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. **

BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989034:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)

Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission.

[_**Help support BLEXIT 's State Chapters by giving today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989034:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)

**BLEXIT Educational Resources**

We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason.

So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989034:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)

We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests.

Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures.

[_**Can you support BLEXIT 's educational efforts with a gift today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989034:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)

**BLEXIT Student Movement**

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts.

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

_I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities_.

**Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989035:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989036:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989037:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989038:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989039:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989040:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989041:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989042:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61989034:6zAzNlGNM:m:1:3374627611:CEB00179CBC72C703FCBC95968C21D17:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._
