clean_body: Special message from Candace Owens Peter, I'm sure you're getting many emails today asking for donations because it's Giving Tuesday. But I'm not emailing you just because it's Giving Tuesday. I don't want you to think that BLEXIT takes your support for granted. Our mission at BLEXIT is critical; it takes a community to achieve it and you are a critical part of our community. The media is attacking us non-stop because we are breaking free from the victimhood mentality perpetuated in Black and urban communities. They hate us because we are winning. Just wearing a White Lives Matter shirt brought more attention to the issues of crime and high abortion rates in Black communities than Michelle Obama did as First Lady. I aim to raise $200,000 before the end of the year to support BLEXIT chapters, the fight against Critical Race Theory (CRT), and BLEXIT 's educational programming including the Student Movement on college campuses. Peter, I 'm not asking you to donate simply because it's Giving Tuesday. Here's how your donation helps BLEXIT change the narrative in Black and urban communities. BLEXIT Chapters Our state chapters are the hands and feet of the BLEXIT Foundation. Our 14,000 volunteers and 43 state chapters engage with the communities other organizations have abandoned. BLEXIT State Chapters provide resources and opportunities to create long-term success for those around them. Through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events, BLEXIT State Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level. Our values are pro-Freedom, pro-Faith, and pro-Family! We are destroying the victimhood mentality and our chapters play a key role in this mission. BLEXIT Educational Resources We know the rise of Critical Race Theory (CRT) has some families concerned and with good reason. So we put together a guide against CRT for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This resource encourages you to think critically about CRT, including how to spot it and what you can do to fight it. We also created a Candidate Guide for the mid-term elections to help people make informed decisions and vote for the candidate that best represented their values and interests. Peter, your gift today helps us educate people so they can take control of their futures. BLEXIT Student Movement The BLEXIT Student Movement is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time! The goal for these clubs is to bring BLEXIT's message to historically Black universities and colleges through events and outreach efforts. The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike. I know many organizations are asking for your support. What we are doing at BLEXIT is unlike any other organization. We are promoting pro-Family, pro-Faith, and pro-Freedom values in Black and urban communities. Please rush your support today. I am counting on your support to raise $200,000 before the new year. Thank you, Candace Owens Co-Founder & President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. | | It’s been going around the internet as satire that Joe Biden and Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau are freezing the bank accounts of Chinese protestors. This is obviously untrue, but it’s startling that it’s close enough to reality for satire. What is true is that the Biden administration continues to attack free speech and involve itself in areas that are far outside of its Constitutional jurisdiction. Case and point are the White House statements yesterday regarding Twitter’s management and the “danger” of free speech on social media, alongside threats from many powerful liberal politicians. While Chinese protestors take to the street to decry censorship and lockdowns in their country, our own government moves closer to social and economic control.
---

clean_body: Free Speech & Lockdowns: Part II | Posted by Joel Borgquist, 3 min | It’s been going around the internet as satire that Joe Biden | | Can't see this message? | | | | | New Blog Post | | | | | Free Speech & Lockdowns: Part II | | Posted by Joel Borgquist, 3 min | | | | It’s been going around the internet as satire that Joe Biden and Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau are freezing the bank accounts of Chinese protestors. This is obviously untrue, but it’s startling that it’s close enough to reality for satire. What is true is that the Biden administration continues to attack free speech and involve itself in areas that are far outside of its Constitutional jurisdiction. Case and point are the White House statements yesterday regarding Twitter’s management and the “danger” of free speech on social media, alongside threats from many powerful liberal politicians. While Chinese protestors take to the street to decry censorship and lockdowns in their country, our own government moves closer to social and economic control. | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . **Delays. Distrust. Disaster.** Peter, those three words sum up the last two elections for our country. We used to know the results of an election within hours. Now, the results can be delayed for weeks or litigated for months in court, like my election was in 2020. Democrats’ delays and shady tactics like ballot harvesting and drop boxes continue to undermine the integrity of our elections. But when we call for basic election integrity measures like Voter ID, the left and the mainstream media deem it _**VOTER SUPPRESSION****.**_ Peter, the left has no interest in fair and transparent elections – they _only_ care about winning and keeping their control over the American people. **That’s why I**** _desperately_****need your support to continue to lead and grow the fight for election integrity in Congress**. clean_body: I think that about sums it up...| | | Delays. Distrust. Disaster. Peter, those three words sum up the last two elections for our country. We used to know the results of an election within hours. Now, the results can be delayed for weeks or litigated for months in court, like my election was in 2020. Democrats’ delays and shady tactics like ballot harvesting and drop boxes continue to undermine the integrity of our elections. But when we call for basic election integrity measures like Voter ID, the left and the mainstream media deem it VOTER SUPPRESSION. Peter, the left has no interest in fair and transparent elections – they only care about winning and keeping their control over the American people. That’s why I desperatelyneed your support to continue to lead and grow the fight for election integrity in Congress. | | Thank you,Claudia Tenney | Contributions to WinRed are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. name: Team Slotkin
subject: ICYMI: We officially “lost better”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email11292022 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email11292022]
Team,
The Michigan Board of Canvassers met yesterday to certify the results of the Nov. 8 election. That means we now officially won MI-07. We wanted to make sure you saw Elissa’s note earlier about what it looks like to “lose better”, our campaign mantra that helped get us over the top.
Team Slotkin
________________________________________________________________________
Sent Nov. 13, 2022
Team,
If you’ve followed any of our three campaigns, you've heard me say that a key objective for us is to “lose better”. That means doing just a little bit better in the heavier Republican-leaning areas of Michigan's 7th district.
The election results this week were a perfect example. We won our race by 5% -- our biggest-ever win margin -- and it was driven, in part, by our performance in the deepest red areas of the district.
A state cartographer, Jackson Franks, shared this map on social media of our results. It clearly shows that we were able to turn out Democratic voters in and around the City of Lansing. But it also shows that we flipped Eaton County (my opponent's home county), our wins in smaller towns across the district like Brighton, Howell, DeWitt, and Grand Ledge, and our work to keep margins closer in the more traditional Republican areas:
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28]
I credit our amazing team of volunteers for helping us "lose better" -- their hard work, dedication, and conversations with their neighbors are a big reason why we are able to keep winning in tough turf.
And here's one more graphic, from the New York Times, showing our overperformance across the district compared to President Biden in the 2020 presidential election:
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28]
Thank you all, again, for your continued support. We truly could not have done any of this without you.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email11292022]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she is running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Contact Elissa
P.O. BOX 4145,
EAST LANSING, MI 48826

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: This is a long but important email.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This is going to be a long email, but please stick with me and read the
whole thing. It’s important. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122162?refcode=em20221129-26312&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26312%2E1203867%2EMF5oor ]But, if you’re already ready to help us
take on the establishment and reach our $30,000 fundraising goal, you can
click here to make a contribution.

Justice Democrats was started by a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers and
super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for
president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions
of people for the first time — myself included.

When we recruited AOC to run, she was working as a bartender — she even
worked as a bartender for many months while running for office. Sometimes,
that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class candidate.

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make
everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of
the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever
to serve in Congress in his place.

This year, we recruited and supported Summer Lee through Election Day to
victory. In January, she’ll be sworn in as the very first Black woman to
represent Pennsylvania in Congress.

Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing
more. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly
endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a
fraction of what they can raise.

We’re a grassroots organization. Whether or not we can succeed, whether or
not we can grow beyond what we’ve done so far, largely depends on
supporters like you donating when you can.

So today, I’m asking you to help us reach our $30,000 Giving Tuesday
Fundraising Goal. I promise you that no other org will spend your money
more efficiently.

So, what do you think? Can you make a $3 donation today to
help us continue the work of transforming the Democratic Party by
primarying entrenched incumbents?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122162?refcode=em20221129-26312&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26312%2E1203867%2EMF5oor ]→ Yes, I can chip in $3 to Justice Democrats to help
recruit and elect the next generation of the Squad to Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122162?refcode=em20221129-26312&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26312%2E1203867%2EMF5oor ]Contribute $3

We understand that not everyone can give every time we ask for support.
Typically, only 1-in-100 people who open an email from us end up
contributing. Some people just don’t have the extra cash right now, and
that is perfectly fine. We love all of you no matter what!

But if even 10% of the people reading this email decided to make a
donation right now, we would reach our Giving Tuesday Fundraising Goal
before midnight.

I know we can do amazing things together. I’m grateful to be in this fight
with you.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26312%2E1203867%2EMF5oor ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26312%2E1203867%2EMF5oor ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221129-26312-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26312_1203867_MF5oor&akid=26312%2E1203867%2EMF5oor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26312%2E1203867%2EMF5oor

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: LCV 2022 Giving Tuesday Status for Peter: [PENDING]
body:
__Can you rush a gift before midnight to unlock a major contribution? |
---

| Peter --

**Earlier today, we shared the news that a major donor set up a $100,000 challenge grant -- _but we ONLY get it if 500 grassroots donors pitch in before midnight._**

There's only hours left for us to reach this goal -- and right now we're not on track to meet it. According to our records, you haven't pitched in yet, Peter -- so we're asking:

[Can you help us out? Even just $5 will make a difference >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Your support can go even further when you give monthly: if you begin a monthly donation -- even if it's as little as $5 -- _we get to count it 12 times._ If everyone reading this right now pitched in just $5, we'd blow through the goal before Giving Tuesday ends at midnight.

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW**
Please confirm your status

**2022 GIVING TUESDAY CHALLENGE**
**Name:** Peter Willis
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Goal:** 500 donations by midnight TONIGHT
**Progress:** 46% to goal
**Giving Tuesday Status:** [STILL PENDING -- DONATE TODAY >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMX_X~) |
---|---|---

The climate and environmental justice progress that LCV and our partners have been able to secure thus far is because of your continued investment in our work.

Thank you, Peter. See our note from earlier below.

Onward,
LCV Membership Team

* * *

---

[](https://links.messages.lcv.)
|
Dear Peter,

**Last week, we shared the news that if we can secure 500 donors by midnight this Giving Tuesday (tonight!) -- we'll secure a $100,000 match grant from a major donor.**

That's a huge goal. But there's a bit of a loophole: if you begin a monthly donation -- even if it's as little as $5 -- we get to count it 12 times.

[This $100,000 grant is not an opportunity we can miss out on. Please make your Giving Tuesday contribution to LCV today -- we cannot afford to come up short >>](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---
**[**DONATE TODAY**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/7RYwsNzND-)**

Peter -- we know that when the environmental movement turns out, we win. We saw it with the Green Wave during these midterms -- and now we need to translate that election victory into BIG wins for the environment.

Here are just a few reasons why your Giving Tuesday gift is EXTRA important right now, Peter:
1. **Right now, we 're urging President Biden to take decisive executive action on climate change.** With a strong mandate after this election, Biden has the power to declare a climate emergency to unlock federal funding to address the climate crisis, support clean energy solutions, and advance environmental justice. But that's ONLY going to happen if the environmental movement campaigns for it NOW.
2. **We have to stop the Willow Project, and we have to stop it NOW.** If this massive drilling project is allowed to move forward in Alaska and across the country, it would be the largest oil extraction project on federal land -- _equivalent to one year of carbon emissions from 76 coal plants_. We're working with partners in Alaska to help stop this project before it begins -- but how far we can go is going to come down to support from members like you.
3. **We stand for environmental justice.** With the growing threats of climate change and voter suppression, we stand up against the environmental issues that impact us all by making our voices heard by policymakers and encouraging a healthier, more sustainable future with critical investments in renewable energy, cleaner transportation, and air quality monitoring in vulnerable communities.

Bottom line, meeting our Giving Tuesday goal _matters_ , Peter. I hope you'll pitch in: [Our match unlock goal is 500 donors, but it ends at midnight tonight >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMX_X~)
[](https://links.messages.lcv.)
Remember, if you begin a monthly donation today, we get to count it 12 times toward our 500 donor goal.

Thank you for your continued support in the fight against climate change.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8965977&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDY0MTgzNQS2&spReportId=MTYyMDY0MTgzNQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8965977&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDY0MTgzNQS2&spReportId=MTYyMDY0MTgzNQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTqYqEZS_) |

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Our fight has only just begun.
body:
Today, you can give the gift of LIFE.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988788:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---
Peter,
---
This year's Giving Tuesday could not have come at a more important time...
---
**Not only is it our first Giving Tuesday of a new era, but this year, it falls _just 24 hours ahead of our November end-of-month deadline._**
---
While this has no doubt been a historic year for our pro-life movement, we must remain vigilant in knowing that our fight has only just begun.
---
And we needn't look any further than the recent midterm elections.
---
_Peter, the Big Abortion Lobby just spent roughly $500 MILLION to deceive the American people. Simply put, staying on budget has never been more critical._
---
So, this Giving Tuesday, I hope you'll consider giving the gift of life as we can continue to cut through the pro-abortion propaganda and fight for the rights of the most vulnerable among us.
---
[**Please watch this special message that I recorded for you about our historic pro-life year - and then make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988788:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988788:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---
[WATCH NOW ▶️](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988789:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988789:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988790:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988791:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988792:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988793:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988788:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---

Unlike the Big Abortion Lobby who has the luxury of a taxpayer-funded warchest, our pro-life movement is powered solely by generous donors like YOU.
---
That's why year in and year out, Giving Tuesday donations have supplemented a substantial portion of our budget.
---
_When the lives of countless unborn babies depended on us, it was YOUR prayers and YOUR generosity this year that helped us accomplish what once seemed impossible in sending Roe v. Wade to the ash heap of history._
---
And now, on this Giving Tuesday, I have to ask if you will extend that generosity to help us continue our fight in this new era.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to give the gift of LIFE on this Giving Tuesday.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988788:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61988788:J9T4QlG4N:m:1:3371220873:36B131AE83CBFC29C88D6B9BE4323303:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America is a nonprofit 501(c)(4) membership organization. With your gift of $25 or more you will become a Sustaining Member of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, and will receive information regarding the special benefits of your annual membership. Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, at the discretion of its board of directors and officers. If you would like to make a directed contribution to support a particular project, please contact us. Although Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America periodically uses its general treasury funds to engage on important political matters, the organization does not accept funds earmarked for independent expenditure activity or designated for other political purposes in support or opposition to federal candidates.
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: As popular as a cockroach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15506%2E3422442%2EksXzfi)
Members of Congress should work for the American people--not their stock portfolio.
Sounds simple, but too many of my colleagues have used their position of power to enrich themselves by trading stocks based on the information they learn in Congress. **It’s a problem in both parties, and I’ll keep fighting to hold my fellow elected officials accountable.**
**Earlier this year I was proud to introduce the STOCK Act 2.0,** which would ban Members of Congress from trading stocks, cutting down on corruption and helping restore faith in our elected leaders.
I’ve pushed for reform, and I’ve consistently said that to be effective, any bill banning stock trading should:
* Ensure that blind trusts are truly blind
* Include Members’ spouses and children
* Have a real and serious penalty for breaking the law

Congress is about as popular as a cockroach, and it’s our job as elected officials to restore people’s faith in our democracy. That starts with cleaning up corruption.
Thanks for supporting my work.
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13721?refcode=EMDA30_STO_20221129_V1_F&t=2&akid=15506%2E3422442%2EksXzfi)**
**[Show your support ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-stock-act/?source=EMDA30_STO_20221129_V1_F&t=3&akid=15506%2E3422442%2EksXzfi)**
--Katie Porter

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=4&akid=15506%2E3422442%2EksXzfi)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=15506%2E3422442%2EksXzfi).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help power our reelection campaign to victory? But with the runoff officially underway and the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate grassroots support. **That's why I'm urgently asking:** [Will you give $5 or more before midnight to win in Georgia and hit our $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55296436/381244498/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4853-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjUzMmY5Yy0zOTcwLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvjUzBG7MOqgFpLir6-6EJiQd27RrUF6Qn-jCWnhTg4=)

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. ****We've set a $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal so we can fight back against GOP attacks and keep up our momentum – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help.**

clean_body: Friend – after I reached out to this grassroots team, thousands of folks stepped up to rush their urgent support. I'm so grateful. If we keep this up, we'll be able to spread our bold message to Georgians in every corner of our state. But my team just showed me the latest numbers, and we're on track to fall just short of our final end-of-month fundraising goal. We need one more push to close this budget gap – so I'm personally asking: Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help power our reelection campaign to victory? Here's the best link to donate: = Winning this race in Georgia won't be easy – but I draw strength from folks like you who pitch in at important moments like this. Thank you. – Raphael \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Sen. Warnock Subject: I can't wait to share this with you | | | Friend, the results from the general election showed me narrowly leading my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker. But with the runoff officially underway and the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate grassroots support. That's why I'm urgently asking: = Election experts just confirmed what we've known for months: Our race will be decided by a razor-thin margin. That's why GOP donors are rushing our race with over $37 million – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC is launching attack ads during this critical stretch. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal so we can fight back against GOP attacks and keep up our momentum – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do. – Rev. Raphael Warnock Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock: Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win. Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory. If you're with me, =_. If you'd like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, text "GEORGIA" to 52005. Thank you! – Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock = Text GEORGIA to 52005 • | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. name: Sen. Cory Booker (via Democrats.org)
subject: Derek, help my friend Raphael Warnock win reelection in seven days→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We cannot afford to lose such an incredible force like Reverend Warnock in the Senate. Georgia needs him and our country needs him. | |
---
For the past two years, I’ve had the honor of serving alongside Senator Raphael Warnock in the Senate. Whether it’s fighting to lower costs for essential medication like insulin or working to address health inequities in our country, Raphael Warnock is the best type of public servant there is. **He’s a man who deeply cares about his community.** We cannot afford to lose such an incredible force like Reverend Warnock in the Senate. Georgia needs him and our country needs him. _And hey, I’ll admit that I’d love to continue working with another wonderful bald brother in the Senate._ **I’m grateful for every member of this grassroots team for their help to reelect Sen. Warnock. I’m asking you to step up and split a $10 donation between his campaign and the DNC before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline.**

clean_body: We cannot afford to lose such an incredible force like Reverend Warnock in the Senate. Georgia needs him and our country needs him. | | For the past two years, I’ve had the honor of serving alongside Senator Raphael Warnock in the Senate. Whether it’s fighting to lower costs for essential medication like insulin or working to address health inequities in our country, Raphael Warnock is the best type of public servant there is. He’s a man who deeply cares about his community. We cannot afford to lose such an incredible force like Reverend Warnock in the Senate. Georgia needs him and our country needs him. And hey, I’ll admit that I’d love to continue working with another wonderful bald brother in the Senate. I’m grateful for every member of this grassroots team for their help to reelect Sen. Warnock. I’m asking you to step up and split a $10 donation between his campaign and the DNC before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline. Derek, it’s people like Raphael Warnock who inspire me every day to get up and continue fighting for a better America. We’ve only got seven days to help Sen. Warnock defend his seat. It’s not a lot of time, and we have a lot of voters to call and doors to knock to make sure every Georgian is ready to make their voice heard on December 6. Protecting this seat requires a groundswell of grassroots energy and support. I really appreciate your support, Derek. Cory Cory Booker U.S. Senator, New Jersey When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come.
